Un conjuro dispel magic exitoso lanzado contra una forma astral o un cuerpo físico pone fin al conjuro para esa criatura. Si el cuerpo original de una criatura o su forma astral cae a 0 puntos de golpe, el conjuro termina para esa criatura. Si el conjuro termina y el cordón plateado está intacto, el cordón arrastra la forma astral de la criatura de regreso a su cuerpo, poniendo fin a su estado de animación suspendida. Si eres devuelto a tu cuerpo prematuramente, tus compañeros permanecen en sus formas astrales y deben encontrar su propio camino de regreso a sus cuerpos, generalmente cayendo a 0 puntos de golpe.
material: Por cada criatura a la que afectes con este conjuro, debes proveer un jacinto con un valor mínimo de 1.000 po y una barra de plata ornamentada tallada con un valor mínimo de 100 po, todo lo cual el conjuro consume.

name: Astral Projection
desc:
Until the spell ends, the objetivos leave their material bodies (inconsciente and in a state of suspended animation, not aging or requiring food or air) and project astral forms that resemble their mortal forms in nearly all ways, keeping their game statistics and possessions.

While in this astral form you trail a tether, a silvery-white cord that sprouts from between your shoulder blades and fades into immateriality a pie behind you. As long as the tether remains intact you can find your way back to your material body. When it is cut—which requires an effect specifically stating that it cuts your tether —your soul and body are separated and you immediately die. Damage against and other effects on your astral form have no effect on your material body either during this spell or after its duration ends. Your astral form travels freely through the Astral Plane and can pass through interplanar portals on the Astral Plane leading to any other plane. When you enter a new plane or return to the plane you were on when casting this spell, your material body and possessions are transported along the tether, allowing you to return fully intact with all your gear as you enter the new plane.

The spell ends for all objetivos when you use an action to dismiss it, for an individual objetivo when a successful dispel magic is cast upon its astral form or material body, or when either its material body or its astral form drops to 0 puntos de golpe. When the spell ends for a objetivo and the tether is intact, the tether pulls the objetivo's astral form back to its material body, ending the suspended animation.

If the spell ends for you prematurely, other objetivos remain in their astral forms and must find their own way back to their bodies (usually by dropping to 0 puntos de golpe).

name: Augury
desc:
Lanzando palos incrustados con gemas, rodando huesos de dragón, disponiendo cartas ornamentadas u empleando alguna otra herramienta de adivinación, recibes un presagio de una entidad de otro mundo sobre los resultados de un curso de acción específico que planeas llevar a cabo en los próximos 30 minutos. El DJ elige entre los siguientes presagios posibles: 
- Fortuna, para resultados buenos 
- Desgracia, para resultados malos 
- Fortuna y desgracia, para resultados tanto buenos como malos 
- Nada, para resultados que no son especialmente buenos ni malos El conjuro no tiene en cuenta ninguna circunstancia posible que pudiera cambiar el resultado, como el lanzamiento de conjuros adicionales o la pérdida o incorporación de un compañero. Si lanzas el conjuro dos o más veces antes de completar tu próximo descanso largo, existe una probabilidad acumulativa del 25 por ciento por cada lanzamiento después del primero de que obtengas una lectura aleatoria. El DJ realiza esta tirada en secreto.
material: Palos, huesos u objetos similares especialmente marcados con un valor mínimo de 25 po.

name: Augury
desc:
With the aid of a divining tool, you receive an omen from beyond the Material Plane about the results of a specific course of action that you intend to take within the next 30 minutos. The Narrator chooses from the following:

* Fortunate omen (good results)
* Calamity omen (bad results)
* Ambivalence omen (both good and bad results)
* No omen (results that aren't especially good or bad)

This omen does not account for possible circumstances that could change the outcome, such as making additional preparations.

When you cast this spell again before finishing a descanso largo, the chance of getting a random reading from the above options increases. The Narrator makes the following roll in secret: second casting—25%, third casting—50%, fourth casting—75%, fifth casting—100%.

name: Aura of Protection or Destruction
desc: When you cast this spell, you radiate an otherworldly energy that warps the fate of todas las criaturas within 30 pies of you. Decide whether to call upon either a Celestial or a fiend for aid. Choosing a Celestial charges a 30-pie-radius around you with an aura of nonviolence; until the start of your next turn, every tirada de ataque made by or against a criatura inside the aura is treated as a natural 1. Choosing a fiend charges the area with an aura of violence; until the start of your next turn, every tirada de ataque made by or against a criatura inside the aura, including you, is treated as a natural 20.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 4th level or higher, you can extend the duration by 1 ronda for each slot level above 3rd.

name: Auspicious Warning
desc: Just in time, you call out a fortunate warning to a criatura within range. The objetivo rolls a d4 and adds the number rolled to an tirada de ataque, ability check, or tirada de salvación that it has just made and uses the new result for determining success or failure.
casting_time: 1 reaction, which you take when an ally makes an attack roll, ability check, or saving throw

name: Avert Evil Eye
desc: The evil eye recibe many forms. Any incident of bad luck can be blamed on it, especially if a character recently displayed arrogance or selfishness. When avert evil eye is cast, the recipient has a small degree of protection against the evil eye for up to 1 hora. While the spell lasts, the objetivo of the spell has ventaja on tirada de salvacións against being cegado, hechizado, cursed, and asustado. During the spell's duration, the objetivo can also cancel desventaja on one d20 roll the objetivo is about to make, but doing so ends the spell's effect.

name: Avoid Grievous Injury
desc: You cast this spell when a foe strikes you with a critical hit but before damage dice are rolled. The critical hit against you becomes a normal hit.
casting_time: 1 reaction, which you take when you are struck by a critical hit
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Sorcerer, Warlock, Wizard

name: Avronin’s Astral Assembly
desc:
You alert a number of criaturas that you are familiar with, up to your spellcasting ability modifier (minimum of 1), of your intent to communicate with them through spiritual projection. The invitation can extend any distance and even cross to other planes of existence. Once notified, the criaturas can choose to accept this communication at any time during the duration of the spell.

When a criatura accepts, its spirit is projected into one of the gems used in casting the spell. The material body it leaves behind falls inconsciente and doesn't need food or air. The criatura's consciousness is present in the room with you, and its normal form appears as an astral projection within 5 pies of the gem its spirit occupies. You can see and hear all the criaturas who have joined in the assembly, and they can see and hear you and each other as if they were present (which they are, astrally). They can't interact with anything physically.

A criatura can end the spell's effect on itself voluntarily at any time, as can you. When the effect ends or the duration expires, a criatura's spirit returns to its body and it regains consciousness. A criatura that withdraws voluntarily from the assembly can't rejoin it even if the spell is still active. If a gem is broken while occupied by a criatura's astral self, the spirit in the gem returns to its body and the criatura suffers two levels of agotamiento.
material: a spool of fine copper wire and a gem worth at least 100 gp for each objetivo

name: Awaken
desc: Tras pasar el tiempo de lanzamiento trazando caminos mágicos en el interior de una piedra preciosa, tocas una bestia o planta de tamaño Grande o menor. El objetivo no debe tener puntuación de Inteligencia o debe tener una Inteligencia de 3 o menos. El objetivo obtiene una Inteligencia de 10. El objetivo también obtiene la capacidad de hablar un idioma que tú conozcas. Si el objetivo es una planta, obtiene la capacidad de mover sus ramas, raíces, enredaderas, tallos y demás, y adquiere sentidos similares a los de un humano. Tu DJ elige las estadísticas apropiadas para la planta despertada, como las estadísticas del arbusto despertado o el árbol despertado. La bestia o planta despertada queda encantada por ti durante 30 días o hasta que tú o tus compañeros le hagáis algún daño. Cuando la condición de encantado termina, la criatura despertada decide si permanece amistosa contigo, en función de cómo la trataste mientras estaba encantada.
material: Una ágata con un valor mínimo de 1.000 po, que el conjuro consume.

name: Awaken
desc:
You impart sentience in the objetivo, granting it an Inteligencia of 10 and competencia in a language you know. A plant objetivoed by this spell gains the ability to move, as well as senses identical to those of a human. The Narrator assigns awakened plant statistics (such as an awakened shrub or awakened tree).

The objetivo is hechizado by you for 30 days or until you or your companions harm it. Depending on how you treated the objetivo while it was hechizado, when the condition ends the awakened criatura may choose to remain friendly to you.
higher_level: objetivo an additional criatura for each slot level above 5th. Each objetivo requires its own material component.

name: Awaken Object
desc:
After spending the casting time enchanting a ruby along with a Large or smaller no mágico object in humanoid form, you touch the ruby to the object. The ruby dissolves into the object, which becomes a living construct imbued with sentience. If the object has no face, a humanoid face appears on it in an appropriate location. The awakened object's statistics are determined by its size, as shown on the table below. An awakened object can use an action to make a ataque cuerpo a cuerpo con arma against a objetivo within 5 pies of it. It has free will, acts independently, and speaks one language you know. It is initially friendly to anyone who assisted in its creation.

An awakened object's Velocidad is 30 pies. If it has no apparent legs or other means of moving, it gains a volando Velocidad of 30 pies and it can hover. Its sight and hearing are equivalent to a typical human's senses. Inteligencia, Sabiduría, and Carisma can be adjusted up or down by the GM to fit unusual circumstances. A beautiful statue might awaken with increased Carisma, for example, or the bust of a great philosopher could have surprisingly high Sabiduría.

An awakened object needs no air, food, water, or sleep. Damage to an awakened object can be healed or mechanically repaired.

| Size | HP | AC | Attack | Str | Dex | Con | Int | Wis | Cha |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| T | 20 | 18 | +8 para impactar, 1d4 + 4 damage | 4 | 18 | 10 | 2d6 | 2d6 | 2d6 |
| S | 25 | 16 | +6 para impactar, 1d8 + 2 damage | 6 | 14 | 10  | 3d6 | 2d6 | 2d6 |
| M | 40 | 13 | +5 para impactar, 2d6 + 1 damage | 10 | 12  | 10 | 3d6 | 3d6 | 2d6 |
| L | 50 | 10 | +6 para impactar, 2d10 + 2 damage | 14 | 10 | 10 | 3d6 | 3d6 | 2d6 + 2 |
material: a ruby worth at least 1,000 gp, which the spell consumes

name: Babble
desc:
This spell causes the speech of affected criaturas to sound like nonsense. cada criatura in a 30-pie-radius sphere centered on a point you choose within range debe tener éxito en an tirada de salvación de Inteligencia when you cast this spell or be affected by it.
  An affected criatura cannot communicate in any spoken language that it knows. When it speaks, the words come out as gibberish. Spells with verbal components cannot be cast. The spell does not affect telepathic communication, nonverbal communication, or sounds emitted by any criatura that does not have a spoken language. As an action, a criatura under the effect of this spell can attempt another tirada de salvación de Inteligencia against the effect. en una salvación exitosa, the spell ends.

name: Bad Timing
desc: You point toward a criatura that you can see and twist strands of chaotic energy around its fate. If the objetivo gets a failure on a tirada de salvación de Carisma, the next tirada de ataque or ability check the criatura attempts within 10 minutos is made with desventaja.

name: Bane
desc: Hasta tres criaturas de tu elección que puedas ver dentro del alcance deben realizar tiradas de salvación de Carisma. Siempre que un objetivo que falle esta tirada de salvación realice una tirada de ataque o una tirada de salvación antes de que el conjuro termine, el objetivo debe tirar un d4 y restar el número obtenido de la tirada de ataque o de la tirada de salvación.
higher_level: Cuando lanzas este conjuro usando un espacio de conjuro de nivel 2 o superior, puedes seleccionar una criatura adicional por cada nivel de espacio por encima del 1º.
material: Una gota de sangre.

name: Bane
desc: The senses of the objetivos are filled with phantom energies that make them more vulnerable and less capable. Until the spell ends, a d4 is subtracted from attack rolls and tirada de salvacións made by a objetivo.
higher_level: You objetivo an additional criatura for each slot level above 1st.

name: Banishment
desc: Intentas enviar a una criatura que puedas ver dentro del alcance a otro plano de existencia. El objetivo debe superar una tirada de salvación de Carisma o ser desterrado. Si el objetivo es nativo del plano de existencia en el que te encuentras, lo destierras a un plano semimaterial inofensivo. Mientras está allí, el objetivo queda incapacitado. El objetivo permanece allí hasta que el conjuro termina, momento en el que reaparece en el espacio que abandonó o en el espacio desocupado más cercano si dicho espacio está ocupado. Si el objetivo es nativo de un plano de existencia distinto al tuyo, es desterrado con un suave chasquido, regresando a su plano de origen. Si el conjuro termina antes de que haya transcurrido 1 minuto, el objetivo reaparece en el espacio que abandonó o en el espacio desocupado más cercano si dicho espacio está ocupado. De lo contrario, el objetivo no regresa.
higher_level: Cuando lanzas este conjuro usando un espacio de conjuro de nivel 5 o superior, puedes seleccionar una criatura adicional por cada nivel de espacio por encima del 4º.
material: Un objeto que resulte desagradable al objetivo.

name: Banishment
desc:
You employ sheer fuerza of will to make reality question the existence of a nearby criatura, causing them to warp visibly in front of you.

Until the spell ends, a objetivo native to your current plane is banished to a harmless demiplane and incapacitado. At the end of the duration the objetivo reappears in the space it left (or the nearest unoccupied space). A objetivo native to a different plane is instead banished to its native plane.

At the end of each of its turns, a banished criatura can repeat the tirada de salvación with a -1 penalty for each ronda it has spent banished, returning en un éxito. If the spell ends before its maximum duration, the objetivo reappears in the space it left (or the nearest unoccupied space) but otherwise a objetivo native to a different plane doesn't return.
higher_level: The duration of banishment increases by 1 ronda for each slot level above 4th.

name: Banshee Wail
desc: You emit a soul-shattering wail. Every criatura within a 30-pie cone who hears the wail debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría. Those that fail take 6d10 daño psíquico and become asustado of you; a asustado criatura repeats the tirada de salvación at the end of its turn, ending the effect on itself en un éxito. Those that succeed take 3d10 daño psíquico and aren't asustado. This spell has no effect on constructs and undead.

name: Bardo
desc: You capture some of the fading life essence of the triggering criatura, drawing on the energy of the tenuous moment between life and death. You can then use this essence to immediately harm or help a different criatura you can see within range. If you choose to harm, the objetivo debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría. The objetivo recibe daño psíquico equal to 6d8 + your spellcasting ability modifier en una salvación fallida, or half as much damage on a successful one. If you choose to help, the objetivo regains puntos de golpe equal to 3d8 + your spellcasting ability modifier. This spell can't be triggered by the death of a construct or an undead criatura, and it can't restore puntos de golpe to constructs or undead.
casting_time: 1 reaction, which you take when you see a creature within 30 feet of you die

name: Barkskin
desc: Tocas a una criatura voluntaria. Hasta que el conjuro termine, la piel del objetivo adquiere un aspecto rugoso similar a la corteza de un árbol, y la CA del objetivo no puede ser inferior a 16, independientemente del tipo de armadura que lleve.
material: Un puñado de corteza de roble.

name: Barkskin
desc: The objetivo's skin recibe on the texture and appearance of bark, increasing its AC to 16 (unless its AC is already higher).
higher_level: The objetivo's AC increases by +1 for every two slot levels above 2nd.

name: Batsense
desc: For the duration of the spell, a criatura you touch can produce and interpret squeaking sounds used for echolocation, giving it vista ciega out to a range of 60 pies. The objetivo cannot use its vista ciega while ensordecido, and its vista ciega doesn't penetrate areas of mágico silence. While using vista ciega, the objetivo has desventaja on Destreza (Sigilo) checks that rely on being silent. Additionally, the objetivo has ventaja on Sabiduría (Percepción) checks that rely on hearing.
material: a bit of fur from a bat’s ear

name: Battle Chant
desc: You bless up all allied criaturas of your choice within range. Whenever a objetivo lands a successful hit before the spell ends, the objetivo can add 1 to the tirada de daño. When cast by multiple casters chanting in unison, the same increases to 2 points added to the tirada de daño.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 3rd level or higher, you can extend the range by 10 pies for each slot level above 2nd.

name: Battle Mind
desc:
You gain a preternatural sense of the surrounding area, allowing you insights you can share with comrades to provide them with an edge in combat. You gain ventaja on Sabiduría (Percepción) checks made when determining surprise at the beginning of a combat encounter. If you are not surprised, then neither are your aliados. When you are engaged in combat while the spell is active, you can use a acción adicional on your turn to produce one of the following effects (aliados must be able to see or hear you in order to benefit):
* One aliado gains ventaja on its next tirada de ataque, tirada de salvación, or ability check.
* An enemigo has desventaja on the next tirada de ataque it makes against you or an aliado.
* You divine the location of an invisible or hidden criatura and impart that knowledge to any aliados who can see or hear you. This knowledge does not negate any advantages the criatura has, it only allows your aliados to be aware of its location at the time. If the criatura moves after being detected, its new location is not imparted to your aliados.
* Three aliados who can see and hear you on your turn are given the benefit of a *bless*, *guidance*, or *resistance spell* on their turns; you choose the benefit individually for each aliado. An aliado must use the benefit on its turn, or the benefit is lost.

name: Battlecry Ballad
desc:
You fill your aliados with a thirst for glory and battle using your triumphant rallying cry. Expend and roll a Bardic Inspiration die to determine the number of rondas you can maintain Concentración on this spell (minimum 1 ronda). Each objetivo gains a bonus to attack and damage rolls equal to the number of rondas you have maintained Concentración on this spell (maximum +4).

You cannot cast another spell through your spellcasting focus while concentrating on this spell.
higher_level: You can maintain Concentración on this spell for an additional ronda for each slot level above 3rd.

name: Beacon of Hope
desc: Este conjuro otorga esperanza y vitalidad. Elige cualquier número de criaturas dentro del alcance. Durante la duración, cada objetivo tiene ventaja en las tiradas de salvación de Sabiduría y en las tiradas de salvación contra la muerte, y recupera el número máximo posible de puntos de golpe de cualquier curación que reciba.

name: Beacon of Hope
desc:
The objetivos are filled with hope and vitality.

Until the spell ends, each objetivo gains ventaja on Sabiduría tirada de salvacións and death tirada de salvacións, and when a objetivo receives healing it regains the maximum number of puntos de golpe possible.

name: Beast Within
desc: You imbue a willing criatura with a touch of lycanthropy. The objetivo gains a few bestial qualities appropriate to the type of lycanthrope you choose, such as tufts of fur, elongated claws, a fang-lined maw or tusks, and similar features. For the duration, the objetivo has resistance to contundente, perforante, and daño cortante from ataques no mágicos that aren't silvered. In addition, the objetivo has ventaja on Sabiduría (Percepción) checks that rely on hearing or smell. Finally, the criatura can use its new claws and jaw or tusks to make unarmed strikes. The claws deal daño cortante equal to 1d4 + the objetivo's Fuerza modifier on a hit. The bite causa daño perforante equal to 1d6 + the objetivo's Fuerza modifier on a hit. The objetivo's bite doesn't inflict lycanthropy.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 5th level or higher, you can objetivo one additional criatura for each espacio de conjuro above 4th.

name: Become Nightwing
desc:
This spell imbues you with wings of shadow. For the duration of the spell, you gain a volando Velocidad of 60 pies and a new attack action: Nightwing Breath.

***Nightwing Breath (Recharge 4–6).*** You exhale shadow‐substance in a 30-pie cone. cada criatura in the area recibe 5d6 daño necrótico, or half el daño with a successful tirada de salvación de Destreza.
material: a crow’s eye

name: Beguiling Bet
desc:
You issue a challenge against una criatura you can see within range, which debe realizar a successful tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or become hechizado. en una salvación fallida, you can make an ability check as a acción adicional. For example, you could make a Fuerza (Atletismo) check to climb a difficult surface or to jump as high as possible; you could make a Destreza (Acrobacias) check to perform a backflip; or you could make a Carisma (Interpretación) check to sing a high note or to extemporize a clever rhyme. You can choose to use your spellcasting ability modifier in place of the usual ability modifier for this check, and you add your competencia bonus if you're proficient in the skill being used.

The hechizado criatura must use its next action (which can be a legendary action) to make the same ability check in a contest against your check. Even if the criatura can't perform the action—it may not be close enough to a wall to climb it, or it might not have appendages suitable for strumming a lute—it must still attempt the action to the best of its capability. If you win the contest, the spell (and the contest) continues, with you making a new ability check as a acción adicional on your turn. The spell ends when it expires or when the criatura wins the contest.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 4th level or higher, you can objetivo one additional criatura for every two slot levels above 2nd. cada criatura must be within 30 pies of another criatura when you cast the spell.

name: Beguiling Gift
desc: Deep Magic: hieroglyph You implant a powerful suggestion into an item as you hand it to someone. If the person you hand it to accepts it willingly, they debe realizar a successful tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or use the object as it's meant to be used at their first opportunity: writing with a pen, consuming food or drink, wearing clothing, drawing a weapon, etc. After the first use, they're under no compulsion to continue using the object or even to keep it.
dnd_class: Wizard, Warlock, Sorceror, Druid, Cleric, Bard

name: Benediction
desc: You call down a blessing in the name of an angel of protection. A criatura you can see within range shimmers with a faint white ligera. The next time the criatura recibe damage, it rolls a d4 and reduces el daño by the result. The spell then ends.

name: Bestial Fury
desc:
You instill primal fury into a criatura you can see within range. The objetivo debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Carisma; a criatura can choose to fail this tirada de salvación. en un fallo, the objetivo must use its action to attack its nearest enemigo it can see with unarmed strikes or natural weapons. For the duration, the objetivo’s attacks deal an extra 1d6 damage of the same type dealt by its weapon, and the objetivo can’t be hechizado or asustado. If there are no enemigos within alcance, the objetivo can use its action to repeat the tirada de salvación, ending the effect en un éxito.

This spell has no effect on undead or constructs.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 3rd level or higher, you can objetivo one additional criatura for each slot level above 2nd.

name: Bestow Curse
desc:
Tocas a una criatura, que debe superar una tirada de salvación de Sabiduría o quedar maldita durante la duración del conjuro. Al lanzar este conjuro, elige la naturaleza de la maldición entre las siguientes opciones:
- Elige una característica. Mientras está maldito, el objetivo tiene desventaja en las pruebas de característica y tiradas de salvación realizadas con esa característica.
- Mientras está maldito, el objetivo tiene desventaja en las tiradas de ataque contra ti.
- Mientras está maldito, el objetivo debe realizar una tirada de salvación de Sabiduría al inicio de cada uno de sus turnos. Si falla, desperdicia su acción ese turno sin hacer nada.
- Mientras el objetivo está maldito, tus ataques y conjuros infligen 1d8 de daño necrótico adicional al objetivo. Un conjuro remove curse pone fin a este efecto. A discreción del DM, puedes elegir un efecto de maldición alternativo, pero no debería ser más poderoso que los descritos anteriormente. El DM tiene la última palabra sobre el efecto de dicha maldición.
higher_level: Si lanzas este conjuro usando un espacio de conjuro de nivel 4 o superior, la duración es concentración, hasta 10 minutos. Si usas un espacio de conjuro de nivel 5 o superior, la duración es de 8 horas. Si usas un espacio de conjuro de nivel 7 o superior, la duración es de 24 horas. Si usas un espacio de conjuro de nivel 9, el conjuro dura hasta que sea disipado. Usar un espacio de conjuro de nivel 5 o superior otorga una duración que no requiere concentración.

name: Bestow Curse
desc:
Choose one of the following:

* Select one ability score; the objetivo has desventaja on ability checks and tirada de salvacións using that ability score.
* The objetivo makes attack rolls against you with desventaja.
* Each turn, the objetivo loses its action unless it succeeds a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría at the start of its turn.
* Your attacks and spells deal an additional 1d8 daño necrótico against the objetivo.

A curse lasts until the spell ends. At the Narrator's discretion you may create a different curse effect with this spell so long as it is weaker than the options above.

A _remove curse_ spell ends the effect if the espacio de conjuro used to cast it is equal to or greater than the espacio de conjuro used to cast _bestow curse_.
higher_level: When using a 4th-level espacio de conjuro the duration increases to 10 minutos. When using a 5th-level espacio de conjuro the duration increases to 8 horas and it no longer requires your Concentración. When using a 7th-level espacio de conjuro the duration is 24 horas.

name: Betraying Bauble
desc:
When you cast this spell, you touch a pair of objects. Each object must be small enough to fit in one hand. While holding one of the objects, you can sense the direction to the other object's location.
  If the paired object is in motion, you know the direction and relative Velocidad of its movement (walking, running, galloping, or similar). When the two objects are within 30 pies of each other, they vibrate faintly unless they are touching. If you aren't holding either item and the spell hasn't ended, you can sense the direction of the closest of the two objects within 1,000 pies of you, and you can sense if it is in motion. If neither object is within 1,000 pies of you, you sense the closest object as soon as you come within 1,000 pies of one of them. If an inch or more of lead blocks a direct path between you and an affected object, you can't sense that object.

name: Binding Oath
desc:
You seal an agreement between two or more willing criaturas with an oath in the name of the god of justice, using ceremonial blessings during which both the oath and the consequences of breaking it are set: if any of the sworn break this vow, they are struck by a curse. For each individual that does so, you choose one of the options given in the [bestow curse](https://api.open5e.com/spells/bestow-curse) spell. When the oath is broken, all participants are immediately aware that this has occurred, but they know no other details.

The curse effect of binding oath can’t be dismissed by [dispel magic](https://api.open5e.com/spells/dispel-magic), but it can be removed with [dispel evil and good](https://api.open5e.com/spells/dispel-evil-and-good)[remove curse](https://api.open5e.com/remove-curse), or [wish](https://api.open5e.com/spells/wish). Remove curse functions only if the espacio de conjuro used to cast it is equal to or higher than the espacio de conjuro used to cast **binding oath**. Depending on the Naturaleza of the oath, una criatura’s breaking it may or may not invalidate the oath for the other objetivos. If the oath is completely broken, the spell ends for every affected criatura, but curse effects already bestowed remain until dispelled.

name: Biting Arrow
desc:
As part of the action used to cast this spell, you make a ataque a distancia con arma with a bow, a crossbow, or a arrojadiza weapon. The effect is limited to a range of 120 pies despite the weapon’s range, and the attack is made with desventaja if the objetivo is in the weapon’s long range.

If the weapon attack hits, it causa damage as usual. In addition, the objetivo becomes coated in thin frost until the start of your next turn. If the objetivo uses its reacción before the start of your next turn, it immediately recibe 1d6 daño de frío and the spell ends.
higher_level: The spell’s damage, for both the ataque a distancia and the daño de frío, increases by 1d6 when you alcance 5th level (+1d6 and 2d6), 11th level (+2d6 and 3d6), and 17th level (+3d6 and 4d6).
material: an arrow or a arrojadiza weapon

name: Bitter Chains
desc:
The spiked ring in your hand expands into a long, barbed chain to ensnare a criatura you touch. Make a melee ataque de conjuro against the objetivo. On a hit, the objetivo is bound in metal chains for the duration. While bound, the objetivo can move only at half Velocidad and has desventaja on attack rolls, tirada de salvacións, and Destreza checks. If it moves more than 5 pies during a turn, it recibe 3d6 daño perforante from the barbs.

The criatura can escape from the chains by using an action and making a successful Fuerza or Destreza check against your CD de salvación del conjuro, or if the chains are destroyed. The chains have AC 18 and 20 puntos de golpe.
material: a spiked metal ring

name: Black Goat’s Blessing
desc: You raise your hand with fingers splayed and utter an incantation of the Black Goat with a Thousand Young. Your magic is blessed with the eldritch virility of the All‑Mother. The objetivo has desventaja on tirada de salvacións against spells you cast until the end of your next turn.
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Paladin, Ranger, Sorcerer, Warlock, Wizard

name: Black Hand
desc: You gather the powers of darkness into your fist and fling dark, paralyzing flame at a objetivo within 30 pies. If you make a successful ranged ataque de conjuro, this spell siphons vitality from the objetivo into you. For the duration, the objetivo has desventaja (and you have ventaja) on attack rolls, ability checks, and tirada de salvacións made with Fuerza, Destreza, or Constitución. An affected objetivo makes a tirada de salvación de Constitución (with desventaja) at the end of its turn, ending the effect en un éxito.

name: Black Ribbons
desc: You pull pieces of the plane of shadow into your own reality, causing a 20-pie cube to fill with inky ribbons that turn the area into difficult terrain and wrap around nearby criaturas. Any criatura that ends its turn in the area becomes apresado by the ribbons until the end of its next turn, unless it makes a successful tirada de salvación de Destreza. Once a criatura succeeds on this tirada de salvación, it can’t be apresado again by the ribbons, but it’s still affected by the difficult terrain.
material: a piece of ribbon

name: Black Sunshine
desc:
You hold up a flawed pearl and it disappears, leaving behind a magic orb in your hand that pulses with dim purple ligera. aliados that you designate become invisible if they're within 60 pies of you and if ligera from the orb can alcance the space they occupy. An invisible criatura still casts a faint, purple shadow.

The orb can be used as a arrojadiza weapon to attack an enemigo. On a hit, the orb explodes in a flash of ligera and the spell ends. The objetivoed enemigo and cada criatura within 10 pies of it debe realizar a successful tirada de salvación de Destreza or be cegado for 1 minuto. A criatura cegado in this way repeats the tirada de salvación at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself en un éxito.
material: a discolored pearl, which the spell consumes

name: Black Swan Storm
desc: You call forth a whirlwind of black feathers that fills a 5-pie cube within range. The feathers deal 2d8 daño de fuerza to criaturas in the cube’s area and radiate darkness, causing the illumination level within 20 pies of the cube to drop by one step (from bright ligera to dim ligera, and from dim ligera to darkness). criaturas that make a successful tirada de salvación de Destreza take half el daño and are still affected by the change in ligera.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 3rd level or higher, the feathers deal an extra 1d8 daño de fuerza for each slot level above 2nd.
material: a feather from a black swan

name: Black Tentacles
desc: Tentáculos de ébano retorciéndose llenan un cuadrado de 6m de lado en el suelo que puedas ver dentro del alcance. Durante la duración, estos tentáculos convierten el suelo del área en terreno difícil. Cuando una criatura entra en el área afectada por primera vez en un turno o comienza su turno en ella, la criatura debe superar una tirada de salvación de Destreza o recibir 3d6 de daño contundente y quedar apresada por los tentáculos hasta que el conjuro termine. Una criatura que comienza su turno en el área y ya está apresada por los tentáculos recibe 3d6 de daño contundente. Una criatura apresada por los tentáculos puede usar su acción para realizar una prueba de Fuerza o Destreza (a su elección) contra la CD de salvación de tus conjuros. Si tiene éxito, se libera.
material: Un trozo de tentáculo de un pulpo gigante o un calamar gigante

name: Black Tentacles
desc:
Writhing black tentacles fill the ground within the area turning it into difficult terrain. When a criatura starts its turn in the area or enters the area for the first time on its turn, it recibe 3d6 daño contundente and is apresado by the tentacles unless it succeeds on a tirada de salvación de Destreza. A criatura that starts its turn apresado by the tentacles recibe 3d6 daño contundente.

A apresado criatura can use its action to make an Acrobacias or Atletismo check against the CD de salvación del conjuro, freeing itself en un éxito.
higher_level: el daño increases by 1d6 for every 2 slot levels above 4th.

name: Black Well
desc: You summon a seething sphere of dark energy 5 pies in diameter at a point within range. The sphere pulls criaturas toward it and devours the life fuerza of those it envelops. Every criatura other than you that starts its turn within 90 pies of the black well debe realizar a successful tirada de salvación de Fuerza or be pulled 50 pies toward the well. A criatura pulled into the well recibe 6d8 daño necrótico and is aturdido; a successful tirada de salvación de Constitución halves el daño and causes the criatura to become incapacitado. A criatura that starts its turn inside the well also makes a tirada de salvación de Constitución; the criatura is aturdido en una salvación fallida or incapacitado en un éxito. An incapacitado criatura that leaves the well recovers immediately and can take actions and reactions on that turn. A criatura recibe damage only upon entering the well—it recibe no additional damage for remaining there—but if it leaves the well and is pulled back in again, it recibe damage again. A total of nine Medium criaturas, three Large criaturas, or one Huge criatura can be inside the well’s otherdimensional space at one time. When the spell’s duration ends, todas las criaturas inside it tumble out in a heap, landing derribado.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 7th level or higher, el daño dealt by the well increases by 1d8—and the well pulls criaturas an additional 5 pies—for each slot level above 6th.

name: Blade Barrier
desc: Creas una pared vertical de cuchillas mágicas giratorias y afiladas como navajas. La pared aparece dentro del alcance y dura lo que dure el conjuro. Puedes crear una pared recta de hasta 30m de largo, 6m de alto y 1.5m de grosor, o una pared circular de hasta 18m de diámetro, 6m de alto y 1.5m de grosor. La pared proporciona tres cuartos de cobertura a las criaturas detrás de ella, y su espacio es terreno difícil. Cuando una criatura entra en el área de la pared por primera vez en un turno o comienza su turno en ella, la criatura debe realizar una tirada de salvación de Destreza. Si falla, recibe 6d10 de daño cortante. Si tiene éxito, recibe la mitad de ese daño.

name: Blade Barrier
desc:
You create a wall of cortante blades. The wall can be up to 20 pies high and 5 pies thick, and can either be a straight wall up to 100 pies long or a ringed wall of up to 60 pies in diameter. The wall provides three-quarters cover and its area is difficult terrain.

When a criatura starts its turn within the wall's area or enters the wall's area for the first time on a turn, it makes a tirada de salvación de Destreza, taking 6d10 daño cortante en una salvación fallida, or half as much en una salvación exitosa.
higher_level: el daño increases by 1d10 for each slot level above 6th.

name: Blade of Wrath
desc:
You create a sword of pure white fuego in your free hand. The blade is similar in size and shape to a longsword, and it lasts for the duration. The blade disappears if you let go of it, but you can call it forth again as a acción adicional.

You can use your action to make a melee ataque de conjuro with the blade. On a hit, the objetivo recibe 2d8 daño de fuego and 2d8 daño radiante. An aberration, fey, fiend, or undead criatura damaged by the blade debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or be asustado until the start of your next turn.

The blade sheds bright ligera in a 20-pie radius and dim ligera for an additional 20 pies.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 4th level or higher, either the daño de fuego or the daño radiante (your choice) increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 3rd.
material: a rebuke of evil, written in Celestial

name: Blade of my Brother
desc:
You touch a melee weapon that was used by an aliado who is now dead, and it leaps into the air and flies to another aliado (chosen by you) within 15 pies of you. The weapon enters that aliado’s space and moves when the aliado moves. If the weapon or the aliado is forced to move more than 5 pies from the other, the spell ends.

The weapon acts on your turn by making an attack if a objetivo presents itself. Its attack modifier equals your spellcasting level + the weapon’s inherent mágico bonus, if any; it receives only its own inherent mágico bonus to damage. The weapon fights for up to 4 rondas or until your Concentración is broken, after which the spell ends and it falls to the ground.
material: melee weapon owned by a dead aliado of the objetivo

name: Blazing Chariot
desc:
Calling upon the might of the angels, you conjure a flaming chariot made of gold and mithral in an unoccupied 10-pie‐square space you can see within range. Two horses made of fuego and ligera pull the chariot. You and up to three other Medium or smaller criaturas you designate can board the chariot (at the cost of 5 pies of movement) and are unharmed by the flames. Any other criatura that touches the chariot or hits it (or a criatura riding in it) with a ataque cuerpo a cuerpo while within 5 pies of the chariot recibe 3d6 daño de fuego and 3d6 daño radiante. The chariot has AC 18 and 50 puntos de golpe, is immune to fuego, veneno, psíquico, and daño radiante, and has resistance to all other no mágico damage. The horses are not separate criaturas but are part of the chariot. The chariot vanishes if it is reduced to 0 puntos de golpe, and any criatura riding it falls out. The chariot has a Velocidad of 50 pies and a volando Velocidad of 40 pies.

On your turn, you can guide the chariot in place of your own movement. You can use a acción adicional to direct it to take the Dash, Disengage, or Dodge action. As an action, you can use the chariot to overrun criaturas in its path. On this turn, the chariot can enter a hostile criatura’s space. The criatura recibe damage as if it had touched the chariot, is shunted to the nearest unoccupied space that it can occupy, and debe realizar a successful tirada de salvación de Fuerza or fall derribado in that space.
material: a small golden wheel worth 250 gp

name: Bleating Call
desc:
You create a sound on a point within range. The sound’s volume can range from a whisper to a scream, and it can be any sound you choose. The sound continues unabated throughout the duration, or you can make discrete sounds at different times before the spell ends.

cada criatura that starts its turn within 30 pies of the sound and can hear it debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría. en una salvación fallida, the objetivo must take the Dash or Disengage action and move toward the sound by the safest available route on each of its turns. When it arrives to the source of the sound, the objetivo must use its action to examine the sound. Once it has examined the sound, the objetivo determines the sound is illusory and can no longer hear it, ending the spell’s effects on that objetivo and preventing the objetivo from being affected by the sound again for the duration of the spell. If a objetivo recibe damage from you or a criatura friendly to you, it is no longer under the effects of this spell.

criaturas that can’t be hechizado are immune to this spell.
material: a bit of fur or hair from a young beast or humanoid

name: Bleed
desc:
Crackling energy coats the blade of one weapon you are carrying that causa daño cortante. Until the spell ends, when you hit a criatura with the weapon, the weapon causa an extra 1d4 daño necrótico and the criatura debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Constitución. en una salvación fallida, the criatura suffers a bleeding wound. Each time you hit a criatura with this weapon while it suffers from a bleeding wound, your weapon causa an extra 1 daño necrótico for each time you have previously hit the criatura with this weapon (to a maximum of 10 daño necrótico).

Any criatura can take an action to stanch the bleeding wound by succeeding on a Sabiduría (Medicina) check against your CD de salvación del conjuro. The wound also closes if the objetivo receives mágico healing. This spell has no effect on undead or constructs.
material: a drop of blood

name: Bless
desc: Bendices hasta tres criaturas de tu elección dentro del alcance. Siempre que un objetivo realice una tirada de ataque o una tirada de salvación antes de que el conjuro termine, el objetivo puede tirar un d4 y añadir el número obtenido a la tirada de ataque o a la tirada de salvación.
higher_level: Cuando lanzas este conjuro usando un espacio de conjuro de nivel 2 o superior, puedes elegir como objetivo una criatura adicional por cada nivel de espacio por encima del 1º.
material: Unas gotas de agua bendita.

name: Bless
desc: The blessing you bestow upon the objetivos makes them more durable and competent. Until the spell ends, a d4 is added to attack rolls and tirada de salvacións made by a objetivo.
higher_level: You objetivo one additional criatura for each slot level above 1st.

name: Bless the Dead
desc: You grant a blessing to one deceased criatura, enabling it to cross over to the realm of the dead in peace. A criatura that benefits from **bless the dead** can’t become undead. The spell has no effect on living criaturas or the undead.

name: Blessed Halo
desc:
A nimbus of golden ligera surrounds your head for the duration. The halo sheds bright ligera in a 20-pie radius and dim ligera for an additional 20 pies.

This spell grants you a pool of 10 points of healing. When you cast the spell and as an action on subsequent turns during the spell’s duration, you can expend points from this pool to restore an equal number of puntos de golpe to una criatura within 20 pies that you can see.

Additionally, you have ventaja on Carisma checks made against good criaturas within 20 pies.

If any of the ligera created by this spell overlaps an area of mágico darkness created by a spell of 2nd level or lower, the spell that created the darkness is dispelled.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 3rd level or higher, the spell’s pool of healing points increases by 5 for each espacio de conjuro above 2nd, and the spell dispels mágico darkness created by a spell of a level equal to the slot used to cast this spell.

name: Blight
desc: Una energía necromántica se abate sobre una criatura de tu elección que puedas ver dentro del alcance, drenando su humedad y vitalidad. El objetivo debe realizar una tirada de salvación de Constitución. Si falla, recibe 8d8 de daño necrótico; si tiene éxito, recibe la mitad. El conjuro no tiene efecto sobre los no-muertos ni los constructos. Si el objetivo es una criatura vegetal o una planta mágica, realiza la tirada de salvación con desventaja y el conjuro le inflige el daño máximo. Si el objetivo es una planta no mágica que no es una criatura, como un árbol o un arbusto, no realiza ninguna tirada de salvación; simplemente se marchita y muere.
higher_level: Cuando lanzas este conjuro usando un espacio de conjuro de nivel 5 o superior, el daño aumenta en 1d8 por cada nivel de espacio por encima del 4º.

name: Blight
desc:
necrótico energies drain moisture and vitality from the objetivo, dealing 8d8 daño necrótico. Undead and constructs are immune to this spell.

A plant criatura or mágico plant has desventaja on its tirada de salvación and recibe the maximum damage possible from this spell. A no mágico plant that isn't a criatura receives no tirada de salvación and instead withers until dead.
higher_level: el daño increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 4th.

name: Blindness/Deafness
desc: Puedes cegar o ensordecer a un enemigo. Elige una criatura que puedas ver dentro del alcance para que realice una tirada de salvación de Constitución. Si falla, el objetivo queda cegado o ensordecido (a tu elección) durante la duración del conjuro. Al final de cada uno de sus turnos, el objetivo puede realizar una tirada de salvación de Constitución. Si tiene éxito, el conjuro termina.
higher_level: Cuando lanzas este conjuro usando un espacio de conjuro de nivel 3 o superior, puedes afectar a una criatura adicional por cada nivel de espacio por encima del 2º.

name: Blindness/Deafness
desc: Until the spell ends, the objetivo is cegado or ensordecido (your choice). At the end of each of its turns the objetivo can repeat its tirada de salvación, ending the spell en un éxito.
higher_level: You objetivo one additional criatura for each slot level above 2nd.

name: Blink
desc: Tira un d20 al final de cada uno de tus turnos mientras dure el conjuro. Con un resultado de 11 o más, desapareces de tu plano de existencia actual y apareces en el Plano Etéreo (el conjuro falla y el lanzamiento se desperdicia si ya estabas en ese plano). Al inicio de tu siguiente turno, y cuando el conjuro termina si te encuentras en el Plano Etéreo, regresas a un espacio desocupado de tu elección que puedas ver dentro de 3m del espacio desde el que desapareciste. Si no hay ningún espacio desocupado disponible en ese radio, apareces en el espacio desocupado más cercano (elegido al azar si hay más de uno a igual distancia). Puedes disipar este conjuro como una acción. Mientras estás en el Plano Etéreo, puedes ver y oír el plano del que procedes, que aparece en tonos de gris, y no puedes ver nada en él a más de 18m de distancia. Solo puedes afectar y ser afectado por otras criaturas del Plano Etéreo. Las criaturas que no estén allí no pueden perciberte ni interactuar contigo, a menos que tengan la capacidad de hacerlo.

name: Blink
desc:
Until the spell ends, roll 1d20 at the end of each of your turns. When you roll an 11 or higher you disappear and reappear in the Ethereal Plane (if you are already on the Ethereal Plane, the spell fails and the espacio de conjuro is wasted). At the start of your next turn you return to an unoccupied space that you can see within 10 pies of where you disappeared from. If no unoccupied space is available within range, you reappear in the nearest unoccupied space (determined randomly when there are multiple nearest choices). As an action, you can dismiss this spell.

While on the Ethereal Plane, you can see and hear into the plane you were originally on out to a range of 60 pies, but everything is obscured by mist and in shades of gray. You can only objetivo and be objetivoed by other criaturas on the Ethereal Plane.

criaturas on your original plane cannot perceive or interact with you, unless they are able to interact with the Ethereal Plane.

name: Blizzard
desc: A howling storm of thick snow and ice crystals appears in a cylinder 40 pies high and 40 pies in diameter within range. The area is heavily obscured by the swirling snow. When the storm appears, cada criatura in the area recibe 8d8 daño de frío, or half as much damage with a successful tirada de salvación de Constitución. A criatura also makes this tirada de salvación and recibe damage when it enters the area for the first time on a turn or ends its turn there. In addition, a criatura that recibe daño de frío from this spell has desventaja on Constitución tirada de salvacións to maintain Concentración until the start of its next turn.

name: Blood Armor
desc:
When you strike a foe with a ataque cuerpo a cuerpo con arma, you can immediately cast **blood armor** as a acción adicional. The foe you struck must contain blood; if the objetivo doesn’t bleed, the spell ends without effect. The blood flowing from your foe magically increases in volume and forms a suit of armor around you, granting you an Clase de Armadura of 18 + your Destreza modifier for the spell’s duration. This armor has no Fuerza requirement, doesn’t hinder spellcasting, and doesn’t incur desventaja on Destreza (Sigilo) checks.

If the criatura you struck was a Celestial, **blood armor** also grants you ventaja on Carisma tirada de salvacións for the duration of the spell.
material: you must have just struck a foe with a melee weapon

name: Blood Lure
desc:
You point at any location (a jar, a bowl, even a puddle) within range that contains at least a pint of blood. cada criatura that feeds on blood and is within 60 pies of that location debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Carisma. (This includes undead, such as vampires.) A criatura that has Keen Smell or any similar scent-boosting ability has desventaja on the tirada de salvación, while undead have ventaja on the tirada de salvación. en una salvación fallida, the criatura is attracted to the blood and must move toward it unless impeded.

Once an affected criatura reaches the blood, it tries to consume it, foregoing all other actions while the blood is present. A successful attack against an affected criatura ends the effect, as does the consumption of the blood, which requires an action by an affected criatura.
material: a container or pool of blood

name: Blood Offering
desc: You touch the corpse of a criatura that isn’t undead or a construct and consume its life fuerza. You must have dealt damage to the criatura before it died, and it must have been dead for no more than 1 hora. You regain a number of puntos de golpe equal to 1d4 × the criatura's challenge rating (minimum of 1d4). The criatura can be restored to life only by means of a [true resurrection](https://api.open5e.com/spells/true-resurrection) or a [wish](https://api.open5e.com/spells/wish) spell.

name: Blood Puppet
desc: With a sample of its blood, you are able to magically control a criatura’s actions, like a marionette on mágico strings. Choose a criatura you can see within range whose blood you hold. The objetivo debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Constitución, or you gain control over its physical activity (as long as you interact with the blood material component each ronda). As a acción adicional on your turn, you can direct the criatura to perform various activities. You can specify a simple and general course of action, such as, “Attack that criatura,” “Run over there,” or, “Fetch that object.” If the criatura completes the order and doesn’t receive further direction from you, it defends and preserves itself to the best of its ability. The objetivo is aware of being controlled. At the end of each of its turns, the objetivo can make another tirada de salvación de Constitución. en un éxito, the spell ends.
material: a drop of blood from the objetivo

name: Blood Scarab
desc: Your blood is absorbed into the beetle’s exoskeleton to form a beautiful, rubylike scarab that flies toward a criatura of your choice within range. The objetivo debe realizar a successful tirada de salvación de Constitución or take 1d6 daño necrótico. You gain temporary puntos de golpe equal to the daño necrótico dealt.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 2nd level or higher, the number of scarabs increases by one for each slot level above 1st. You can direct the scarabs at the same objetivo or at different objetivos. Each objetivo makes a single tirada de salvación, regardless of the number of scarabs objetivoing it.
material: a drop of the caster’s blood, and the exoskeleton of a scarab beetle

name: Blood Spoor
desc:
By touching a drop of your quarry’s blood (spilled or drawn within the past hora), you can follow the criatura’s trail unerringly across any surface or under water, no matter how fast you are moving. If your quarry recibe flight, you can follow its trail along the ground—or through the air, if you have the means to fly.

If your quarry moves magically (such as by way of a [dimension door](https://api.open5e.com/spells/dimension-door) or a [teleport](https://api.open5e.com/spells/teleport) spell), you sense its trail as a straight path leading from where the mágico movement started to where it ended. Such a route might lead through lethal or impassable barriers. This spell even reveals the route of a criatura using [pass without trace](https://api.open5e.com/spells/pass-without-trace), but it fails to locate a criatura protected by [nondetection](https://api.open5e.com/spells/nondetection) or by other effects that prevent [scrying](https://api.open5e.com/spells/scrying) spells or cause [divination](https://api.open5e.com/spells/divination) spells to fail. If your quarry moves to another plane, its trail ends without trace, but **blood spoor** picks up the trail again if the caster moves to the same plane as the quarry before the spell’s duration expires.
material: a drop of the quarry’s blood

name: Blood Strike
desc: By performing this ritual, you can cast a spell on one nearby criatura and have it affect a different, more distant criatura. Both objetivos must be related by blood (no more distantly than first cousins). Neither of them needs to be a willing objetivo. The blood strike ritual is completed first, taking 10 minutos to cast on yourself. Then the spell to be transferred is immediately cast by you on the initial objetivo, which must be close enough to touch no matter what the spell's normal range is. The secondary objetivo must be within 1 milla and on the same plane of existence as you. If the second spell allows a tirada de salvación, it's made by the secondary objetivo, not the initial objetivo. If the tirada de salvación succeeds, any portion of the spell that's avoided or negated by the secondary objetivo affects the initial objetivo instead. A criatura can be the secondary objetivo of blood strike only once every 24 horas; subsequent attempts during that time take full effect against the initial objetivo with no chance to affect the secondary objetivo. Only spells that have a single objetivo can be transferred via blood stike. For example, a lesser restoration) currently affecting the initial criatura and transfer it to the secondary criatura, which then makes any applicable tirada de salvación against the effect. If the tirada de salvación fails or there is no tirada de salvación, the affliction transfers completely and no longer affects the initial objetivo. If the tirada de salvación succeeds, the initial criatura is still afflicted and also suffers anew any damage or conditions associated with first exposure to the affliction.

name: Blood Tide
desc:
When you cast this spell, a criatura you designate within range debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Constitución or bleed from its nose, eyes, ears, and mouth. This bleeding causa no damage but imposes a –2 penalty on the criatura’s Inteligencia, Carisma, and Sabiduría checks. **Blood tide** has no effect on undead or constructs.

A bleeding criatura might attract the attention of criaturas such as stirges, sharks, or Gigante mosquitoes, depending on the circumstances.

A [cure wounds](https://api.open5e.com/spells/cure-wounds) spell stops the bleeding before the duration of blood tide expires, as does a successful CD 10 Sabiduría (Medicina) check.
higher_level: The spell’s duration increases to 2 minutos when you alcance 5th level, to 10 minutos when you alcance 11th level, and to 1 hora when you alcance 17th level.

name: Blood and Steel
desc:
When you cast this spell, you cut your hand and take 1d4 daño cortante that can’t be healed until you take a descanso largo. You then touch a construct; it debe realizar a successful tirada de salvación de Constitución or be hechizado by you for the duration. If you or your aliados are fighting the construct, it has ventaja on the tirada de salvación. Even constructs that are immune to charm effects can be affected by this spell.

While the construct is hechizado, you have a telepathic link with it as long as the two of you are on the same plane of existence. You can use this telepathic link to issue commands to the criatura while you are conscious (no action required), which it does its best to obey. You can specify a simple and general course of action, such as, “Attack the ghouls,” “Block the bridge,” or, “Fetch that bucket.” If the construct completes the order and doesn’t receive further direction from you, it defends itself.

You can use your action to take total and precise control of the objetivo. Until the end of your next turn, the construct recibe only the actions you specify and does nothing you haven’t ordered it to do. During this time, you can also cause the construct to use a reacción, but doing this requires you to use your own reacción as well.

Each time the construct recibe damage, it makes a new tirada de salvación de Constitución against the spell. If the tirada de salvación succeeds, the spell ends.

If the construct is already under your control when the spell is cast, it gains an Inteligencia of 10 (unless its own Inteligencia is higher, in which case it retains the higher score) for 4 horas. The construct is capable of acting independently, though it remains loyal to you for the spell’s duration. You can also grant the objetivo a bonus equal to your Inteligencia modifier on one skill in which you have competencia.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a 5th‑level espacio de conjuro, the duration is Concentración, up to 10 minutos. When you use a 6th-level espacio de conjuro, the duration is Concentración, up to 1 hora. When you use a espacio de conjuro of 7th level or higher, the duration is Concentración, up to 8 horas.

name: Blood to Acid
desc:
When you cast this spell, you designate a criatura within range and convert its blood into virulent ácido. The objetivo debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Constitución. en una salvación fallida, it recibe 10d12 daño de ácido and is aturdido by the pain for 1d4 rondas. en una salvación exitosa, it recibe half el daño and isn’t aturdido.

criaturas without blood, such as constructs and plants, are not affected by this spell. If **blood to ácido** is cast on a criatura composed mainly of blood, such as a [blood elemental](https://api.open5e.com/monsters/blood-elemental) or a [blood zombie](https://api.open5e.com/monsters/blood-zombie), the criatura is slain by the spell if its tirada de salvación fails.

name: Blood-Writ Bargain
desc:
This spell creates a pact which is enforced by Celestial or fiendish forces. You and another willing criatura commit to a mutual agreement, clearly declaring your parts of the agreement during the casting.

Until the spell ends, if for any reason either participant breaks the agreement or fails to uphold their part of the bargain, beings of Celestial or fiendish origin appear within unoccupied spaces as close as possible to the participant who broke the bargain. The beings are hostile to the deal-breaking participant and attempt to kill them, as well as any criaturas that defend them. When the dealbreaking participant is killed, or the spell's duration ends, the beings disappear in a flash of smoke.

The spellcaster chooses whether the beings are Celestial or fiendish while casting the spell, and the Narrator chooses the exact criaturas summoned (such as a couatl or 5 imps). There may be any number of beings, but their combined Challenge Rating can't exceed 5.
higher_level: The combined Challenge Rating of summoned beings increases by 2 and the duration increases by 13 days for each slot level above 3rd.

name: Bloodhound
desc: You touch a willing criatura to grant it an enhanced sense of smell. For the duration, that criatura has ventaja on Sabiduría (Percepción) checks that rely on smell and Sabiduría (Supervivencia) checks to follow tracks.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a 3rd-level espacio de conjuro, you also grant the objetivo vista ciega out to a range of 30 pies for the duration.
material: a drop of ammonia

name: Bloodlust
desc: You imbue a willing criatura that you can see within range with vitality and fury. The objetivo gains 1d6 temporary puntos de golpe, has ventaja on Fuerza checks, and causa an extra 1d6 damage when it hits with a weapon attack. When the spell ends, the objetivo suffers one level of agotamiento for 1 minuto.

name: Bloodshot
desc: You launch a jet of boiling blood from your eyes at a criatura within range. You take 1d6 daño necrótico and make a ranged ataque de conjuro against the objetivo. If the attack hits, the objetivo recibe 2d10 daño de fuego plus 2d8 daño psíquico.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 3rd level or higher, the daño de fuego increases by 1d10 for each slot level above 2nd.

name: Bloody Hands
desc:
You cause the hands (or other appropriate body parts, such as claws or tentacles) of a criatura within range to bleed profusely. The objetivo debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Constitución or take 1 daño necrótico each ronda and suffer desventaja on all melee and ataque a distancia rolls that require the use of its hands for the spell’s duration.

Casting any spell that has somatic or material components while under the influence of this spell requires a CD 10 tirada de salvación de Constitución. en una salvación fallida, the spell is not cast but it is not lost; the casting can be attempted again in the next ronda.

name: Bloody Smite
desc: The next time during the spell’s duration that you hit a criatura with a ataque cuerpo a cuerpo con arma, your weapon pulses with a dull red ligera, and the attack causa an extra 1d6 daño necrótico to the objetivo. Until the spell ends, the objetivo debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Constitución at the start of each of its turns. en una salvación fallida, it recibe 1d6 daño necrótico, it bleeds profusely from the mouth, and it can’t speak intelligibly or cast spells that have a verbal component. en una salvación exitosa, the spell ends. If the objetivo or an aliado within 5 pies of it uses an action to tend the wound and makes a successful Sabiduría (Medicina) check against your CD de salvación del conjuro, or if the objetivo receives mágico healing, the spell ends.

name: Bloom
desc:
You plant a silver acorn in solid ground and spend an hora chanting a litany of praises to the natural world, after which the land within 1 milla of the acorn becomes extremely fertile, regardless of its previous state. Any seeds planted in the area grow at twice the natural rate. Food harvested regrows within a week. After one year, the land slowly reverts to its normal fertility, unable to stave off the march of Naturaleza.

Choose one of the following effects, which appears and grows immediately:
* A field planted with vegetables of your choice, ready for harvest.
* A thick forest of stout trees and ample undergrowth.
* A grassland with wildflowers and fodder for grazing.
* An orchard of fruit trees of your choice, growing in orderly rows and ready for harvest.
Living criaturas that take a descanso corto within the area of a bloom spell receive the maximum puntos de golpe for Hit Dice expended. **Bloom** counters the effects of a [desolation](https://api.open5e.com/spells/desolation) spell.

***Ritual Focus.*** If you expend your ritual focus, the duration becomes permanent.
material: a silver acorn worth 500 gp, which is consumed in the casting

name: Blunted Edge
desc: Choose a criatura that you can see within range. The objetivo debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or have desventaja on weapon attack rolls. In addition, when an affected criatura rolls damage dice for a successful attack, it must roll the weapon's damage dice twice and use the lower total. At the end of each of its turns, the objetivo can make another tirada de salvación de Sabiduría. en un éxito, the spell ends on the objetivo.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 4th level or higher, you can objetivo one additional criatura for each slot level above 3rd. The criaturas must be within 30 pies of each other when you objetivo them.

name: Blur
desc: Tu cuerpo se vuelve borroso, cambiando y oscilando ante todos los que pueden verte. Durante la duración, cualquier criatura tiene desventaja en las tiradas de ataque contra ti. Un atacante es inmune a este efecto si no depende de la vista, como ocurre con la visión ciega, o si puede ver a través de las ilusiones, como ocurre con la verdadera visión.

name: Blur
desc: Until the spell ends, you are shrouded in distortion and your image is blurred. criaturas make attack rolls against you with desventaja unless they have senses that allow them to perceive without sight or to see through illusions (like vista ciega or vista verdadera).
higher_level: You may objetivo an additional willing criatura you can see within range for each slot level above 2nd. Whenever an affected criatura other than you is hit by an attack, the spell ends for that criatura. When using a higher level espacio de conjuro, increase the spell's range to 30 pies.

name: Boiling Blood
desc: You cause the blood within a criatura’s body to boil with supernatural heat. Choose una criatura that you can see within range that isn’t a construct or an undead. The objetivo debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Constitución. en una salvación exitosa, it recibe 2d6 daño de fuego and the spell ends. en una salvación fallida, the criatura recibe 4d6 daño de fuego and is cegado. At the end of each of its turns, the objetivo can make another tirada de salvación de Constitución. en un éxito, the spell ends. en un fallo, the criatura recibe an additional 2d6 daño de fuego and remains cegado.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 5th level or higher, you can objetivo one additional criatura for each slot level above 4th. The criaturas must be within 30 pies of each other when you objetivo them.
material: a vial of blood

name: Boiling Oil
desc: You conjure a shallow, 15-pie-radius pool of boiling oil centered on a point within range. The pool is difficult terrain, and any criatura that enters the pool or starts its turn there debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Destreza. en una salvación fallida, the criatura recibe 3d8 daño de fuego and falls derribado. en una salvación exitosa, a criatura recibe half as much damage and doesn’t fall derribado.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 3rd level or higher, el daño increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 2nd.
material: a vial of oil

name: Bolster Fortifications
desc:
You create a ward that bolsters a structure or a collection of structures that occupy up to 2,500 square pies of floor space. The bolstered structures can be up to 20 pies tall and shaped as you desire. You can ward several small buildings in a stronghold by dividing the area among them, as long as you can walk into each contiguous area while you are casting the spell. For the purpose of this spell, “structures” include walls, such as the palisade that might surround a small fort, provided the wall is no more than 20 pies tall.
  For the duration, each structure you bolstered has a damage threshold of 5. If a structure already has a damage threshold, that threshold increases by 5.
  This spell protects only the walls, support beams, roofs, and similar that make up the core components of the structure. It doesn't bolster objects within the structures, such as furniture.
  The protected structure or structures radiate magic. A *dispel magic* cast on a structure removes the bolstering from only that structure. You can create a permanently bolstered structure or collection of structures by casting this spell there every day for one year.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 4th level or higher, the square pies of floor space you can bolster increases by 500 and el daño threshold increases by 2 for each slot level above 3rd.

name: Bolster Undead
desc:
You suffuse an area with negative energy to increase the difficulty of harming or affecting undead criaturas.

Choose up to three undead criaturas within range. When a objetivoed criatura makes a tirada de salvación against being turned or against spells or effects that deal daño radiante, the objetivo has ventaja on the tirada de salvación.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 2nd level or higher, you can affect one additional undead criatura for each slot level above 1st.
material: a sprinkle of unholy water

name: Bombardment of Stings
desc: cada criatura in a 30-pie cone debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Destreza. en una salvación fallida, a criatura recibe 4d6 daño perforante and is envenenado for 1 minuto. en una salvación exitosa, a criatura recibe half as much damage and isn't envenenado. At the end of each of its turns, a envenenado objetivo can make a tirada de salvación de Constitución. en un éxito, the condition ends on the objetivo.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 3rd level or higher, el daño increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 2nd.

name: Booster Shot
desc:
You imbue a a dos manos ranged weapon (typically a shortbow, longbow, ligera crossbow, or pesada crossbow) that you touch with a random mágico benefit. While the spell lasts, a projectile fired from the weapon has an effect that occurs on a hit in addition to its normal damage. Roll a d6 to determine the additional effect for each casting of this spell.

| D6 | EFFECT |
|---|---|
| 1 | 2d10 daño de ácido to todas las criaturas within 10 pies of the objetivo |
| 2 | 2d10 daño de rayo to the objetivo and 1d10 daño de rayo to todas las criaturas in a 5-pie-wide line between the weapon and the objetivo |
| 3 | 2d10 daño necrótico to the objetivo, and the objetivo has desventaja on its first tirada de ataque before the start of the weapon user’s next turn |
| 4 | 2d10 daño de frío to the objetivo and 1d10 daño de frío to all other criaturas in a 60-pie cone in front of the weapon |
| 5 | 2d10 daño de fuerza to the objetivo, and the objetivo is pushed 20 pies |
| 6 | 2d10 daño psíquico to the objetivo, and the objetivo is aturdido until the start of the weapon user’s next turn |
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 4th level or higher, all damage increases by 1d10 for each slot level above 3rd.

name: Boreas’s Breath
desc:
You freeze standing water in a 20-pie cube or running water in a 10-pie cube centered on you. The water turns to solid ice. The surface becomes difficult terrain, and any criatura that ends its turn on the ice debe realizar a successful CD 10 tirada de salvación de Destreza or fall derribado.

criaturas that are partially submerged in the water when it freezes become apresado. While apresado in this way, a criatura recibe 1d6 daño de frío at the end of its turn. It can break free by using an action to make a successful Fuerza check against your CD de salvación del conjuro.

criaturas that are fully submerged in the water when it freezes become incapacitado and cannot breathe. While incapacitado in this way, a criatura recibe 2d6 daño de frío at the end of its turn. A trapped criatura makes a CD 20 tirada de salvación de Fuerza after taking this damage at the end of its turn, breaking free from the ice en un éxito.

The ice has AC 10 and 15 puntos de golpe. It is vulnerable to daño de fuego, has resistance to no mágico cortante and daño perforante, and is immune to frío, necrótico, veneno, psíquico, and daño de trueno.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 3rd level or higher, the size of the cube increases by 10 pies for each slot level above 2nd.

name: Borrowing
desc: By touching a objetivo, you gain one sense, movement type and Velocidad, feat, language, immunity, or extraordinary ability of the objetivo for the duration of the spell. The objetivo also retains the use of the borrowed ability. An unwilling objetivo prevents the effect with a successful tirada de salvación de Constitución. The objetivo can be a living criatura or one that's been dead no longer than 1 minuto; a corpse makes no tirada de salvación. You can possess only one borrowed power at a time.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 5th level, its duration increases to 1 hora. Additionally, the objetivo loses the stolen power for the duration of the spell.

name: Bottled Arcana
desc:
By touching an empty, stoppered glass container such as a vial or flask, you magically enable it to hold a single spell. To be captured, the spell must be cast within 1 ronda of casting **bottled Arcanos** and it must be intentionally cast into the container. The container can hold one spell of 3rd level or lower. The spell can be held in the container for as much as 24 horas, after which the container reverts to a mundane vessel and any magic inside it dissipates harmlessly.

As an action, any criatura can unstop the container, thereby releasing the spell. If the spell has a range of self, the criatura opening the container is affected; otherwise, the criatura opening the container designates the objetivo according to the captured spell’s description. If a criatura opens the container unwittingly (not knowing that the container holds a spell), the spell objetivos the criatura opening the container or is centered on its space instead (whichever is more appropriate). [Dispel magic](https://api.open5e.com/spells/dispel-magic) cast on the container objetivos **bottled Arcanos**, not the spell inside. If **bottled Arcanos** is dispelled, the container becomes mundane and the spell inside dissipates harmlessly.

Until the spell in the container is released, its caster can’t regain the espacio de conjuro used to cast that spell. Once the spell is released, its caster regains the use of that slot normally.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 6th level or higher, the level of the spell the container can hold increases by one for every slot level above 5th.
material: an empty glass container

name: Bottomless Stomach
desc:
When you cast this spell, you gain the ability to consume dangerous substances and contain them in an extradimensional reservoir in your stomach. The spell allows you to swallow most liquids, such as acids, alcohol, veneno, and even quicksilver, and hold them safely in your stomach. You are unaffected by swallowing the substance, but the spell doesn’t give you resistance or immunity to the substance in general; for example, you could safely drink a bucket of a black dragon’s acidic spittle, but you’d still be burned if you were caught in the dragon’s breath attack or if that bucket of ácido were dumped over your head.

The spell allows you to store up to 10 gallons of liquid at one time. The liquid doesn’t need to all be of the same type, and different types don’t mix while in your stomach. Any liquid in excess of 10 gallons has its normal effect when you try to swallow it.

At any time before you stop concentrating on the spell, you can regurgitate up to 1 gallon of liquid stored in your stomach as a acción adicional. The liquid is vomited into an adjacent 5-pie square. A objetivo in that square debe tener éxito en a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Destreza or be affected by the liquid. The GM determines the exact effect based on the type of liquid regurgitated, using 1d6 damage of the appropriate type as the baseline.
