When you stop concentrating on the spell, its duration expires, or it’s dispelled, the extradimensional reservoir and the liquid it contains cease to exist.

name: Bound Haze
desc:
You cause a swirling gyre of dust, small rocks, and wind to encircle a criatura you can see within range. The objetivo debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Destreza or have desventaja on attack rolls and on Sabiduría (Percepción) checks. At the end of each of its turns, the objetivo can make a tirada de salvación de Destreza. en un éxito, the spell ends.
  In addition, if the objetivo is within a cloud or gas, such as the area of a *fog cloud* spell or a dretch's Fetid Cloud, the affected objetivo has desventaja on this spell's tirada de salvacións and on any tirada de salvacións associated with being in the cloud or gas, such as the tirada de salvación to reduce the daño de veneno the objetivo might take from starting its turn in the area of a *cloudkill* spell.
higher_level: If you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 4th level or higher, the duration is 1 minuto, and the spell doesn't require Concentración.

name: Branding Smite
desc: La próxima vez que impactes a una criatura con un ataque con arma antes de que este conjuro termine, el arma resplandece con una luz astral en el momento del golpe. El ataque inflige 2d6 de daño radiante adicional al objetivo, que se vuelve visible si estaba invisible, y el objetivo emite luz tenue en un radio de 1,5m y no puede volverse invisible hasta que el conjuro termine.
higher_level: Cuando lanzas este conjuro usando un espacio de conjuro de nivel 3 o superior, el daño adicional aumenta en 1d6 por cada nivel de espacio por encima del 2º.

name: Breathtaking Wind
desc: You objetivo a criatura with a blast of wintry air. That criatura debe realizar a successful tirada de salvación de Constitución or become unable to speak or cast spells with a vocal component for the duration of the spell.

name: Breeze Compass
desc: When you cast **breeze compass**, you must clearly imagine or mentally describe a location. It doesn’t need to be a location you’ve been to as long as you know it exists on the Material Plane. Within moments, a gentle breeze arises and blows along the most efficient path toward that destination. Only you can sense this breeze, and whenever it brings you to a decision point (a fork in a passageway, for example), you debe realizar a successful CD 8 Inteligencia (Arcanos) check to deduce which way the breeze indicates you should go. On a failed check, the spell ends. The breeze guides you around cliffs, lava pools, and other natural obstacles, but it doesn’t avoid enemigos or hostile criaturas.
material: a magnetized needle

name: Brimstone Infusion
desc: You infuse an ordinary flask of alchemist's fuego with mágico brimstone. While so enchanted, the alchemist's fuego can be arrojadiza 40 pies instead of 20, and it does 2d6 daño de fuego instead of 1d4. The tirada de salvación de Destreza to extinguish the flames uses your CD de salvación del conjuro instead of CD 10. Infused alchemist's fuego returns to its normal properties after 24 horas.
material: a flask of alchemist's fuego and 5 gp worth of brimstone

name: Brittling
desc: This spell uses biting frío to make a metal or stone object you touch become brittle and more easily shattered. The object’s puntos de golpe are reduced by a number equal to your level as a spellcaster, and Fuerza checks to shatter or break the object are made with ventaja if they occur within 1 minuto of the spell’s casting. If the object isn’t shattered during this time, it reverts to the state it was in before the spell was cast.
material: an icicle

name: Broken Charge
desc: When an enemigo that you can see moves to within 5 pies of you, you utter a perplexing word that alters the foe’s course. The enemigo debe realizar a successful tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or take 2d4 daño psíquico and use the remainder of its Velocidad to move in a direction of your choosing.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 2nd level or higher, the objetivo recibe an additional 2d4 daño psíquico for each slot level above 1st.
casting_time: 1 reaction, which you take when an enemy approaches to within 5 feet of you

name: Burning Hands
desc: Al juntar los pulgares y extender los dedos, una fina cortina de llamas surge disparada desde las yemas de tus dedos extendidos. Cada criatura en un cono de 4,5m debe realizar una tirada de salvación de Destreza. Una criatura recibe 3d6 de daño de fuego si falla la tirada, o la mitad de ese daño si tiene éxito. El fuego prende cualquier objeto inflamable en el área que no esté siendo llevado o transportado.
higher_level: Cuando lanzas este conjuro usando un espacio de conjuro de nivel 2 o superior, el daño aumenta en 1d6 por cada nivel de espacio por encima del 1º.

name: Burning Hands
desc: A thin sheet of flames shoots forth from your outstretched hands. cada criatura in the area recibe 3d6 daño de fuego. The fuego ignites any flammable unattended objects in the area.
higher_level: el daño increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 1st.

name: Burst Stone
desc: You cause the ground at a point you can see within range to explode. The ground must be sand, earth, or unworked rock. cada criatura within 10 pies of that point debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Destreza. en una salvación fallida, the criatura recibe 4d8 daño contundente and is knocked derribado. en una salvación exitosa, the criatura recibe half as much damage and isn't knocked derribado. The area then becomes difficult terrain with a 5-pie-deep pit centered on the point you chose.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 4th level or higher, el daño increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 3rd.

name: Butterfly Effect
desc:
You cause a cloud of illusory butterflies to swarm around a objetivo you can see within range. The objetivo debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Carisma or be hechizado for the duration. While hechizado, the objetivo can't take reactions and must roll a d10 at the start of each of its turns to determine its behavior for that turn.

| d10  | Behavior          |
|------|-------------------|
| 1    | The criatura uses all its movement to move in a random direction. To determine the direction, roll a d8 and assign a direction to each die face. The criatura doesn't take an action this turn. |
| 2-6  | The criatura doesn't take an action this turn. |
| 7-8  | The criatura uses its action to make a ataque cuerpo a cuerpo against a randomly determined criatura within its alcance. If there is no criatura within its alcance, the criatura does nothing this turn. |
| 9-10 | The criatura can act and move normally. |

At the end of each of its turns, and each time it recibe damage, the objetivo can make another tirada de salvación de Carisma. en un éxito, the spell ends on the objetivo.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 3rd level or higher, you can objetivo one additional criatura for each slot level above 2nd. The criaturas must be within 30 pies of each other when you objetivo them.

name: By the Light of the Moon
desc: The area within 30 pies of you becomes bathed in mágico moonlight. In addition to providing dim ligera, it highlights objects and locations that are hidden or that hold a useful clue. Until the spell ends, all Sabiduría (Percepción) and Inteligencia (Investigación) checks made in the area are made with ventaja.

name: By the Light of the Watchful Moon
desc:
Regardless of the time of day or your location, you command the watchful gaze of the moon to illuminate threats to you and your aliados. Shafts of bright moonlight, each 5 pies wide, shine down from the sky (or from the ceiling if you are indoors), illuminating all spaces within range that contain threats, whether they are enemigos, traps, or hidden hazards. An enemigo criatura that makes a successful tirada de salvación de Carisma resists the effect and is not picked out by the moon’s glow.

The glow does not make invisible criaturas visible, but it does indicate an invisible criatura’s general location (somewhere within the 5-pie beam). The ligera continues to illuminate any objetivo that moves, but a objetivo that moves out of the spell’s area is no longer illuminated. A threat that enters the area after the spell is cast is not subject to the spell’s effect.
dnd_class: Cleric, Druid, Paladin, Ranger, Sorcerer, Wizard

name: Calculate
desc:
You instantly know the answer to any mathematical equation that you speak aloud. The equation must be a problem that a criatura with Inteligencia 20 could solve using no mágico tools with 1 hora of calculation. Additionally, you gain an expertise die on Engineering checks made during the duration of the spell.

Note: Using the _calculate_ truco allows a player to make use of a calculator at the table in order to rapidly answer mathematical equations.

name: Calculated Retribution
desc: You surround yourself with a dampening mágico field and collect the energy of a foe's attack to use against them. When you take damage from a weapon attack, you can end the spell to halve the attack's damage against you, gaining a retribution charge that lasts until the end of your next turn. By expending the retribution charge when you hit with a ataque cuerpo a cuerpo, you deal an additional 2d10 daño de fuerza.
higher_level:
You may use your reacción to halve el daño of an attack against you up to a number of times equal to the level of the espacio de conjuro used, gaining a retribution charge each time that lasts until 1 ronda after the spell ends.

You must still make Constitución tirada de salvacións to maintain your Concentración on this spell, but you do so with ventaja, or if you already have ventaja, you automatically succeed.

name: Call Lightning
desc: Una nube de tormenta aparece en forma de cilindro de 3 metros de altura y 18 metros de radio, centrada en un punto que puedes ver directamente sobre ti a 30 metros de altura. El conjuro falla si no puedes ver un punto en el aire donde la nube de tormenta pueda aparecer (por ejemplo, si estás en una habitación que no puede albergar la nube). Cuando lanzas el conjuro, elige un punto que puedas ver dentro del alcance. Un rayo de electricidad cae de la nube hacia ese punto. Cada criatura que se encuentre a 1.5 metros de ese punto debe realizar una tirada de salvación de Destreza. Una criatura sufre 3d10 de daño por rayo si falla la tirada de salvación, o la mitad del daño si tiene éxito. En cada uno de tus turnos hasta que el conjuro termine, puedes usar tu acción para invocar un rayo de este modo de nuevo, apuntando al mismo punto o a uno diferente. Si estás al aire libre en condiciones de tormenta cuando lanzas este conjuro, el conjuro te otorga control sobre la tormenta existente en lugar de crear una nueva. En tales condiciones, el daño del conjuro aumenta en 1d10.
higher_level: Cuando lanzas este conjuro usando un espacio de conjuro de nivel 4 o superior, el daño aumenta en 1d10 por cada nivel de espacio por encima del 3º.

name: Call Lightning
desc:
A 60-pie radius storm cloud that is 10 pies high appears in a space 100 pies above you. If there is not a point in the air above you that the storm cloud could appear, the spell fails (such as if you are in a small cavern or indoors).

On the ronda you cast it, and as an action on subsequent turns until the spell ends, you can call down a bolt of rayo to a point directly beneath the cloud. cada criatura within 5 pies of the point makes a tirada de salvación de Destreza, taking 3d10 daño de rayo en una salvación fallida or half as much on a successful one.

If you are outdoors in a storm when you cast this spell, you take control of the storm instead of creating a new cloud and the spell's damage is increased by 1d10.
higher_level: el daño increases by 1d10 for each slot level above 3rd.

name: Call Shadow Mastiff
desc:
You conjure a [shadow mastiff](https://api.open5e.com/monsters/shadow-mastiff) from the plane of shadow. This criatura obeys your verbal commands to aid you in battle or to seek out a specific criatura. It has the body of a large dog with a smooth black coat, 2 pies high at the shoulder and weighing 200 pounds.

The mastiff is friendly to you and your companions. Roll initiative for the mastiff; it acts on its own turn. It obeys simple, verbal commands from you, within its ability to act. Giving a command recibe no action on your part.

The mastiff disappears when it drops to 0 puntos de golpe or when the spell ends.
material: a dog’s tooth

name: Call the Hunter
desc: Deep Magic: clockwork You detach a portion of your soul to become the embodiment of justice in the form of a clockwork outsider known as a Zelekhut who will serve at your commands for the duration, so long as those commands are consistent with its desire to punish wrongdoers. You may give the criatura commands as a acción adicional; it acts either immediately before or after you.

name: Calm Beasts
desc:
You attempt to calm aggressive or asustado animals. Each beast in a 20-pie-radius sphere centered on a point you choose within range debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Carisma. If a criatura fails its tirada de salvación, choose one of the following two effects.
  ***Suppress Hold.*** You can suppress any effect causing the objetivo to be hechizado or asustado. When this spell ends, any suppressed effect resumes, provided that its duration has not expired in the meantime.
  ***Suppress Hostility.*** You can make a objetivo indifferent about criaturas of your choice that it is hostile toward. This indifference ends if the objetivo is attacked or harmed by a spell or if it witnesses any of its aliados being harmed. When the spell ends, the criatura becomes hostile again, unless the GM rules otherwise.

name: Calm Emotions
desc: Intentas suprimir las emociones intensas de un grupo de personas. Cada humanoide dentro de una esfera de 6 metros de radio centrada en un punto que elijas dentro del alcance debe realizar una tirada de salvación de Carisma; una criatura puede elegir fallar esta tirada de salvación si lo desea. Si una criatura falla su tirada de salvación, elige uno de los dos efectos siguientes. Puedes suprimir cualquier efecto que esté causando que el objetivo esté hechizado o asustado. Cuando este conjuro termine, cualquier efecto suprimido se reanuda, siempre que su duración no haya expirado mientras tanto. Alternativamente, puedes hacer que un objetivo sea indiferente hacia las criaturas de tu elección con las que sea hostil. Esta indiferencia termina si el objetivo es atacado o dañado por un conjuro, o si es testigo de que alguno de sus aliados resulta dañado. Cuando el conjuro termina, la criatura vuelve a ser hostil, a menos que el DM determine lo contrario.

name: Calm Emotions
desc:
Strong and harmful emotions are suppressed within the area. You can choose which of the following two effects to apply to each objetivo of this spell.

* Suppress the hechizado or asustado conditions, though they resume when the spell ends (time spent suppressed counts against a condition's duration).
* Suppress hostile feelings towards criaturas of your choice until the spell ends. This suppression ends if a objetivo is attacked or sees its aliados being attacked. objetivos act normally when the spell ends.
higher_level: The spell area increases by 10 pies for each slot level above 2nd.

name: Calm of the Storm
desc: While visualizing the world as you wish it was, you lay your hands upon a criatura other than yourself and undo the effect of a chaos magic surge that affected the criatura within the last minuto. Reality reshapes itself as if the surge never happened, but only for that criatura.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 4th level or higher, the time since the chaos magic surge can be 1 minuto longer for each slot level above 3rd.
material: an amethyst worth 250 gp, which the spell consumes

name: Candle’s Insight
desc:
**Candle’s Perspicacia** is cast on its objetivo as the component candle is lit. The candle burns for up to 10 minutos unless it’s extinguished normally or by the spell’s effect. While the candle burns, the caster can question the spell’s objetivo, and the candle reveals whether the objetivo speaks truthfully. An intentionally misleading or partial answer causes the flame to flicker and dim. An outright lie causes the flame to flare and then go out, ending the spell. The candle judges honesty, not absolute truth; the flame burns steadily through even an outrageously false statement, as long as the objetivo believes it’s true.

**Candle’s Perspicacia** is used across society: by merchants while negotiating causa, by inquisitors investigating heresy, and by monarchs as they interview foreign diplomats. In some societies, casting candle’s Perspicacia without the consent of the spell’s objetivo is considered a serious breach of hospitality.
material: a blessed candle

name: Carmello-Volta’s Irksome Preserves
desc:
At your command, delicious fruit jam oozes from a small mechanical device (such as a crossbow trigger, a lock, or a clockwork toy), rendering the device inoperable until the spell ends and the device is cleaned with a damp cloth. Cleaning away the jam recibe an action, but doing so has no effect until the spell ends. One serving of the jam can be collected in a suitable container. If it's eaten (as a acción adicional) within 24 horas, the jam restores 1d4 puntos de golpe. The jam's flavor is determined by the material component.

The spell can affect constructs, with two limitations. First, the objetivo criatura negates the effect with a successful tirada de salvación de Destreza. Second, unless the construct is Tiny, only one component (an eye, a knee, an elbow, and so forth) can be disabled. The affected construct has desventaja on attack rolls and ability checks that depend on the disabled component until the spell ends and the jam is removed.
material: a small berry or a piece of fruit

name: Catapult
desc: You magically hurl an object or criatura weighing 500 pounds or less 40 pies through the air in a direction of your choosing (including straight up). Objects hurled at specific objetivos require a ataque de conjuro roll para impactar. A arrojadiza criatura recibe 6d10 daño contundente from the fuerza of the throw, plus any appropriate falling damage, and lands derribado. If the objetivo of the spell is arrojadiza against another criatura, the total damage is divided evenly between them and both criaturas are knocked derribado.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 7th level or higher, el daño increases by 1d10, the distance arrojadiza increases by 10 pies, and the weight arrojadiza increases by 100 pounds for each slot level above 6th.
material: a small platinum lever and fulcrum worth 400 gp

name: Catch the Breath
desc:
You can cast this spell as a reacción when you’re objetivoed by a breath weapon. Doing so gives you ventaja on your tirada de salvación against the breath weapon. If your tirada de salvación succeeds, you take no damage from the attack even if a successful save normally only halves el daño.

Whether your tirada de salvación succeeded or failed, you absorb and store energy from the attack. On your next turn, you can make a ranged ataque de conjuro against a objetivo within 60 pies. On a hit, the objetivo recibe 3d10 daño de fuerza. If you opt not to make this attack, the stored energy dissipates harmlessly.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 4th level or higher, el daño done by your attack increases by 1d10 for each slot level above 3rd.
casting_time: 1 reaction, which you take when you make a saving throw against a breath weapon attack

name: Caustic Blood
desc: Your blood becomes caustic when exposed to the air. When you take perforante or daño cortante, you can use your reacción to select up to three criaturas within 30 pies of you. Each objetivo recibe 1d10 daño de ácido unless it makes a successful tirada de salvación de Destreza.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 3rd level or higher, the number of objetivos increases by one for each slot level above 2nd, to a maximum of six objetivos.
casting_time: 1 reaction, which you take when an enemy’s attack deals piercing or slashing damage to you

name: Caustic Torrent
desc: A swirling jet of ácido sprays from you in a direction you choose. The ácido fills a line 60 pies long and 5 pies wide. cada criatura in the line recibe 14d6 daño de ácido, or half as much damage if it makes a successful tirada de salvación de Destreza. A criatura reduced to 0 puntos de golpe by this spell is killed, and its body is liquefied. In addition, cada criatura other than you that’s in the line or within 5 pies of it is envenenado for 1 minuto by toxic fumes. criaturas that don’t breathe or that are immune to daño de ácido aren’t envenenado. A envenenado criatura can repeat the tirada de salvación de Constitución at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself en un éxito.
material: a chip of bone pitted by ácido

name: Caustic Touch
desc: Your hand sweats profusely and becomes coated in a film of caustic slime. Make a melee ataque de conjuro against a criatura you touch. On a hit, the objetivo recibe 1d8 daño de ácido. If the objetivo was concentrating on a spell, it has desventaja on its tirada de salvación de Constitución to maintain Concentración.
higher_level: This spell’s damage increases by 1d8 when you alcance 5th level (2d8), 11th level (3d8), and 17th level (4d8).

name: Celebration
desc:
You create a 30-pie-radius area around a point that you choose within range. An intelligent criatura that enters the area or starts its turn there debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría. en una salvación fallida, the criatura starts to engage in celebratory revelry: drinking, singing, laughing, and dancing. Affected criaturas are reluctant to leave the area until the spell ends, preferring to continue the festivities. They forsake appointments, cease caring about their woes, and generally behave in a cordial (if not hedonistic) manner. This preoccupation with merrymaking occurs regardless of an affected criatura’s agenda or alignment. Assassins procrastinate, servants join in the celebration rather than working, and guards abandon their posts.

The effect ends on a criatura when it is attacked, recibe damage, or is forced to leave the area. A criatura that makes a successful tirada de salvación can enter or leave the area without danger of being enchanted. A criatura that fails the tirada de salvación and is forcibly removed from the area must repeat the tirada de salvación if it returns to the area.
higher_level:
When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 8th level or higher, the spell lasts for an additional hora for each slot level above 7th.

***Ritual Focus.*** If you expend your ritual focus, an unaffected intelligent criatura debe realizar a new tirada de salvación every time it starts its turn in the area, even if it has previously succeeded on a save against the spell.
material: a small party favor

name: Ceremony
desc:
You perform a religious ceremony during the casting time of this spell. When you cast the spell, you choose one of the following effects, any objetivos of which must be within range during the entire casting.

* **Funeral:** You bless one or more corpses, acknowledging their transition away from this world. For the next week, they cannot become undead by any means short of a wish spell. This benefit lasts indefinitely regarding undead of CR 1/4 or less. A corpse can only benefit from this effect once.
* **Guide the Passing:** You bless one or more criaturas within range for their passage into the next life. For the next 7 days, their souls cannot be trapped or captured by any means short of a wish spell. Once a criatura benefits from this effect, it can't do so again until it has been restored to life.
* **Offering:** The gifts of the faithful are offered to the benefit of the gods and the community. Choose one skill or tool competencia and objetivo a number of criaturas equal to your competencia bonus that are within range. When a objetivo makes an ability check using the skill or tool within the next week, it can choose to use this benefit to gain an expertise die on the check. A criatura can be objetivoed by this effect no more than once per week.
* **Purification:** A criatura you touch is washed with your spiritual energy. Choose one disease or possession effect on the objetivo. If the save CD for that effect is equal to or lower than your CD de salvación del conjuro, the effect ends.
* **Rite of Passage:** You shepherd one or more criaturas into the next phase of life, such as in a child dedication, coming of age, marriage, or conversion ceremony. These criaturas gain inspiration. A criatura can benefit from this effect no more than once per year.

name: Chain Lightning
desc: Creas un rayo de electricidad que se dirige hacia un objetivo de tu elección que puedas ver dentro del alcance. Tres rayos saltan entonces desde ese objetivo hacia hasta otros tres objetivos, cada uno de los cuales debe estar a 9 metros del primer objetivo. Un objetivo puede ser una criatura o un objeto, y solo puede ser alcanzado por uno de los rayos. Cada objetivo debe realizar una tirada de salvación de Destreza. El objetivo sufre 10d8 de daño por rayo si falla la tirada de salvación, o la mitad del daño si tiene éxito.
higher_level: Cuando lanzas este conjuro usando un espacio de conjuro de nivel 7 o superior, un rayo adicional salta desde el primer objetivo hacia otro objetivo por cada nivel de espacio por encima del 6º.
material: Un poco de pelaje; un trozo de ámbar, vidrio o una vara de cristal; y tres alfileres de plata.

name: Chain Lightning
desc: You fuego a bolt of electricity at the primary objetivo that causa 10d8 daño de rayo. Electricity arcs to up to 3 additional objetivos you choose that are within 30 pies of the primary objetivo.
higher_level: An extra arc leaps from the primary objetivo to an additional objetivo for each slot level above 6th.

name: Chains of Torment
desc:
You are surrounded by an aura of dim ligera in a 10-pie radius as you conjure an iron chain that extends out to a criatura you can see within 30 pies. The criatura debe realizar a successful tirada de salvación de Destreza or be agarrado (escape CD equal to your CD de salvación del conjuro). While agarrado in this way, the criatura is also apresado. A criatura that’s apresado at the start of its turn recibe 4d6 daño psíquico. You can have only una criatura apresado in this way at a time.

As an action, you can scan the mind of the criatura that’s apresado by your chain. If the criatura gets a failure on a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría, you learn one discrete piece of information of your choosing known by the criatura (such as a name, a password, or an important number). The effect is otherwise harmless.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 5th level or higher, the daño psíquico increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 4th.
material: an iron chain link dipped in blood

name: Chains of the Goddess
desc: Choose a criatura you can see within 90 pies. The objetivo debe realizar a successful tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or be apresado by chains of psíquico fuerza and take 6d8 daño contundente. A apresado criatura can repeat the tirada de salvación at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself en una salvación exitosa. While apresado in this way, the criatura also recibe 6d8 daño contundente at the start of each of your turns.
material: 1 pie of iron chain

name: Champion’s Weapon
desc: A spectral version of a melee weapon of your choice materializes in your hand. It has standard statistics for a weapon of its kind, but it causa daño de fuerza instead of its normal damage type and it sheds dim ligera in a 10-pie radius. You have competencia with this weapon for the spell’s duration. The weapon can be wielded only by the caster; the spell ends if the weapon is held by a criatura other than you or if you start your turn more than 10 pies from the weapon.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 3rd level or higher, the weapon causa an extra 1d8 daño de fuerza for each slot level above 2nd.

name: Chaotic Form
desc: You cause the form of a willing criatura to become malleable, dripping and flowing according to the objetivo’s will as if the criatura were a vaguely humanoid-shaped ooze. The criatura is not affected by difficult terrain, it has ventaja on Destreza (Acrobacias) checks made to escape a grapple, and it suffers no penalties when squeezing through spaces one size smaller than itself. The objetivo’s movement is halved while it is affected by **chaotic form**.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 5th level or higher, the duration increases by 10 minutos for each slot level above 4th.

name: Chaotic Vitality
desc:
Make a melee ataque de conjuro against a criatura that has a number of Hit Dice no greater than your level and has at least 1 punto de golpe. On a hit, you conjure pulsating waves of chaotic energy within the criatura and yourself. After a brief moment that seems to last forever, your punto de golpe total changes, as does the criatura’s. Roll a d100 and increase or decrease the number rolled by any number up to your spellcasting level, then find the result on the punto de golpe Flux table. Apply that result both to yourself and the objetivo criatura. Any puntos de golpe gained beyond a criatura’s normal maximum are temporary puntos de golpe that last for 1 ronda per caster level.

For example, a 3rd-level spellcaster who currently has 17 of her maximum 30 puntos de golpe casts **chaotic vitality** on a criatura with 54 puntos de golpe and rolls a 75 on the punto de golpe Flux table. The two criaturas have a combined total of 71 puntos de golpe. A result of 75 indicates that both criaturas get 50 percent of the total, so the spellcaster and the objetivo end up with 35 puntos de golpe each. In the spellcaster’s case, 5 of those puntos de golpe are temporary and will last for 3 rondas.
higher_level:
When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 3rd level or higher, the maximum Hit Dice of the affected criatura increases by 2 for each slot level above 2nd.
 ## punto de golpe Flux 
| SIZE | HP |
|---|---|
| 01–09 | 0 |
| 10–39 | 1 |
| 40–69 | 25 percent of total |
| 70–84 | 50 percent of total |
| 85–94 | 75 percent of total |
| 95–99 | 100 percent of total |
| 100 | 200 percent of total, and both criaturas gain the effect of a haste spell that lasts for 1 ronda per caster level |

name: Chaotic World
desc: You throw a handful of colored cloth into the air while screaming a litany of disjointed phrases. A moment later, a 30-pie cube centered on a point within range fills with multicolored ligera, cacophonous sound, overpowering scents, and other confusing sensory information. The effect is dizzying and overwhelming. Each enemigo within the cube debe realizar a successful tirada de salvación de Inteligencia or become cegado and ensordecido, and fall derribado. An affected enemigo cannot stand up or recover from the blindness or deafness while within the area, but all three conditions end immediately for a criatura that leaves the spell’s area.
material: seven irregular pieces of colored cloth that you throw into the air

name: Charm Monster
desc:
You only require line of sight to the objetivo (not line of effect) and it has ventaja on its tirada de salvación to resist the spell if you or your companions are fighting it. Until the spell ends, the objetivo is hechizado by you and friendly towards you.

The spell ends if you or your companions do anything harmful towards the objetivo. The objetivo knows it was hechizado by you when the spell ends.
higher_level: For each slot level above 4th, you affect one additional objetivo that is within 30 pies of other objetivos.

name: Charm Person
desc: Intentas hechizar a un humanoide que puedas ver dentro del alcance. Debe realizar una tirada de salvación de Sabiduría, y lo hace con ventaja si tú o tus compañeros estáis luchando contra él. Si falla la tirada de salvación, queda hechizado por ti hasta que el conjuro termine o hasta que tú o tus compañeros le hagáis algo perjudicial. La criatura hechizada te considera un conocido amistoso. Cuando el conjuro termina, la criatura sabe que fue hechizada por ti.
higher_level: Cuando lanzas este conjuro usando un espacio de conjuro de nivel 2 o superior, puedes apuntar a una criatura adicional por cada nivel de espacio por encima del 1º. Las criaturas deben estar a 9 metros entre sí cuando las elijas como objetivo.
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Sorcerer, Warlock, Wizard

name: Charm Person
desc:
You only require line of sight to the objetivo (not line of effect) and it has ventaja on its tirada de salvación to resist the spell if you or your companions are fighting it. Until the spell ends, the objetivo is hechizado by you and friendly towards you.

The spell ends if you or your companions do anything harmful towards the objetivo. The objetivo knows it was hechizado by you when the spell ends.
higher_level: For each slot level above 1st, you affect one additional objetivo that is within 30 pies of other objetivos.

name: Charming Aesthetics
desc: You affect a group of the same plants or animals within range, giving them a harmless and attractive appearance. If a criatura studies one of the enchanted plants or animals, it debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría. If it fails the tirada de salvación, it is hechizado by the plant or animal until the spell ends or until another criatura other than one of its aliados does anything harmful to it. While the criatura is hechizado and stays within sight of the enchanted plants or animals, it has desventaja on Sabiduría (Percepción) checks as well as checks to notice signs of danger. If the hechizado criatura attempts to move out of sight of the spell's subject, it debe realizar a second tirada de salvación de Sabiduría. If it fails the tirada de salvación, it refuses to move out of sight of the spell's subject. It can repeat this save once per minuto. If it succeeds, it can move away, but it remains hechizado.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 4th level or higher, you can objetivo one additional group of plants or animals for each slot level above 4th.

name: Child of Light and Darkness
desc: Roll a d20 at the end of each of your turns for the duration of the spell. On a roll of 1-10, you take the form of a humanoid made of pure, searing ligera. On a roll of 11-20, you take the form of a humanoid made of bone-chilling darkness. In both forms, you have immunity to contundente, perforante, and daño cortante from ataques no mágicos, and a criatura that attacks you has desventaja on the tirada de ataque. You gain additional benefits while in each form: ligera Form. You shed bright ligera in a 60-pie radius and dim ligera for an additional 60 pies, you are immune to daño de fuego, and you have resistance to daño radiante. Once per turn, as a acción adicional, you can teleport to a space you can see within the ligera you shed. Darkness Form. You are immune to daño de frío, and you have resistance to daño necrótico. Once per turn, as a acción adicional, you can objetivo up to three Large or smaller criaturas within 30 pies of you. Each objetivo debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Fuerza or be pulled or pushed (your choice) up to 20 pies straight toward or away from you.

name: Chill Touch
desc: Creas una mano espectral y esquelética en el espacio de una criatura dentro del alcance. Realiza un ataque de conjuro a distancia contra la criatura para asaltarla con el frío de la tumba. Si impactas, el objetivo sufre 1d8 de daño necrótico y no puede recuperar puntos de golpe hasta el inicio de tu siguiente turno. Hasta entonces, la mano se aferra al objetivo. Si impactas a un objetivo no muerto, este también tiene desventaja en las tiradas de ataque contra ti hasta el final de tu siguiente turno.
higher_level: El daño de este conjuro aumenta en 1d8 cuando alcanzas el nivel 5 (2d8), el nivel 11 (3d8) y el nivel 17 (4d8).

name: Chill Touch
desc: You alcance out with a spectral hand that carries the chill of death. Make a ranged ataque de conjuro. On a hit, the objetivo recibe 1d8 daño necrótico, and it cannot regain puntos de golpe until the start of your next turn. The hand remains visibly clutching onto the objetivo for the duration. If the objetivo you hit is undead, it makes attack rolls against you with desventaja until the end of your next turn.
higher_level: The spell's damage increases by 1d8 when you alcance 5th level (2d8), 11th level (3d8), and 17th level (4d8).

name: Chilling Words
desc:
You utter a short phrase and designate a criatura within range to be affected by it. The objetivo debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría to avoid the spell. en una salvación fallida, the objetivo is susceptible to the phrase for the duration of the spell. At any later time while the spell is in effect, you and any of your aliados within range when you cast the spell can use an action to utter the phrase, which causes the objetivo to freeze in fear. Each of you can use the phrase against the objetivo once only, and the objetivo must be within 30 pies of the speaker for the phrase to be effective.

When the objetivo hears the phrase, it debe realizar a successful tirada de salvación de Constitución or take 1d6 daño psíquico and become apresado for 1 ronda. Whether this tirada de salvación succeeds or fails, the objetivo can’t be affected by the phrase for 1 minuto afterward.

You can end the spell early by making a final utterance of the phrase (even if you’ve used the phrase on this objetivo previously). On hearing this final utterance, the objetivo recibe 4d6 daño psíquico and is apresado for 1 minuto or, with a successful tirada de salvación de Constitución, it recibe half el daño and is apresado for 1 ronda.
material: a strip of paper with writing on it

name: Chronal Lance
desc: You inflict the ravages of aging on up to three criaturas within range, temporarily discomfiting them and making them appear elderly for a time. Each objetivo debe realizar a successful tirada de salvación de Sabiduría, or its walking Velocidad is halved (ronda up to the nearest 5-pie increment) and it has desventaja on Destreza checks (but not tirada de salvacións). An affected criatura can repeat the tirada de salvación at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself en un éxito.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 2nd level or higher, you can objetivo one additional criatura for each slot level above 1st.

name: Circle of Death
desc: Una esfera de energía negativa se expande en una esfera de 18 m de radio desde un punto dentro del alcance. Cada criatura en esa área debe realizar una tirada de salvación de Constitución. El objetivo recibe 8d6 de daño necrótico si falla la tirada, o la mitad si la supera.
higher_level: Cuando lanzas este conjuro usando un espacio de conjuro de nivel 7 o superior, el daño aumenta en 2d6 por cada nivel de espacio por encima del 6.º.
material: El polvo de una perla negra triturada con un valor de al menos 500 po.

name: Circle of Death
desc:
A sphere of negative energy sucks life from the area.

criaturas in the area take 9d6 daño necrótico.
higher_level: el daño increases by 2d6 for each slot level above 6th.

name: Circle of Devestation
desc: You create a 10-pie tall, 20-pie radius ring of destructive energy around a point you can see within range. The area inside the ring is difficult terrain. When you cast the spell and as a acción adicional on each of your turns, you can choose one of the following damage types: frío, fuego, rayo, necrótico, or radiante. criaturas and objects that touch the ring, that are inside it when it's created, or that end their turn inside the ring take 6d6 damage of the chosen type, or la mitad del daño with a successful tirada de salvación de Constitución. A criatura or object reduced to 0 puntos de golpe by the spell is reduced to fine ash. At the start of each of your subsequent turns, the ring's radius expands by 20 pies. Any criaturas or objects touched by the expanding ring are subject to its effects immediately.

name: Circle of Wind
desc: ligera wind encircles you, leaving you in the center of a mild vortex. For the duration, you gain a +2 bonus to your AC against ranged attacks. You also have ventaja on tirada de salvacións against extreme environmental heat and against harmful gases, vapors, and inhaled poisons.
material: a crystal ring

name: Circular Breathing
desc:
You begin carefully regulating your breath so that you can continue playing longer or keep breathing longer in adverse conditions.

Until the spell ends, you can breathe underwater, and you can utilize bardic performances that would normally require breathable air. In addition, you have ventaja on tirada de salvacións against gases and environments with adverse breathing conditions.
higher_level: The duration of this spell increases when you alcance 5th level (10 minutos), 11th level (30 minutos), and 17th level (1 hora).

name: Clairvoyance
desc: Creas un sensor invisible dentro del alcance en una ubicación que te resulte familiar (un lugar que hayas visitado o visto antes) o en una ubicación evidente que te sea desconocida (como al otro lado de una puerta, tras una esquina o en un grupo de árboles). El sensor permanece en su lugar durante la duración del conjuro y no puede ser atacado ni interactuado de ninguna otra forma. Al lanzar el conjuro, eliges ver u oír. Puedes usar el sentido elegido a través del sensor como si estuvieras en su espacio. Como acción, puedes alternar entre ver y oír. Una criatura que pueda ver el sensor (como una criatura que se beneficie de see invisibility o de visión verdadera) ve un orbe luminoso e intangible de aproximadamente el tamaño de tu puño.
material: Un foco con un valor de al menos 100 po, ya sea un cuerno enjoyado para oír o un ojo de cristal para ver.

name: Clairvoyance
desc:
An invisible sensor is created within the spell's range. The sensor remains there for the duration, and it cannot be objetivoed or attacked.

Choose seeing or hearing when you cast the spell.

You may use that sense through the sensor as if you were there. As an action, you may switch which sense you are using through the sensor.

A criatura able to see invisible things (from the see invisibility spell or vista verdadera, for instance) sees a 4-inch diameter glowing, ethereal orb.

name: Clash of Glaciers
desc: You conjure up icy boulders that crush criaturas in a line 100 pies long. cada criatura in the area recibe 5d6 daño contundente plus 5d6 daño de frío, or half el daño with a successful tirada de salvación de Destreza.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 6th level or higher, el daño increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 5th. You decide whether each extra die causa contundente or daño de frío.
material: a piece of cracked glass

name: Claws of Darkness
desc: You shape shadows into claws that grow from your fingers and drip inky blackness. The claws have a alcance of 10 pies. While the spell lasts, you can make a melee ataque de conjuro with them that causa 1d10 daño de frío.

name: Claws of the Earth Dragon
desc: You summon the power of the earth dragon and shoot a ray at un objetivo within 60 pies. The objetivo falls derribado and recibe 6d8 daño contundente from being slammed to the ground. If the objetivo was volando or levitating, it recibe an additional 1d6 daño contundente per 10 pies it falls. If the objetivo makes a successful tirada de salvación de Fuerza, damage is halved, it doesn’t fall, and it isn’t knocked derribado.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 6th level or higher, el daño done by the attack increases by 1d8 and the range increases by 10 pies for each slot level above 5th.

name: Clear the Board
desc: You send your aliados and your enemigos to opposite sides of the battlefield. Pick a cardinal direction. With a shout and a gesture, you and up to five willing friendly criaturas within range are teleported up to 90 pies in that direction to spaces you can see. At the same time, up to six hostile criaturas within range debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría. en una salvación fallida, the hostile criatura is teleported up to 90 pies in the opposite direction of where you teleport yourself and the friendly criaturas to spaces you can see. You can't teleport a objetivo into dangerous terrain, such as lava or off the edge of a cliff, and each objetivo must be teleported to an unoccupied space that is on the ground or on a floor.

name: Clearing the Field
desc: With a harsh word and a vicious chopping motion, you cause every tree, shrub, and stump within 40 pies of you to sink into the ground, leaving the vacated area clear of plant life that might otherwise hamper movement or obscure sight. Overgrown areas that counted as difficult terrain become clear ground and no longer hamper movement. The original plant life instantly rises from the ground again when the spell ends or is dispelled. Plant criaturas are not affected by **clearing the field**.
higher_level:
When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 3rd level or higher, the spell lasts for an additional hora for each slot level above 2nd.

***Ritual Focus.*** If you expend your ritual focus, plant criaturas in the area debe realizar a successful tirada de salvación de Constitución or be affected as though by a [enlarge/reduce](https://api.open5e.com/spells/enlargereduce) spell.

name: Cloak of Shadow
desc: You cloak yourself in shadow, giving you ventaja on Destreza (Sigilo) checks against criaturas that rely on sight.

name: Clockwork Bolt
desc:
You imbue an arrow or crossbow bolt with clockwork magic just as you fuego it at your objetivo; spinning blades materialize on the missile after it strikes to further mutilate your enemigo.

As part of the action used to cast this spell, you make a ataque a distancia con arma with a bow or a crossbow against una criatura within range. If the attack hits, the missile embeds in the objetivo. Unless the objetivo (or an aliado of it within 5 pies) uses an action to remove the projectile (which causa no additional damage), the objetivo recibe an additional 1d8 daño cortante at the end of its next turn from spinning blades that briefly sprout from the missile’s shaft. Afterward, the projectile reverts to normal.
higher_level: This spell causa more damage when you alcance higher levels. At 5th level, the ataque a distancia causa an extra 1d8 daño cortante to the objetivo, and the objetivo recibe an additional 1d8 daño cortante (2d8 total) if the embedded munición isn’t removed. Both damage amounts increase by 1d8 again at 11th level and at 17th level.
material: an arrow or crossbow bolt

name: Clone
desc: Este conjuro hace crecer un duplicado inerte de una criatura viva como salvaguarda contra la muerte. El clon se forma dentro de un recipiente sellado y alcanza su tamaño y madurez completos tras 120 días; también puedes elegir que el clon sea una versión más joven de la misma criatura. Permanece inerte e inmutable de manera indefinida, siempre que su recipiente no sea perturbado. En cualquier momento después de que el clon madure, si la criatura original muere, su alma se transfiere al clon, siempre que el alma esté libre y dispuesta a regresar. El clon es físicamente idéntico al original y tiene la misma personalidad, recuerdos y habilidades, pero ninguno del equipo del original. Los restos físicos de la criatura original, si aún existen, quedan inertes y no pueden ser devueltos a la vida, ya que el alma de la criatura se encuentra en otro lugar.
material: Un diamante con un valor de al menos 1.000 po y al menos 1 pulgada cúbica de carne de la criatura que va a ser clonada, que el conjuro consume, y un recipiente con un valor de al menos 2.000 po que tenga una tapa sellable y sea lo suficientemente grande para contener a una criatura Mediana, como una urna enorme, un ataúd, una cavidad rellena de barro en el suelo o un contenedor de cristal lleno de agua salada.

name: Clone
desc:
This spell grows a duplicate of the objetivo that remains inert indefinitely as long as its vessel is sealed.

The clone grows inside the sealed vessel and matures over the course of 120 days. You can choose to have the clone be a younger version of the objetivo.

Once the clone has matured, when the objetivo dies its soul is transferred to the clone so long as it is free and willing. The clone is identical to the objetivo (except perhaps in age) and has the same personality, memories, and abilities, but it is without the objetivo's equipment. The objetivo's original body cannot be brought back to life by magic since its soul now resides within the cloned body.

name: Closing In
desc: Choose a criatura you can see within range. The objetivo debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría, which it makes with desventaja if it’s in an enclosed space. en una salvación fallida, the criatura believes the world around it is closing in and threatening to crush it. Even in open or clear terrain, the criatura feels as though it is sinking into a pit, or that the land is rising around it. The criatura has desventaja on ability checks and attack rolls for the duration, and it recibe 2d6 daño psíquico at the end of each of its turns. An affected criatura repeats the tirada de salvación at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself en un éxito.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 4th level or higher, you can objetivo one additional criatura for each slot level above 3rd.

name: Cloudkill
desc: Creas una esfera de niebla venenosa de color amarillo verdoso de 6 m de radio centrada en un punto que elijas dentro del alcance. La niebla se extiende alrededor de las esquinas. Dura lo que dure el conjuro o hasta que un viento fuerte la disperse, poniendo fin al conjuro. Su área está fuertemente oscurecida. Cuando una criatura entra en el área del conjuro por primera vez en un turno o comienza su turno en ella, esa criatura debe realizar una tirada de salvación de Constitución. La criatura recibe 5d8 de daño de veneno si falla la tirada, o la mitad si la supera. Las criaturas se ven afectadas aunque contengan la respiración o no necesiten respirar. La niebla se desplaza 3 m alejándose de ti al comienzo de cada uno de tus turnos, deslizándose por la superficie del suelo. Los vapores, al ser más pesados que el aire, se hunden hasta el nivel más bajo del terreno, incluso fluyendo hacia abajo por las aberturas.
higher_level: Cuando lanzas este conjuro usando un espacio de conjuro de nivel 6 o superior, el daño aumenta en 1d8 por cada nivel de espacio por encima del 5.º.

name: Cloudkill
desc:
You create a sphere of poisonous, sickly green fog, which can spread around corners but not change shape. The area is heavily obscured. A strong wind disperses the fog, ending the spell early.

Until the spell ends, when a criatura enters the area for the first time on its turn or starts its turn there, it recibe 5d8 daño de veneno.

The fog moves away from you 10 pies at the start of each of your turns, flowing along the ground. The fog is thicker than air, sinks to the lowest level in the land, and can even flow down openings and pits.
higher_level: el daño increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 5th.

name: Cloying Darkness
desc: You alcance out with a hand of decaying shadows. Make a ranged ataque de conjuro. If it hits, the objetivo recibe 2d8 daño necrótico and debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Constitución. If it fails, its visual organs are enveloped in shadow until the start of your next turn, causing it to treat all lighting as if it's one step lower in intensity (it treats bright ligera as dim, dim ligera as darkness, and darkness as mágico darkness).
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 2nd level or higher, el daño increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 1st.

name: Cobra Fangs
desc:
The spell causes the objetivo to grow great, snake-like fangs. An unwilling criatura debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría to avoid the effect. The spell fails if the objetivo already has a bite attack that causa daño de veneno.

If the objetivo doesn’t have a bite attack, it gains one. The objetivo is proficient with the bite, and it adds its Fuerza modifier to the attack and damage rolls. el daño is perforante and el daño die is a d4.

When the objetivo hits a criatura with its bite attack, the criatura debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Constitución, taking 3d6 daño de veneno en una salvación fallida, or half as much damage on a successful one.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 3rd level or higher, the objetivo’s bite counts as mágico for the purpose of overcoming resistance and immunity to ataques no mágicos and damage.
material: a drop of snake venom or a patch of snakeskin

name: Cobra's Spit
desc: Until the spell ends, you can use an action to spit venom, making a ranged ataque de conjuro at a criatura or object within 30 pies. On a hit, the venom causa 4d8 daño de veneno, and if the objetivo is a criatura it is envenenado until the end of its next turn.
higher_level: el daño increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 3rd.

name: Color Spray
desc: Un deslumbrante conjunto de luces de colores destellantes surge de tu mano. Tira 6d10; el total indica cuántos puntos de golpe de criaturas puede afectar este conjuro. Las criaturas en un cono de 4,5 m que parte de ti se ven afectadas en orden ascendente según sus puntos de golpe actuales (ignorando a las criaturas inconscientes y a las criaturas que no pueden ver). Comenzando por la criatura con los puntos de golpe actuales más bajos, cada criatura afectada por este conjuro queda cegada hasta que el conjuro termine. Resta los puntos de golpe de cada criatura del total antes de pasar a la criatura con los siguientes puntos de golpe más bajos. Los puntos de golpe de una criatura deben ser iguales o inferiores al total restante para que esa criatura se vea afectada.
higher_level: Cuando lanzas este conjuro usando un espacio de conjuro de nivel 2 o superior, tira 2d10 adicionales por cada nivel de espacio por encima del 1.º.
material: Un pellizco de polvo o arena de color rojo, amarillo y azul.

name: Color Spray
desc:
A blast of dazzling multicolored ligera flashes from your hand to blind your objetivos until the start of your next turn. Starting with the objetivo with the lowest puntos de golpe (ignoring inconsciente criaturas), objetivos within the area are cegado, in ascending order according to their puntos de golpe.

When a objetivo is cegado, subtract its puntos de golpe from the total before moving on to the next objetivo.

A objetivo's puntos de golpe must be equal to or less than the total remaining for the spell to have any affect.
higher_level: Add an additional 2d10 puntos de golpe for each slot level above 1st.

name: Command
desc:
Pronuncias una orden de una sola palabra a una criatura que puedas ver dentro del alcance. El objetivo debe superar una tirada de salvación de Sabiduría o seguir la orden en su siguiente turno. El conjuro no tiene efecto si el objetivo es un no-muerto, si no entiende tu idioma o si tu orden le resulta directamente dañina. A continuación se describen algunas órdenes típicas y sus efectos. Puedes dar una orden distinta a las aquí descritas; en ese caso, el DM determina cómo se comporta el objetivo. Si el objetivo no puede seguir tu orden, el conjuro termina.

**Acércate.** El objetivo se mueve hacia ti por la ruta más corta y directa, terminando su turno si se acerca a menos de 1,5 m de ti.

**Suelta.** El objetivo suelta lo que esté sosteniendo y termina su turno.

**Huye.** El objetivo emplea su turno en alejarse de ti por el medio disponible más rápido.

**Póstrate.** El objetivo cae derribado y termina su turno.

**Alto.** El objetivo no se mueve ni realiza acciones. Una criatura voladora se mantiene en el aire siempre que sea capaz de hacerlo. Si debe moverse para permanecer en el aire, vuela la distancia mínima necesaria para mantenerse en vuelo.
higher_level: Cuando lanzas este conjuro usando un espacio de conjuro de nivel 2 o superior, puedes afectar a una criatura adicional por cada nivel de espacio por encima del 1.º. Las criaturas deben encontrarse a un máximo de 9 m entre sí en el momento en que las designes como objetivo.

name: Command
desc:
You only require line of sight to the objetivo (not line of effect). On its next turn the objetivo follows a one-word command of your choosing. The spell fails if the objetivo is undead, if it does not understand your command, or if the command is immediately harmful to it.

Below are example commands, but at the Narrator's discretion you may give any one-word command.

* **Approach/Come/Here:** The objetivo uses its action to take the Dash action and move toward you by the shortest route, ending its turn if it reaches within 5 pies of you.
* **Bow/Grovel/Kneel:** The objetivo falls derribado and ends its turn.
* **Drop:** The objetivo drops anything it is holding and ends its turn.
* **Flee/Run:** The objetivo uses its action to Dash and moves away from you as far as it can.
* **Halt:** The objetivo remains where it is and recibe no actions. A volando criatura that cannot hover moves the minimum distance needed to remain aloft.
higher_level: For each slot level above 1st, you affect one additional objetivo that is within 30 pies of other objetivos.

name: Commander's Pavilion
desc: Creates a command tent 30 pies by 30 pies with a peak height of 20 pies. It is filled with items a military commander might require of a headquarters tent on a campaign, such as maps of the area, a spyglass, a sandglass, materials for correspondence, references for coding and decoding messages, books on Historia and strategy relevant to the area, banners, spare uniforms, and badges of rank. Such minor mundane items dissipate once the spell's effect ends. Recasting the spell on subsequent days maintains the existing tent for another 24 horas.

name: Commune
desc: Contactas con tu deidad o con un intermediario divino y formulas hasta tres preguntas que puedan responderse con un sí o un no. Debes hacer tus preguntas antes de que el conjuro termine. Recibes una respuesta correcta para cada pregunta. Los seres divinos no son necesariamente omniscientes, por lo que podrías recibir «incierto» como respuesta si una pregunta hace referencia a información que está más allá del conocimiento de la deidad. En los casos en que una respuesta de una sola palabra pudiera resultar engañosa o contraria a los intereses de la deidad, el DM puede ofrecer una breve frase como respuesta. Si lanzas el conjuro dos o más veces antes de terminar tu siguiente descanso largo, existe una probabilidad acumulativa del 25 por ciento por cada lanzamiento posterior al primero de no recibir respuesta alguna. El DM realiza esta tirada en secreto.
material: Incienso y un frasco de agua bendita o maldita.

name: Commune
desc:
You contact your deity, a divine proxy, or a personified source of divine power and ask up to 3 questions that could be answered with a yes or a no. You must complete your questions before the spell ends. You receive a correct answer for each question, unless the being does not know. When the being does not know, you receive "unclear" as an answer. The being does not try to deceive, and the Narrator may offer a short phrase as an answer if necessary.

When you cast this spell again before finishing a descanso largo, the chance of getting a no answer increases.

The Narrator makes the following roll in secret: second casting —25%, third casting —50%, fourth casting—75%, fifth casting—100%.

name: Commune with Nature
desc:
Te fusionas brevemente con la naturaleza y adquieres conocimiento del territorio circundante. En exteriores, el conjuro te proporciona conocimiento del terreno en un radio de 5 km a tu alrededor. En cuevas y otros entornos naturales subterráneos, el radio se limita a 90 m. El conjuro no funciona en lugares donde la naturaleza ha sido reemplazada por construcciones, como mazmorras o poblaciones. Obtienes al instante conocimiento de hasta tres datos de tu elección sobre cualquiera de los siguientes temas en relación con el área:
- Terreno y masas de agua
- Plantas, minerales, animales o pueblos predominantes
- Celestiales, feéricos, infernales, elementales o no-muertos poderosos
- Influencias de otros planos de existencia
- Edificaciones

Por ejemplo, podrías determinar la ubicación de no-muertos poderosos en el área, la localización de las principales fuentes de agua potable segura y la ubicación de cualquier población cercana.

name: Commune with Nature
desc:
Until the spell ends, your spirit bonds with that of Naturaleza and you learn about the surrounding land.

When cast outdoors the spell reaches 3 millas around you, and in natural underground settings it reaches only 300 pies. The spell fails if you are in a heavily constructed area, such as a dungeon or town.

You learn up to 3 facts of your choice about the surrounding area:

* Terrain and bodies of water
* Común flora, fauna, minerals, and peoples
* Any unnatural criaturas in the area
* Weaknesses in planar boundaries
* Built structures

name: Compelled Movement
desc:
Choose two living criaturas (not constructs or undead) you can see within range. Each debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Carisma. en una salvación fallida, a criatura is compelled to use its movement to move toward the other criatura. Its route must be as direct as possible, but it avoids dangerous terrain and enemigos. If the criaturas are within 5 pies of each other at the end of either one’s turn, their bodies fuse together. Fused criaturas still take their own turns, but they can’t move, can’t use reactions, and have desventaja on attack rolls, Destreza tirada de salvacións, and Constitución checks to maintain Concentración.

A fused criatura can use its action to make a tirada de salvación de Carisma. en un éxito, the criatura breaks free and can move as it wants. It can become fused again, however, if it’s within 5 pies of a criatura that’s still under the spell’s effect at the end of either criatura’s turn.

**Compelled movement** doesn’t affect a criatura that can’t be hechizado or that is incorporeal.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 5th level or higher, the number of criaturas you can affect increases by one for every two slot levels above 3rd.
material: the embalmed body of a millipede with its right legs removed, worth at least 50 gp

name: Compelling Fate
desc:
You view the actions of a single criatura you can see through the influence of the stars, and you read what is written there. If the objetivo fails a tirada de salvación de Carisma, you can predict that criatura’s actions. This has the following effects:
* You have ventaja on attack rolls against the objetivo.
* For every 5 pies the objetivo moves, you can move 5 pies (up to your normal movement) on the objetivo’s turn when it has completed its movement. This is deducted from your next turn’s movement.
* As a reacción at the start of the objetivo’s turn, you can warn yourself and aliados that can hear you of the objetivo’s offensive intentions; any criatura objetivoed by the objetivo’s next attack gains a +2 bonus to AC or to its tirada de salvación against that attack.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 4th level or higher, the duration is extended by 1 ronda for each slot level above 3rd.
material: a sprinkling of silver dust worth 20 gp

name: Comprehend Languages
desc: Durante la duración, comprendes el significado literal de cualquier idioma hablado que escuches. También comprendes cualquier idioma escrito que veas, pero debes estar tocando la superficie sobre la que están escritas las palabras. Se tarda aproximadamente 1 minuto en leer una página de texto. Este conjuro no descifra mensajes ocultos en un texto ni glifos, como un símbolo arcano, que no formen parte de un idioma escrito.
material: Una pizca de hollín y sal.
dnd_class: Bard, Ritual Caster, Sorcerer, Warlock, Wizard

name: Comprehend Languages
desc: You gain a +10 bonus on Perspicacia checks made to understand the meaning of any spoken language that you hear, or any written language that you can touch. Typically interpreting an unknown language is a CD 20 check, but the Narrator may use CD 15 for a language closely related to one you know, CD 25 for a language that is particularly unfamiliar or ancient, or CD 30 for a lost or dead language. This spell doesn't uncover secret messages or decode cyphers, and it does not assist in uncovering lies.
higher_level: The bonus increases by +5 for each slot level above 1st.

name: Comprehend Wild Shape
desc: Give one of the carved totems to an aliado while keeping the other yourself. For the duration of the spell, you and whoever holds the other totem can communicate while either of you is in a beast shape. This isn’t a telepathic link; you simply understand each other’s verbal communication, similar to the effect of a speak with animals spell. This effect doesn’t allow a druid in beast shape to cast spells.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 3rd level or higher, you can increase the number of objetivo criaturas by two for each slot level above 2nd. cada criatura must receive a matching carved totem.
material: two or more matching carved totems

name: Compulsion
desc: Las criaturas que elijas que puedas ver dentro del alcance y que puedan oírte deben realizar una tirada de salvación de Sabiduría. Un objetivo supera automáticamente esta tirada de salvación si no puede ser hechizado. Si falla la tirada, el objetivo queda afectado por este conjuro. Mientras el conjuro dure, puedes usar una acción adicional en cada uno de tus turnos para designar una dirección que sea horizontal respecto a ti. Cada objetivo afectado debe emplear el máximo de su movimiento posible para desplazarse en esa dirección en su siguiente turno. Puede realizar su acción antes de moverse. Tras desplazarse de este modo, puede realizar otra tirada de salvación de Sabiduría para intentar poner fin al efecto. Un objetivo no se ve obligado a moverse hacia un peligro claramente letal, como un fuego o un foso, pero sí provocará ataques de oportunidad para desplazarse en la dirección designada.

name: Cone of Cold
desc: Una ráfaga de aire gélido surge de tus manos. Cada criatura en un cono de 18m debe realizar una tirada de salvación de Constitución. Una criatura sufre 8d8 de daño por frío si falla la tirada, o la mitad si la supera. Una criatura que muera a causa de este conjuro se convierte en una estatua de hielo hasta que se descongele.
higher_level: Cuando lanzas este conjuro usando un espacio de conjuro de nivel 6 o superior, el daño aumenta en 1d8 por cada nivel de espacio por encima del 5º.
material: Un pequeño cono de cristal o vidrio.

name: Cone of Cold
desc: Frigid frío blasts from your hands. cada criatura in the area recibe 8d8 daño de frío. criaturas killed by this spell become frozen statues until they thaw.
higher_level: el daño increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 5th.

name: Confound Senses
desc:
This spell befuddles the minds of up to six criaturas that you can see within range, causing the criaturas to see images of shifting terrain. Each objetivo that fails an tirada de salvación de Inteligencia is reduced to half Velocidad until the spell ends because of confusion over its surroundings, and it makes ataque a distancia rolls with desventaja.

Affected criaturas also find it impossible to keep track of their location. They automatically fail Sabiduría (Supervivencia) checks to avoid getting lost. Whenever an affected criatura must choose between one or more paths, it chooses at random and immediately forgets which direction it came from.
material: a broken compass

name: Confusion
desc:
Este conjuro asalta y distorsiona la mente de las criaturas, generando delirios y provocando acciones incontroladas. Cada criatura en una esfera de 3m de radio centrada en un punto que elijas dentro del alcance debe superar una tirada de salvación de Sabiduría cuando lanzas este conjuro o quedará afectada por él.

Un objetivo afectado no puede realizar reacciones y debe tirar 1d10 al comienzo de cada uno de sus turnos para determinar su comportamiento durante ese turno.

| d10 | Comportamiento |
|---|---|
| 1 | La criatura usa todo su movimiento para desplazarse en una dirección aleatoria. Para determinar la dirección, tira 1d8 y asigna una dirección a cada cara del dado. La criatura no realiza ninguna acción este turno. |
| 2-6 | La criatura no se mueve ni realiza acciones este turno. |
| 7-8 | La criatura usa su acción para realizar un ataque cuerpo a cuerpo contra una criatura determinada al azar que esté a su alcance. Si no hay ninguna criatura a su alcance, la criatura no hace nada este turno. |
| 9-10 | La criatura puede actuar y moverse con normalidad. |

Al final de cada uno de sus turnos, un objetivo afectado puede realizar una tirada de salvación de Sabiduría. Si la supera, el efecto termina para ese objetivo.
higher_level: Cuando lanzas este conjuro usando un espacio de conjuro de nivel 5 o superior, el radio de la esfera aumenta 1.5m por cada nivel de espacio por encima del 4º.
material: Tres cáscaras de nuez.

name: Confusion
desc: You assault the minds of your objetivos, filling them with delusions and making them confused until the spell ends. On a successful tirada de salvación, a objetivo is rattled for 1 ronda. At the end of each of its turns, a confused objetivo makes a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría to end the spell's effects on it.
higher_level: The spell's area increases by 5 pies for each slot level above 4th.

name: Conjure Animals
desc:
Invocas espíritus feéricos que toman la forma de bestias y aparecen en espacios desocupados que puedas ver dentro del alcance. Elige una de las siguientes opciones para lo que aparece:
- Una bestia de valor de desafío 2 o inferior
- Dos bestias de valor de desafío 1 o inferior
- Cuatro bestias de valor de desafío 1/2 o inferior
- Ocho bestias de valor de desafío 1/4 o inferior
- Cada bestia también se considera feérica y desaparece cuando cae a 0 puntos de golpe o cuando el conjuro termina. Las criaturas invocadas son aliadas tuyas y de tus compañeros. Tira la iniciativa para las criaturas invocadas como grupo, que tiene sus propios turnos. Obedecen cualquier orden verbal que les des (sin que tú necesites gastar ninguna acción). Si no les das ninguna orden, se defienden de las criaturas hostiles, pero no realizan ninguna otra acción. El DM dispone de las estadísticas de las criaturas.
higher_level: Cuando lanzas este conjuro usando ciertos espacios de conjuro de nivel superior, eliges una de las opciones de invocación anteriores y aparecen más criaturas: el doble con un espacio de nivel 5, el triple con uno de nivel 7 y el cuádruple con uno de nivel 9.

name: Conjure Animals
desc:
You summon forth the spirit of a beast that recibe the physical form of your choosing in unoccupied spaces you can see.

Choose one of the following:

* One beast of CR 2 or less
* Two beasts of CR 1 or less
* Three beasts of CR 1/2 or less

 Beasts summoned this way are allied to you and your companions. While it is within 60 pies you can use a acción adicional to mentally command a summoned beast. When you command multiple beasts using this spell, you must give them all the same command. You may decide the action the beast recibe and where it moves during its next turn, or you can issue a general command, such as guarding an area. If not given a command, a conjured beast only defends itself.
higher_level: The challenge rating of beasts you can summon increases by one step for each slot level above 3rd. For example, when using a 4th-level espacio de conjuro you can summon one beast of CR 3 or less, two beasts of CR 2 or less, or three beasts of CR 1 or less.

name: Conjure Celestial
desc: Invocas un celestial de valor de desafío 4 o inferior, que aparece en un espacio desocupado que puedas ver dentro del alcance. El celestial desaparece cuando cae a 0 puntos de golpe o cuando el conjuro termina. El celestial es aliado tuyo y de tus compañeros durante la duración. Tira la iniciativa para el celestial, que tiene sus propios turnos. Obedece cualquier orden verbal que le des (sin que tú necesites gastar ninguna acción), siempre que dichas órdenes no vayan en contra de su alineamiento. Si no le das ninguna orden al celestial, se defiende de las criaturas hostiles, pero no realiza ninguna otra acción. El DM dispone de las estadísticas del celestial.
higher_level: Cuando lanzas este conjuro usando un espacio de conjuro de nivel 9, invocas un celestial de valor de desafío 5 o inferior.

name: Conjure Celestial
desc:
You summon a criatura from the realms Celestial.

This criatura uses the statistics of a Celestial criatura (detailed below) with certain traits determined by your choice of its type: an angel of battle, angel of protection, or angel of vengeance.

The criatura is friendly to you and your companions and recibe its turn immediately after yours.

It obeys your verbal commands. Without such commands, the criatura only defends itself.

The criatura disappears when reduced to 0 puntos de golpe. If your Concentración is broken before the spell ends, you lose control of the Celestial criatura, which becomes hostile and might attack you and your companions. An uncontrolled criatura disappears 1 hora after you summoned it.
higher_level: For each slot level above 7th the Celestial criatura's AC increases by 1, its puntos de golpe increase by 10, and when it causa damage with an attack it causa 1d4 extra damage.

name: Conjure Construct
desc:
You summon a construct of challenge rating 5 or lower to harry your foes. It appears in an unoccupied space you can see within range. It disappears when it drops to 0 puntos de golpe or when the spell ends.
  The construct is friendly to you and your companions for the duration. Roll initiative for the construct, which has its own turns. It obeys any verbal commands that you issue to it (no action required by you). If you don't issue any commands to the construct, it defends itself from hostile criaturas but otherwise recibe no actions.
  If your Concentración is broken, the construct doesn't disappear. Instead, you lose control of the construct, it becomes hostile toward you and your companions, and it might attack. An uncontrolled construct can't be dismissed by you, and it disappears 1 hora after you summoned it.
  The construct causa double damage to objects and structures.
  The GM has the construct's statistics.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 7th level or higher, the challenge rating increases by 1 for each slot level above 6th.

name: Conjure Elemental
desc: Llamas a un servidor elemental. Elige un área de aire, tierra, fuego o agua que ocupe un cubo de 3m dentro del alcance. Un elemental de valor de desafío 5 o inferior apropiado para el área elegida aparece en un espacio desocupado a 3m o menos de dicha área. Por ejemplo, un elemental de fuego emerge de una hoguera, y un elemental de tierra surge del suelo. El elemental desaparece cuando cae a 0 puntos de golpe o cuando el conjuro termina. El elemental es aliado tuyo y de tus compañeros durante la duración. Tira la iniciativa para el elemental, que tiene sus propios turnos. Obedece cualquier orden verbal que le des (sin que tú necesites gastar ninguna acción). Si no le das ninguna orden al elemental, se defiende de las criaturas hostiles, pero no realiza ninguna otra acción. Si tu concentración se interrumpe, el elemental no desaparece. En cambio, pierdes el control sobre él, se vuelve hostil hacia ti y tus compañeros, y podría atacaros. Un elemental fuera de control no puede ser disipado por ti, y desaparece 1 hora después de que lo invocaras. El DM dispone de las estadísticas del elemental.
higher_level: Cuando lanzas este conjuro usando un espacio de conjuro de nivel 6 o superior, el valor de desafío aumenta en 1 por cada nivel de espacio por encima del 5º.
material: Incienso ardiendo para el aire, arcilla blanda para la tierra, azufre y fósforo para el fuego, o agua y arena para el agua.

name: Conjure Elemental
desc:
You summon a criatura from the Elemental Planes. This criatura uses the statistics of a conjured elemental criatura (detailed below) with certain traits determined by your choice of its type: air, earth, fuego, or water.

The criatura is friendly to you and your companions and recibe its turn immediately after yours.

It obeys your verbal commands. Without such commands, the criatura only defends itself.

The criatura disappears when reduced to 0 puntos de golpe. If your Concentración is broken before the spell ends, you lose control of the elemental criatura, which becomes hostile and might attack you and your companions. An uncontrolled criatura disappears 1 hora after you summoned it.
higher_level: For each slot level above 5th the elemental criatura's AC increases by 1, its puntos de golpe increase by 10, and when it causa damage with an attack it causa 1d4 extra damage.

name: Conjure Fey
desc: Invocas una criatura feérica de índice de desafío 6 o inferior, o un espíritu feérico que adopta la forma de una bestia de índice de desafío 6 o inferior. Aparece en un espacio desocupado que puedas ver dentro del alcance. La criatura feérica desaparece cuando cae a 0 puntos de golpe o cuando el conjuro termina. La criatura feérica es amistosa contigo y con tus compañeros durante la duración. Tira la iniciativa para la criatura, que tiene sus propios turnos. Obedece cualquier orden verbal que le des (sin que requiera ninguna acción por tu parte), siempre que no viole su alineamiento. Si no le das ninguna orden a la criatura feérica, se defenderá de las criaturas hostiles, pero no realizará ninguna otra acción. Si tu concentración se interrumpe, la criatura feérica no desaparece. En cambio, pierdes el control sobre ella, se vuelve hostil hacia ti y tus compañeros, y podría atacarte. Una criatura feérica fuera de control no puede ser despedida por ti, y desaparece 1 hora después de haberla invocado. El DM dispone de las estadísticas de la criatura feérica.
higher_level: Cuando lanzas este conjuro usando un espacio de conjuro de nivel 7 o superior, el índice de desafío aumenta en 1 por cada nivel de espacio por encima del 6.º.

name: Conjure Fey
desc:
You summon a criatura from The Dreaming.

This criatura uses the statistics of a fey criatura (detailed below) with certain traits determined by your choice of its type: hag, hound, or redcap.

The criatura is friendly to you and your companions and recibe its turn immediately after yours.

It obeys your verbal commands. Without such commands, the criatura only defends itself.

The summoned criatura disappears when reduced to 0 puntos de golpe. If your Concentración is broken before the spell ends, you lose control of the summoned criatura, which becomes hostile and might attack you and your companions.
