Additionally, when a criatura within 30 pies uses a Bardic Inspiration die, you may choose to reroll the die after it is rolled but before the outcome is determined.

You cannot cast another spell through your spellcasting focus while concentrating on this spell.

name: Harry
desc:
You instill an irresistible sense of insecurity and terror in the objetivo. The objetivo debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría. en una salvación fallida, the objetivo has desventaja on Destreza (Sigilo) checks to avoid your notice and is asustado of you while you are within its line of sight. While you are within 1 milla of the objetivo, you have ventaja on Sabiduría (Supervivencia) checks to track the objetivo, and the objetivo can't take a descanso largo, terrified you are just around the corner. The objetivo can repeat the tirada de salvación once every 10 minutos, ending the spell en un éxito.
  en una salvación exitosa, the objetivo isn't affected, and you can't use this spell against it again for 24 horas.
higher_level: When you cast this spell with a 6th-level espacio de conjuro, the duration is Concentración, up to 8 horas and the objetivo can repeat the tirada de salvación once each hora. When you use a espacio de conjuro of 8th level or higher, the duration is Concentración, up to 24 horas, and the objetivo can repeat the tirada de salvación every 8 horas.
material: a bit of fur from a game animal
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Ranger, Sorceror, Wizard

name: Harrying Hounds
desc:
When you cast this spell, choose a direction (north, south, northeast, or the like). cada criatura in a 20-pie-radius sphere centered on a point you choose within range debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría when you cast this spell or be affected by it. When an affected criatura travels, it travels at a fast pace in the opposite direction of the direction you chose as it believes a pack of dogs or wolves follows it from the chosen direction.
  When an affected criatura isn't traveling, it is asustado of your chosen direction. The affected criatura occasionally hears howls or sees glowing eyes in the darkness at the edge of its vision in that direction. An affected criatura will not stop at a destination, instead pacing half-circles around the destination until the effect ends, terrified the pack will overcome it if it stops moving.
  An affected criatura can make a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría at the end of each 4-hora period, ending the effect on itself en un éxito. An affected criatura moves along the safest available route unless it has nowhere to move, such as if it arrives at the edge of a cliff. When an affected criatura can't safely move in the opposite direction of your chosen direction, it cowers in place, defending itself from hostile criaturas but otherwise taking no actions. In such circumstances, the affected criatura can repeat the tirada de salvación every minuto, ending the effect on itself en un éxito. The spell's effect is suspended when an affected criatura is engaged in combat, allowing it to move as necessary to face hostile criaturas.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 6th level or higher, the duration increases by 4 horas for each slot level above 5th. If an affected criatura travels for more than 8 horas, it risks agotamiento as if on a forced march.
material: a tuft of fur from a hunting dog

name: Harsh Light of Summer’s Glare
desc: You emit a burst of brilliant ligera, which bears down oppressively upon todas las criaturas within range that can see you. criaturas with visión en la oscuridad that fail a tirada de salvación de Constitución are cegado and aturdido. criaturas without visión en la oscuridad that fail a tirada de salvación de Constitución are cegado. This is not a gaze attack, and it cannot be avoided by averting one’s eyes or wearing a blindfold.

name: Haste
desc: Elige una criatura voluntaria que puedas ver dentro del alcance. Hasta que el conjuro termine, la velocidad del objetivo se duplica, obtiene un bonificador de +2 a la CA, tiene ventaja en las tiradas de salvación de destreza y gana una acción adicional en cada uno de sus turnos. Esa acción solo puede utilizarse para realizar las acciones de Atacar (únicamente un ataque con arma), Correr, Desenganchar, Esconderse o Usar un objeto. Cuando el conjuro termina, el objetivo no puede moverse ni realizar acciones hasta después de su siguiente turno, mientras una oleada de letargo se apodera de él.
material: Una viruta de raíz de regaliz.

name: Haste
desc:
Until the spell ends, the objetivo's Velocidad is doubled, it gains a +2 bonus to AC, it has ventaja on Destreza tirada de salvacións, and it gains one additional action on each of its turns. This action can be used to make a single weapon attack, or to take the Dash, Disengage, Hide, or Use an Object action.

When the spell ends, the objetivo is tired and cannot move or take actions until after its next turn.
higher_level: objetivo one additional criatura for each slot level above 3rd. All objetivos of this spell must be within 30 pies of each other.

name: Heal
desc: Elige una criatura que puedas ver dentro del alcance. Una oleada de energía positiva recorre a la criatura, haciendo que recupere 70 puntos de golpe. Este conjuro también pone fin a la ceguera, la sordera y cualquier enfermedad que afecte al objetivo. Este conjuro no tiene efecto sobre constructos ni no-muertos.
higher_level: Cuando lanzas este conjuro usando un espacio de conjuro de nivel 7 o superior, la cantidad de curación aumenta en 10 por cada nivel de espacio por encima del 6.º.

name: Heal
desc: A torrent of healing energy suffuses the objetivo and it regains 70 puntos de golpe. The spell also ends blindness, deafness, and any diseases afflicting the objetivo.
higher_level: The puntos de golpe regained increase by 10 for each slot level above 6th.

name: Healing Word
desc: Una criatura de tu elección que puedas ver dentro del alcance recupera puntos de golpe iguales a 1d4 + tu modificador de característica de lanzamiento de conjuros. Este conjuro no tiene efecto sobre no-muertos ni constructos.
higher_level: Cuando lanzas este conjuro usando un espacio de conjuro de nivel 2 o superior, la curación aumenta en 1d4 por cada nivel de espacio por encima del 1.º.

name: Healing Word
desc: Healing energy washes over the objetivo and it regains puntos de golpe equal to 1d4 + your spellcasting modifier.
higher_level: The puntos de golpe regained increase by 1d4 for each slot level above 1st.

name: Heart of Dis
desc:
You magically replace your heart with one forged on the second layer of Hell. While the spell lasts, you are immune to fear and can't be envenenado, and you are immune to fuego and daño de veneno. You gain resistance to daño de frío, as well as to contundente, perforante, and daño cortante from no mágico weapons that aren't silvered. You have ventaja on tirada de salvacións against spells and other mágico effects. Finally, while you are conscious, any criatura hostile to you that starts its turn within 20 pies of you debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría. en una salvación fallida, the criatura is asustado of you until the start of your next turn. en un éxito, the criatura is immune to the effect for 24 horas.

Casting this spell magically transports your mortal heart to the lair of one of the lords of Hell. The heart returns to your body when the spell ends. If you die while under the effects of this spell, you can't be brought back to life until your original heart is retrieved.

name: Heart to Heart
desc: For the duration, you and the criatura you touch remain stable and inconsciente if reduced to 0 puntos de golpe while the other has 1 or more puntos de golpe. If you touch a dying criatura, it becomes stable but remains inconsciente while it has 0 puntos de golpe. If both of you are reduced to 0 puntos de golpe, you must both make death tirada de salvacións, as normal. If you or the objetivo regain puntos de golpe, either of you can choose to split those puntos de golpe between the two of you if both of you are within 60 pies of each other.
material: a drop of your blood

name: Heart-Seeking Arrow
desc: The next time you make a ataque a distancia con arma during the spell's duration, the weapon's munición—or the weapon itself if it's a arrojadiza weapon—seeks its objetivo's vital organs. Make the tirada de ataque as normal. On a hit, the weapon causa an extra 6d6 damage of the same type dealt by the weapon, or half as much damage on a miss as it streaks unerringly toward its objetivo. If this attack reduces the objetivo to 0 puntos de golpe, the objetivo has desventaja on its next death tirada de salvación, and, if it dies, it can be restored to life only by means of a true resurrection or a wish spell. This spell has no effect on undead or constructs.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 5th level or higher, the extra damage on a hit increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 4th.

name: Heartache
desc: You fuerza an enemigo to experience pangs of unrequited love and emotional distress. These feelings manifest with such intensity that the criatura recibe 5d6 daño psíquico on a failed tirada de salvación de Carisma, or half el daño en una salvación exitosa.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 3rd level or higher, you can objetivo an additional enemigo for each slot level above 2nd.
material: a silver locket

name: Hearth Charm
desc: This spell makes flammable material burn twice as long as normal.

name: Heartstop
desc: You slow the beating of a willing objetivo’s heart to the rate of one beat per minuto. The criatura’s breathing almost stops. To a casual or brief observer, the subject appears dead. At the end of the spell, the criatura returns to normal with no ill effects.

name: Heartstrike
desc: The spirits of ancient archers carry your missiles straight to their objetivos. You have ventaja on ranged weapon attacks until the start of your next turn, and you can ignore penalties for your enemigos having half cover or three-quarters cover, and for an area being lightly obscured, when making those attacks.
material: an arrow, bolt, or other missile

name: Heat Metal
desc: Elige un objeto de metal manufacturado, como un arma de metal o una armadura de metal mediana o pesada, que puedas ver dentro del alcance. Haces que el objeto se ponga al rojo vivo. Cualquier criatura en contacto físico con el objeto recibe 2d8 de daño de fuego cuando lanzas el conjuro. Hasta que el conjuro termine, puedes usar una acción adicional en cada uno de tus turnos posteriores para volver a infligir este daño. Si una criatura sostiene o lleva puesto el objeto y recibe el daño, debe superar una tirada de salvación de constitución o soltar el objeto si puede. Si no lo suelta, tiene desventaja en las tiradas de ataque y en las pruebas de característica hasta el inicio de tu siguiente turno.
higher_level: Cuando lanzas este conjuro usando un espacio de conjuro de nivel 3 o superior, el daño aumenta en 1d8 por cada nivel de espacio por encima del 2.º.
material: Un trozo de hierro y una llama.

name: Heat Metal
desc: The objetivo becomes oven hot. Any criatura touching the objetivo recibe 2d8 daño de fuego when the spell is cast. Until the spell ends, on subsequent turns you can use a acción adicional to inflict the same damage. If a criatura is holding or wearing the objetivo and suffers damage, it makes a tirada de salvación de Constitución or it drops the objetivo. If a criatura does not or cannot drop the objetivo, it has desventaja on attack rolls and ability checks until the start of your next turn.
higher_level: el daño increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 2nd.

name: Heavenly Crown
desc: A glowing, golden crown appears on your head and sheds dim ligera in a 30-pie radius. When you cast the spell (and as a acción adicional on subsequent turns, until the spell ends), you can objetivo one willing criatura within 30 pies of you that you can see. If the objetivo can hear you, it can use its reacción to make one ataque cuerpo a cuerpo con arma and then move up to half its Velocidad, or vice versa.
material: a small golden crown worth 50 gp

name: Hedgehog Dozen
desc: Eleven illusory duplicates of the touched criatura appear in its space. A criatura affected by hedgehog dozen seems to have a dozen arms, shields, and weapons-a swarm of partially overlapping, identical criaturas. Until the spell ends, these duplicates move with the objetivo and mimic its actions, shifting position so it's impossible to track which image is real. You can use your action to dismiss the illusory duplicates. While surrounded by duplicates, a criatura gains ventaja against any opponent because of the bewildering number of weapons and movements. Each time a criatura objetivos you with an attack during the spell's duration, roll a d8 to determine whether the attack instead objetivos one of your duplicates. On a roll of 1, it strikes you. On any other roll it removes one of your duplicates; when you have only five duplicates remaining, the spell ends. A criatura is unaffected by this spell if it can't see, if it relies on senses other than sight, such as vista ciega, or if it can perceive illusions as false as with vista verdadera.

name: Hedren’s Birds of Clay
desc: You create a number of clay pigeons equal to 1d4 + your spellcasting modifier (minimum of one) that swirl around you. When you are the objetivo of a ataque a distancia con arma or a ranged ataque de conjuro and before the tirada de ataque is made, you can use your reacción to shout “Pull!” When you do, one clay pigeon maneuvers to block the incoming attack. If the tirada de ataque is less than 10 + your competencia bonus, the attack misses. Otherwise, make a check with your spellcasting ability modifier and compare it to the tirada de ataque. If your roll is higher, the attack is intercepted and has no effect. Regardless of whether the attack is intercepted, one clay pigeon is expended. The spell ends when the last clay pigeon is used.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 4th level or higher, add 1 to your to your roll for each slot level above 3rd when determining if an attack misses or when making a check to intercept the attack.
material: a clay figurine shaped like a bird

name: Hellforging
desc: Deep Magic: clockwork You spend an hora calling forth a disembodied evil spirit. At the end of that time, the summoned spirit debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Carisma. If the tirada de salvación succeeds, you take 2d10 daño psíquico plus 2d10 daño necrótico from waves of uncontrolled energy rippling out from the disembodied spirit. You can maintain the spell, forcing the subject to repeat the tirada de salvación at the end of each of your turns, with the same consequence to you for each failure. If you choose not to maintain the spell or are unable to do so, the evil spirit returns to its place of torment and cannot be recalled. If the tirada de salvación fails, the summoned spirit is transferred into the waiting soul gem and immediately animates the constructed body. The subject is now a hellforged; it loses all of its previous racial traits and gains gearforged traits except as follows: Vulnerability: Hellforged are vulnerable to daño radiante. Evil Mind: Hellforged have desventaja on tirada de salvacións against spells and abilities of evil fiends or aberrations that effect the mind or behavior. Past Life: The hellforged retains only a vague sense of who it was in its former existence, but these memories are enough for it to gain competencia in one skill. Languages: Hellforged speak Común, Machine Speech, and Infernal or Abisal Up to four other spellcasters of at least 5th level can assist you in the ritual. Each assistant increases the CD of the tirada de salvación de Carisma by 1. In the event of a failed tirada de salvación, the spellcaster and each assistant take damage. An assistant who drops out of the casting can't rejoin.

name: Hellish Rebuke
desc: Señalas con el dedo y la criatura que te ha dañado queda momentáneamente envuelta en llamas infernales. La criatura debe realizar una tirada de salvación de Destreza. Sufre 2d10 de daño por fuego si falla la tirada, o la mitad de ese daño si tiene éxito.
higher_level: Cuando lanzas este conjuro usando un espacio de conjuro de nivel 2 o superior, el daño aumenta en 1d10 por cada nivel de espacio por encima del 1.º.
casting_time: 1 reaction, which you take in response to being damaged by a creature within 60 feet of you that you can see

name: Hematomancy
desc:
You can learn information about a criatura whose blood you possess. The objetivo debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría. If the objetivo knows you’re casting the spell, it can fail the tirada de salvación voluntarily if it wants you to learn the information. en una salvación exitosa, the objetivo isn’t affected, and you can’t use this spell against it again for 24 horas. en una salvación fallida, or if the blood belongs to a dead criatura, you learn the following information:
* The objetivo’s most Común name (if any).
* The objetivo’s criatura type (and subtype, if any), gender, and which of its ability scores is highest (though not the exact numerical score).
* The objetivo’s current status (alive, dead, sick, wounded, healthy, etc.).
* The circumstances of the objetivo shedding the blood you’re holding (bleeding wound, splatter from an attack, how long ago it was shed, etc.).
Alternatively, you can forgo all of the above information and instead use the blood as a beacon to track the objetivo. For 1 hora, as long as you are on the same plane of existence as the criatura, you know the direction and distance to the objetivo’s location at the time you cast this spell. While moving toward the location, if you are presented with a choice of paths, the spell automatically indicates which path provides the shortest and most direct route to the location.
material: a drop of a criatura’s blood

name: Hero's Steel
desc: You infuse the metal of a melee weapon you touch with the fearsome aura of a mighty hero. The weapon’s wielder has ventaja on Carisma (Intimidación) checks made while aggressively brandishing the weapon. In addition, an opponent that currently has 30 or fewer puntos de golpe and is struck by the weapon debe realizar a successful tirada de salvación de Carisma or be aturdido for 1 ronda. If the criatura has more than 30 puntos de golpe but fewer than the weapon’s wielder currently has, it becomes asustado instead; a asustado criatura repeats the tirada de salvación at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself en una salvación exitosa. A criatura that succeeds on the tirada de salvación is immune to castings of this spell on the same weapon for 24 horas.
material: a warrior's amulet worth 5 gp

name: Heroes' Feast
desc: Convocas un gran banquete con magníficos alimentos y bebidas. El festín tarda 1 hora en consumirse y desaparece al final de ese tiempo; los efectos beneficiosos no surten efecto hasta que transcurre dicha hora. Hasta doce criaturas pueden participar del banquete. Una criatura que participe en él obtiene varios beneficios: queda curada de todas las enfermedades y venenos, se vuelve inmune al veneno y a la condición de asustado, y realiza todas las tiradas de salvación de Sabiduría con ventaja. Además, su máximo de puntos de golpe aumenta en 2d10 y gana esa misma cantidad de puntos de golpe. Estos beneficios duran 24 horas.
material: Un cuenco incrustado de gemas con un valor mínimo de 1.000 po, que el conjuro consume.

name: Heroes' Feast
desc:
The spell summons forth a sumptuous feast with a cuisine of your choosing that provides 1 Supply for a number of criaturas equal to twice your competencia bonus. Consuming the food recibe 1 hora and leaves a criatura feeling nourished—it immediately makes a tirada de salvación with ventaja against any disease or veneno it is suffering from, and it is cured of any effect that frightens it.

For up to 24 horas afterward the feast's participants have ventaja on Sabiduría tirada de salvacións, ventaja on tirada de salvacións made against disease and veneno, resistance against damage from veneno and disease, and each increases its punto de golpe maximum by 2d10.

name: Heroism
desc: Una criatura voluntaria que tocas queda imbuida de valentía. Mientras el conjuro esté activo, la criatura es inmune a la condición de asustado y obtiene puntos de golpe temporales iguales a tu modificador de característica de lanzamiento de conjuros al comienzo de cada uno de sus turnos. Cuando el conjuro termina, el objetivo pierde los puntos de golpe temporales que le resten de este conjuro.

name: Heroism
desc: The objetivo's spirit is bolstered. Until the spell ends, the objetivo gains temporary puntos de golpe equal to your spellcasting ability modifier at the start of each of its turns and it cannot be asustado. Any temporary puntos de golpe remaining are lost when the spell ends.
higher_level: objetivo one additional criatura for each slot level above 1st.

name: Hide in One’s Shadow
desc:
When you touch a willing criatura with a piece of charcoal while casting this spell, the objetivo and everything it carries blends into and becomes part of the objetivo’s shadow, which remains discernible, although its body seems to disappear. The shadow is incorporeal, has no weight, and is immune to all but psíquico and daño radiante. The objetivo remains aware of its surroundings and can move, but only as a shadow could move—flowing along surfaces as if the criatura were moving normally. The criatura can step out of the shadow at will, resuming its physical shape in the shadow’s space and ending the spell.

This spell cannot be cast in an area devoid of ligera, where a shadow would not normally appear. Even a faint ligera source, such as moonlight or starlight, is sufficient. If that ligera source is removed, or if the shadow is flooded with ligera in such a way that the physical criatura wouldn’t cast a shadow, the spell ends and the criatura reappears in the shadow’s space.
material: charcoal

name: Hideous Laughter
desc: Una criatura de tu elección que puedas ver dentro del alcance percibe todo como absurdamente gracioso y cae presa de ataques de risa si el conjuro la afecta. El objetivo debe superar una tirada de salvación de Sabiduría o caerá derribado, quedando incapacitado e incapaz de ponerse en pie durante la duración. Una criatura con una puntuación de Inteligencia de 4 o menos no se ve afectada. Al final de cada uno de sus turnos, y cada vez que reciba daño, el objetivo puede realizar una nueva tirada de salvación de Sabiduría. Si la tirada es provocada por daño, el objetivo la realiza con ventaja. Si tiene éxito, el conjuro termina.
material: Pequeñas tartaletas y una pluma que se agita en el aire.

name: Hideous Laughter
desc:
The objetivo is overwhelmed by the absurdity of the world and is crippled by paroxysms of laughter. The objetivo falls derribado, becomes incapacitado, and cannot stand.

Until the spell ends, at the end of each of the objetivo's turns and when it suffers damage, the objetivo may attempt another tirada de salvación (with ventaja if triggered by damage). en una salvación exitosa, the spell ends.
higher_level: objetivo an additional criatura within 30 pies of the original for each slot level above 1st.

name: High Ground
desc:
With a word, you gesture across an area and cause the terrain to rise up into a 10-pie-tall hillock at a point you choose within range. You must be outdoors to cast this spell. The hillock is up to 30 pies long and up to 15 pies wide, and it must be in a line. If the hillock cuts through a criatura's space when it appears, the criatura is pushed to one side of the hillock or to the top of the hillock (your choice). The ataque a distancia distance for a criatura on top of the hillock is doubled, provided the objetivo is at a lower elevation than the criatura on the hillock. At the GM's discretion, criaturas on top of the hillock gain any additional bonuses or penalties that higher elevation might provide, such as ventaja on attacks against those on lower elevations, being easier to spot, longer sight distance, or similar.
  The steep sides of the hillock are difficult to climb. A criatura at the bottom of the hillock that attempts to move up to the top debe tener éxito en a Fuerza (Atletismo) or Destreza (Acrobacias) check against your CD de salvación del conjuro to climb to the top of the hillock.
  This spell can't manipulate stone construction, and rocks and structures shift to accommodate the hillock. If the hillock's formation would make a structure unstable, the hillock fails to form in the structure's spaces. Similarly, this spell doesn't directly affect plant growth. The hillock carries any plants along with it.
higher_level: When you cast this spell at 4th level or higher, you can increase the width of the hillock by 5 pies or the length by 10 pies for each slot above 3rd.

name: Hirvsth's Call
desc: Deep Magic: Rothenian You summon a spectral herd of ponies to drag off a criatura that you can see in range. The objetivo must be no bigger than Large and debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Destreza. en una salvación exitosa, the spell has no effect. en una salvación fallida, a spectral rope wraps around the objetivo and pulls it 60 pies in a direction of your choosing as the herd races off. The ponies continue running in the chosen direction for the duration of the spell but will alter course to avoid impassable obstacles. Once you choose the direction, you cannot change it. The ponies ignore difficult terrain and are immune to damage. The objetivo is derribado and immobilized but can use its action to make a Fuerza or Destreza check against your spell CD to escape the spectral bindings. The objetivo recibe 1d6 daño contundente for every 20 pies it is dragged by the ponies. The herd moves 60 pies each ronda at the beginning of your turn.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 5th level or higher, one additional criatura can be objetivoed for each slot level above 4th.

name: Hoarfrost
desc: A melee weapon you are holding is imbued with frío. For the duration, a rime of frost covers the weapon and ligera vapor rises from it if the temperature is above freezing. The weapon becomes mágico and causa an extra 1d4 daño de frío on a successful hit. The spell ends after 1 minuto, or earlier if you make a successful attack with the weapon or let go of it.
higher_level: The spell’s damage increases by 1d4 when you alcance 5th level (2d4), 11th level (3d4), and 17th level (4d4).
material: a melee weapon

name: Hobble
desc: You create an ethereal trap in the space of a criatura you can see within range. The objetivo debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Destreza or its Velocidad is halved until the end of its next turn.
material: a broken rabbit’s pie
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Sorcerer, Warlock, Wizard

name: Hobble Mount
desc:
When you cast **hobble mount** as a successful melee ataque de conjuro against a horse, wolf, or other four-legged or two-legged beast being ridden as a mount, that beast is disabled so that it can’t move at its normal Velocidad without incurring injury. An affected criatura that moves more than half its base Velocidad in a turn recibe 2d6 daño contundente.

This spell has no effect on a criatura that your GM deems to not be a mount.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 2nd level or higher, el daño increases by 2d6 for each slot level above 1st.
dnd_class: Cleric, Druid, Paladin, Ranger, Warlock, Wizard

name: Hod's Gift
desc: The objetivo gains vista ciega to a range of 60 pies.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 6th level or higher, the duration is increased by 1 hora for every slot above 5th level.

name: Hold Monster
desc: Elige una criatura que puedas ver dentro del alcance. El objetivo debe realizar una tirada de salvación de Sabiduría o quedará paralizado durante la duración del conjuro. Este conjuro no tiene efecto contra los no muertos. Al final de cada uno de sus turnos, el objetivo puede realizar una nueva tirada de salvación de Sabiduría. Si tiene éxito, el conjuro termina para esa criatura.
higher_level: Cuando lanzas este conjuro usando un espacio de conjuro de nivel 6 o superior, puedes tener como objetivo una criatura adicional por cada nivel de espacio por encima del 5.º. Las criaturas deben encontrarse a 9 m o menos entre sí en el momento en que las selecciones como objetivo.
material: Un pequeño trozo de hierro.
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Paladin, Sorcerer, Warlock, Wizard

name: Hold Monster
desc: The objetivo is paralizado. At the end of each of its turns, the objetivo makes another tirada de salvación, ending the spell's effects on it en una salvación exitosa.
higher_level: objetivo an additional criatura within 30 pies of the first objetivo for each slot level above 5th.

name: Hold Person
desc: Elige a un humanoide que puedas ver dentro del alcance. El objetivo debe superar una tirada de salvación de Sabiduría o quedará paralizado durante la duración del hechizo. Al final de cada uno de sus turnos, el objetivo puede realizar otra tirada de salvación de Sabiduría. Si tiene éxito, el hechizo termina sobre el objetivo.
higher_level: Cuando lanzas este hechizo usando un espacio de hechizo de nivel 3 o superior, puedes elegir un humanoide adicional por cada nivel de espacio por encima del 2.º. Los humanoides deben estar a no más de 9m entre sí en el momento en que los elijas como objetivo.
material: Un trozo pequeño y recto de hierro.
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Paladin, Sorcerer, Warlock, Wizard

name: Hold Person
desc: The objetivo is paralizado. At the end of each of its turns, the objetivo makes another tirada de salvación, ending the spell's effects on it en una salvación exitosa.
higher_level: objetivo an additional criatura within 30 pies of the first objetivo for each slot level above 2nd.
dnd_class: Artificer, Bard, Cleric, Druid, Sorcerer, Warlock, Wizard

name: Holy Aura
desc: Una luz divina emana de ti y se condensa en una suave resplandor en un radio de 9m a tu alrededor. Las criaturas de tu elección que se encuentren en ese radio cuando lanzas este hechizo emiten luz tenue en un radio de 1.5m, tienen ventaja en todas las tiradas de salvación, y otras criaturas tienen desventaja en las tiradas de ataque contra ellas hasta que el hechizo termine. Además, cuando un demonio o un no muerto impacta a una criatura afectada con un ataque cuerpo a cuerpo, el aura destella con una luz brillante. El atacante debe superar una tirada de salvación de Constitución o quedará cegado hasta que el hechizo termine.
material: Una pequeña reliquia valorada en al menos 1.000 po que contenga una reliquia sagrada, como un trozo de tela de la túnica de un santo o un fragmento de pergamino de un texto religioso.

name: Holy Aura
desc: Holy radiance emanates from you and fills the area. objetivos shed dim ligera in a 5-pie radius and have ventaja on tirada de salvacións. Attacks made against a objetivo have desventaja. When a fiend or undead hits a objetivo, the aura erupts into blinding ligera, forcing the attacker to make a tirada de salvación de Constitución or be cegado until the spell ends.

name: Holy Ground
desc: You invoke divine powers to bless the ground within 60 pies of you. criaturas slain in the affected area cannot be raised as undead by magic or by the abilities of monsters, even if the corpse is later removed from the area. Any spell of 4th level or lower that would summon or animate undead within the area fails automatically. Such spells cast with espacios de conjuro of 5th level or higher function normally.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 6th level or higher, the level of spells that are prevented from functioning increases by 1 for each slot level above 5th.
material: a vial of holy water that is consumed in the casting

name: Hone Blade
desc: You magically sharpen the edge of any bladed weapon or object you are touching. The objetivo weapon gets a +1 bonus to damage on its next successful hit.
material: a chip of whetstone or lodestone

name: Hunger of Leng
desc:
You curse a criatura that you can see in range with an insatiable, ghoulish appetite. If it has a digestive system, the criatura debe realizar a successful tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or be compelled to consume the flesh of living criaturas for the duration.

The objetivo gains a bite attack and moves to and attacks the closest criatura that isn’t an undead or a construct. The objetivo is proficient with the bite, and it adds its Fuerza modifier to the attack and damage rolls. el daño is perforante and el daño die is a d4. If the objetivo is larger than Medium, its damage die increases by 1d4 for each size category it is above Medium. In addition, the objetivo has ventaja on ataque cuerpo a cuerpo rolls against any criatura that doesn’t have all of its puntos de golpe.

If there isn’t a viable criatura within range for the objetivo to attack, it causa daño perforante to itself equal to 2d4 + its Fuerza modifier. The objetivo can repeat the tirada de salvación at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect en un éxito. If the objetivo has two consecutive failures, **hunger of Leng** lasts its full duration with no further tirada de salvacións allowed.
material: a pinch of salt and a drop of the caster’s blood
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Paladin, Ranger, Sorcerer, Warlock, Wizard

name: Hunter's Endurance
desc: You call on the land to sustain you as you hunt your quarry. Describe or name a criatura that is familiar to you. If you aren't familiar with the objetivo criatura, you must use a fingernail, lock of hair, bit of fur, or drop of blood from it as a material component to objetivo that criatura with this spell. Until the spell ends, you have ventaja on all Sabiduría (Percepción) and Sabiduría (Supervivencia) checks to find and track the objetivo, and you must actively pursue the objetivo as if under a geas. In addition, you don't suffer from agotamiento levels you gain from pursuing your quarry, such as from lack of rest or environmental hazards between you and the objetivo, while the spell is active. When the spell ends, you suffer from all levels of agotamiento that were suspended by the spell. The spell ends only after 24 horas, when the objetivo is dead, when the objetivo is on a different plane, or when the objetivo is apresado in your line of sight.
material: a fingernail, lock of hair, bit of fur, or drop of blood from the objetivo, if unfamiliar

name: Hunter's Mark
desc: Eliges una criatura que puedas ver dentro del alcance y la marcas místicamente como tu presa. Hasta que el hechizo termine, infiges 1d6 de daño adicional al objetivo cada vez que lo impactes con un ataque de arma, y tienes ventaja en cualquier prueba de Sabiduría (Percepción) o Sabiduría (Supervivencia) que realices para encontrarla. Si el objetivo cae a 0 puntos de golpe antes de que este hechizo termine, puedes usar una acción adicional en un turno posterior tuyo para marcar a una nueva criatura.
higher_level: Cuando lanzas este hechizo usando un espacio de hechizo de nivel 3 o 4, puedes mantener tu concentración en el hechizo durante hasta 8 horas. Cuando usas un espacio de hechizo de nivel 5 o superior, puedes mantener tu concentración en el hechizo durante hasta 24 horas.

name: Hunting Stand
desc: You make a camouflaged shelter nestled in the branches of a tree or among a collection of stones. The shelter is a 10-pie cube centered on a point within range. It can hold as many as nine Medium or smaller criaturas. The atmosphere inside the shelter is comfortable and dry, regardless of the weather outside. The shelter's camouflage provides a modicum of concealment to its inhabitants; a criatura outside the shelter has desventaja on Sabiduría (Percepción) and Inteligencia (Investigación) checks to detect or locate a criatura within the shelter.
material: a crude model of the stand

name: Hypnagogia
desc:
You alter the mental state of una criatura you can see within range. The objetivo debe realizar an tirada de salvación de Inteligencia. If it fails, choose one of the following effects. At the end of each of its turns, the objetivo can make another tirada de salvación de Inteligencia. en un éxito, the spell ends on the objetivo. A criatura with an Inteligencia score of 4 or less isn't affected by this spell.
  ***Sleep Paralysis.*** Overwhelming heaviness and fatigue overcome the criatura, slowing it. The criatura's Velocidad is halved, and it has desventaja on weapon attacks.
  ***Phantasmata.*** The criatura imagines vivid and terrifying hallucinations centered on a point of your choice within range. For the duration, the criatura is asustado, and it must take the Dash action and move away from the point you chose by the safest available route on each of its turns, unless there is nowhere to move.
  ***False Awakening.*** The criatura enters a trancelike state of consciousness in which it's not fully aware of its surroundings. It can't take reactions, and it must roll a d4 at the beginning of its turn to determine its behavior. Each time the objetivo recibe damage, it makes a new tirada de salvación de Inteligencia. en un éxito, the spell ends on the objetivo.

| d4  | Behavior  | 
|-----|-----------| 
| 1   | The criatura recibe the Dash action and uses all of its movement to move in a random direction. To determine the direction, roll a d8 and assign a direction to each die face.  | 
| 2   | The criatura uses its action to pantomime preparing for its day: brushing teeth and hair, bathing, eating, or similar activity.  | 
| 3   | The criatura moves up to its Velocidad toward a randomly determined criatura and uses its action to make one ataque cuerpo a cuerpo against that criatura. If there is no criatura within range, the criatura does nothing this turn. | 
| 4   | The criatura does nothing this turn. |
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 5th level or higher, you can objetivo one additional criatura for each slot level above 4th. The criaturas must be within 30 pies of each other when you objetivo them.

name: Hypnic Jerk
desc: Strange things happen in the mind and body in that moment between waking and sleeping. One of the most Común is being startled awake by a sudden feeling of falling. With a snap of your fingers, you trigger that sensation in a criatura you can see within range. The objetivo debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or take 1d6 daño de fuerza. If the objetivo fails the tirada de salvación by 5 or more, it drops one object it is holding. A dropped object lands in the criatura's space.
higher_level: The spell's damage increases by 1d6 when you alcance 5th level (2d6), 11th level (3d6), and 17th level (4d6).

name: Hypnotic Pattern
desc: Creas un patrón de colores retorcidos que se entrelaza en el aire dentro de un cubo de 9m dentro del alcance. El patrón aparece por un momento y luego desaparece. Cada criatura en el área que vea el patrón debe realizar una tirada de salvación de Sabiduría. Si falla la tirada, la criatura queda hechizada durante la duración. Mientras está hechizada por este hechizo, la criatura está incapacitada y tiene una velocidad de 0. El hechizo termina para una criatura afectada si recibe cualquier daño o si alguien usa una acción para sacarla de su estupor.
material: Un palo de incienso encendido o un frasco de cristal lleno de material fosforescente.

name: Hypnotic Pattern
desc:
You conjure a swirling pattern of twisting hues that roils through the air, appearing for a moment and then vanishing. criaturas in the area that can perceive the pattern make a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or become hechizado. A criatura hechizado by this spell becomes incapacitado and its Velocidad is reduced to 0.

The effect ends on a criatura when it recibe damage or when another criatura uses an action to shake it out of its daze.

name: Ice Fortress
desc:
A gleaming fortress of ice springs from a square area of ground that you can see within range. It is a 10-pie cube (including floor and roof). The fortress can’t overlap any other structures, but any criaturas in its space are harmlessly lifted up as the ice rises into position. The walls are made of ice (AC 13), have 120 puntos de golpe each, and are immune to frío, necrótico, veneno, and daño psíquico. Reducing a wall to 0 puntos de golpe destroys it and has a 50 percent chance to cause the roof to collapse. A damaged wall can be repaired by casting a spell that causa daño de frío on it, on a point-for-point basis.

Each wall has two arrow slits. One wall also includes an ice door with an [arcane lock](https://api.open5e.com/spells/arcane-lock). You designate at the time of the fort’s creation which criaturas can enter the fortification. The door has AC 18 and 60 puntos de golpe, or it can be broken open with a successful CD 25 Fuerza (Atletismo) check (CD 15 if the [arcane lock](https://api.open5e.com/spells/arcane-lock) is dispelled).

The fortress catches and reflects ligera, so that criaturas outside the fortress who rely on sight have desventaja on Percepción checks and attack rolls made against those within the fortress if it’s in an area of bright sunlight.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 6th level or higher, you can increase the length or width of the fortification by 5 pies for every slot level above 5th. You can make a different choice (width or length) for each slot level above 5th.
material: a miniature keep carved from ice or glass that is consumed in the casting

name: Ice Hammer
desc:
When you cast **ice hammer**, a warhammer fashioned from ice appears in your hands. This weapon functions as a standard warhammer in all ways, and it causa an extra 1d10 daño de frío on a hit. You can drop the warhammer or give it to another criatura.

The warhammer melts and is destroyed when it or its user accumulates 20 or more daño de fuego, or when the spell ends.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 3rd level or higher, you can create one additional hammer for each slot level above 2nd. Alternatively, you can create half as many hammers (ronda down), but each is oversized (1d10 daño contundente, or 1d12 if wielded with two hands, plus 2d8 daño de frío). Medium or smaller criaturas have desventaja when using oversized weapons, even if they are proficient with them.
material: a miniature hammer carved from ice or glass

name: Ice Soldiers
desc: You pour water from the vial and cause two [ice soldiers](https://api.open5e.com/monsters/ice-soldier) to appear within range. The ice soldiers cannot form if there is no space available for them. The ice soldiers act immediately on your turn. You can mentally command them (no action required by you) to move and act where and how you desire. If you command an ice soldier to attack, it attacks that criatura exclusively until the objetivo is dead, at which time the soldier melts into a puddle of water. If an ice soldier moves farther than 30 pies from you, it immediately melts.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 8th level or higher, you create one additional ice soldier.
material: vial of water

name: Ice Storm
desc: Una granizada de hielo duro como la roca cae al suelo en un cilindro de 6m de radio y 12m de altura centrado en un punto dentro del alcance. Cada criatura en el cilindro debe realizar una tirada de salvación de Destreza. Una criatura sufre 2d8 de daño contundente y 4d6 de daño por frío si falla la tirada, o la mitad de ese daño si tiene éxito. Los granizos convierten el área de efecto de la tormenta en terreno difícil hasta el final de tu próximo turno.
higher_level: Cuando lanzas este hechizo usando un espacio de hechizo de nivel 5 o superior, el daño contundente aumenta en 1d8 por cada nivel de espacio por encima del 4.º.
material: Una pizca de polvo y unas pocas gotas de agua.

name: Ice Storm
desc: A bombardment of jagged ice erupts throughout the objetivo area. todas las criaturas in the area take 2d8 daño contundente and 4d6 daño de frío. Large chunks of ice turn the area into difficult terrain until the end of your next turn.
higher_level: The daño contundente increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 4th.

name: Icicle Daggers
desc:
When you cast this spell, three icicles appear in your hand. Each icicle has the same properties as a dagger but causa an extra 1d4 daño de frío on a hit.

The icicle daggers melt a few seconds after leaving your hand, making it impossible for other criaturas to wield them. If the surrounding temperature is at or below freezing, the daggers last for 1 hora. They melt instantly if you take 10 or more daño de fuego.
higher_level: If you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 2nd level or higher, you can create two additional daggers for each slot level above 1st. If you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 4th level or higher, daggers that leave your hand don’t melt until the start of your next turn.
material: a miniature dagger shaped like an icicle

name: Icy Grasp of the Void
desc: You summon the frío, inky darkness of the Void into being around a criatura that you can see. The objetivo recibe 10d10 daño de frío and is apresado for the duration; a successful tirada de salvación de Constitución halves el daño and negates the apresado condition. A apresado criatura gains one level of agotamiento at the start of each of its turns. criaturas immune to frío and that do not breathe do not gain agotamiento. A criatura apresado in this way can repeat the tirada de salvación at the end of each of its turns, ending the spell en un éxito.

name: Icy Manipulation
desc:
una criatura you can see within range debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Constitución. en una salvación fallida, the criatura is petrificado (frozen solid). A petrificado criatura can repeat the tirada de salvación at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself if it makes two successful saves. If a petrificado criatura gets two failures on the tirada de salvación (not counting the original failure that caused the petrification), the petrification becomes permenant.

The petrification also becomes permanent if you maintain Concentración on this spell for a full minuto. A permanently petrificado/frozen criatura can be restored to normal with [greater restoration](https://api.open5e.com/spells/greater-restoration) or comparable magic, or by casting this spell on the criatura again and maintaining Concentración for a full minuto.

If the frozen criatura is damaged or broken before it recovers from being petrificado, the injury carries over to its normal state.
material: a piece of ice preserved from the plane of elemental ice

name: Identify
desc: Elige un objeto que debes tocar durante todo el tiempo que dure el lanzamiento del conjuro. Si es un objeto mágico o algún otro objeto imbuido de magia, conocerás sus propiedades y cómo usarlas, si requiere sintonización para ser utilizado, y cuántas cargas tiene, si es que tiene alguna. Sabrás si algún conjuro está afectando al objeto y cuáles son. Si el objeto fue creado por un conjuro, conocerás qué conjuro lo creó. Si en cambio tocas a una criatura durante el lanzamiento, conocerás qué conjuros, si los hay, la están afectando en ese momento.
material: Una perla que valga al menos 100 po y una pluma de búho.

name: Identify
desc:
You learn the objetivo item's mágico properties along with how to use them. This spell also reveals whether or not a objetivoed item requires attunement and how many charges it has. You learn what spells are affecting the objetivoed item (if any) along with what spells were used to create it.

Alternatively, you learn any spells that are currently affecting a objetivoed criatura.

What this spell can reveal is at the Narrator's discretion, and some powerful and rare magics are immune to identify.

name: Ill-Fated Word
desc: You call out a distracting epithet to a criatura, worsening its chance to succeed at whatever it's doing. Roll a d4 and subtract the number rolled from an tirada de ataque, ability check, or tirada de salvación that the objetivo has just made; the objetivo uses the lowered result to determine the outcome of its roll.
casting_time: 1 reaction, which you take when an enemy makes an attack roll, ability check, or saving throw

name: Illuminate Spoor
desc:
You touch a set of tracks created by a single criatura. That set of tracks and all other tracks made by the same criatura give off a faint glow. You and up to three criaturas you designate when you cast this spell can see the glow. A criatura that can see the glow automatically succeeds on Sabiduría (Supervivencia) checks to track that criatura. If the tracks are covered by obscuring objects such as leaves or mud, you and the criaturas you designate have ventaja on Sabiduría (Supervivencia) checks to follow the tracks.
  If the criatura leaving the tracks changes its tracks, such as by adding or removing footwear, the glow stops where the tracks change. Until the spell ends, you can use an action to touch and illuminate a new set of tracks.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 3rd level or higher, the duration is Concentración, up to 8 horas. When you use a espacio de conjuro of 5th level or higher, the duration is Concentración, up to 24 horas.
material: a firefly

name: Illusory Script
desc: Escribes sobre pergamino, papel u otro material de escritura adecuado e imbuyes el texto con una poderosa ilusión que dura mientras el conjuro esté activo. Para ti y para las criaturas que designes al lanzar el conjuro, la escritura parece normal, escrita con tu puño y letra, y transmite el significado que pretendías al redactarla. Para todos los demás, la escritura parece estar redactada en un idioma desconocido o mágico que resulta ininteligible. De manera alternativa, puedes hacer que la escritura parezca un mensaje completamente diferente, escrito con otra letra y en otro idioma, aunque dicho idioma debe ser uno que conozcas. Si el conjuro es disipado, tanto el texto original como la ilusión desaparecen. Una criatura con visión verdadera puede leer el mensaje oculto.
material: Una tinta a base de plomo que valga al menos 10 po, la cual es consumida por este conjuro.

name: Illusory Script
desc:
You inscribe a message onto the objetivo and wrap it in illusion until the spell ends. You and any criaturas that you designate when the spell is cast perceive the message as normal. You may choose to have other criaturas view the message as writing in an unknown or unintelligible mágico script or a different message. If you choose to create another message, you can change the handwriting and the language that the message is written in, though you must know the language in question.

If the spell is dispelled, both the message and its illusory mask disappear.

The true message can be perceived by any criatura with vista verdadera.

name: Imbue Spell
desc: Deep Magic: clockwork You imbue a spell of 1st thru 3rd level that has a casting time of Instantáneo onto a gear worth 100 gp per level of spell you are imbuing. At the end of the ritual, the gear is placed into a piece of clockwork that includes a timer or trigger mechanism. When the timer or trigger goes off, the spell is cast. If the range of the spell was Touch, it effects only a objetivo touching the device. If the spell had a range in pies, the spell is cast on the closest viable objetivo within range, based on the Naturaleza of the spell. Spells with a range of Self or Sight can't be imbued. If the gear is placed with a timer, it activates when the time elapses regardless of whether a legitimate objetivo is available.
higher_level: You can perform this ritual as a 7th-level spell to imbue a spell of 4th or 5th level.

name: Immolating Gibbet
desc:
You cause up to three criaturas you can see within range to be yanked into the air where their blood turns to fuego, burning them from within. Each objetivo debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Destreza or be magically pulled up to 60 into the air. The criatura is apresado there until the spell ends. A apresado criatura debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Constitución at the start of each of its turns. The criatura recibe 7d6 daño de fuego en una salvación fallida, or half as much damage on a successful one.
  At the end of each of its turns, a apresado criatura can make another tirada de salvación de Destreza. en un éxito, the spell ends on the criatura, and the criatura falls to the ground, taking falling damage as normal. Alternatively, the apresado criatura or someone else who can alcance it can use an action to make an Inteligencia (Arcanos) check against your CD de salvación del conjuro. en un éxito, the apresado effect ends, and the criatura falls to the ground, taking falling damage as normal.

name: Impending Ally
desc: You summon a duplicate of yourself as an aliado who appears in an unoccupied space you can see within range. You control this aliado, whose turn comes immediately after yours. When you or the aliado uses a class feature, espacio de conjuro, or other expendable resource, it’s considered expended for both of you. When the spell ends, or if you are killed, the aliado disappears immediately.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 5th level or higher, the duration is extended by 1 ronda for every two slot levels above 3rd.
material: a broken chain link

name: Imprisonment
desc:
Creas una restricción mágica para retener a una criatura que puedas ver dentro del alcance. El objetivo debe superar una tirada de salvación de Sabiduría o quedará ligado por el conjuro; si tiene éxito, es inmune a este conjuro si lo lanzas de nuevo. Mientras está afectada por este conjuro, la criatura no necesita respirar, comer ni beber, y no envejece. Los conjuros de adivinación no pueden localizar ni percibir al objetivo. Al lanzar el conjuro, elige una de las siguientes formas de encarcelamiento.

**Enterramiento.** El objetivo queda sepultado muy por debajo de la tierra en una esfera de fuerza mágica con el tamaño justo para contenerlo. Nada puede atravesar la esfera, ni ninguna criatura puede teletransportarse ni usar viaje planar para entrar o salir de ella. El componente especial para esta versión del conjuro es un pequeño orbe de mithral.

**Encadenamiento.** Pesadas cadenas, firmemente ancladas al suelo, inmovilizan al objetivo en su lugar. El objetivo queda restringido hasta que el conjuro termine y no puede moverse ni ser movido por ningún medio hasta entonces. El componente especial para esta versión del conjuro es una cadena fina de metal precioso.

**Prisión Vallada.** El conjuro transporta al objetivo a un diminuto semiplano protegido contra la teletransportación y el viaje planar. El semiplano puede ser un laberinto, una jaula, una torre o cualquier estructura o área confinada similar que elijas. El componente especial para esta versión del conjuro es una representación en miniatura de la prisión hecha de jade.

**Contención Mínima.** El objetivo se encoge hasta medir 2,5 cm de altura y queda aprisionado en el interior de una gema u objeto similar. La luz puede atravesar la gema con normalidad (lo que permite al objetivo ver hacia afuera y a otras criaturas ver hacia adentro), pero nada más puede atravesarla, ni siquiera mediante teletransportación o viaje planar. La gema no puede ser cortada ni rota mientras el conjuro siga activo. El componente especial para esta versión del conjuro es una gema grande y transparente, como un corindón, un diamante o un rubí.

**Sopor.** El objetivo cae dormido y no puede ser despertado. El componente especial para esta versión del conjuro consiste en hierbas soporíferas de gran rareza.

**Finalizar el Conjuro.** Durante el lanzamiento del conjuro, en cualquiera de sus versiones, puedes especificar una condición que hará que el conjuro termine y libere al objetivo. La condición puede ser tan concreta o elaborada como desees, pero el DM debe estar de acuerdo en que la condición es razonable y tiene posibilidades de cumplirse. Las condiciones pueden basarse en el nombre, la identidad o la deidad de una criatura, pero en cualquier otro caso deben basarse en acciones o cualidades observables, y no en elementos intangibles como el nivel, la clase o los puntos de golpe. Un conjuro de disipar magia solo puede poner fin a este conjuro si se lanza como un conjuro de nivel 9, apuntando ya sea a la prisión o al componente especial utilizado para crearla. Solo puedes usar un componente especial determinado para crear una prisión a la vez. Si lanzas el conjuro de nuevo usando el mismo componente, el objetivo del primer lanzamiento queda liberado de su restricción de inmediato.
material: Una representación en vitela o una estatuilla tallada a semejanza del objetivo, y un componente especial que varía según la versión del conjuro que elijas, con un valor de al menos 500 po por Dado de Golpe del objetivo.

name: Imprisonment
desc:
You utter the objetivo's name and attempt to bind them for eternity. en una salvación exitosa, a objetivo is immune to any future attempts by you to cast this spell on it. en una salvación fallida, choose from one of the forms of bindings below (each lasts until the spell ends).

* **Burial:** The objetivo is buried deep below the surface of the earth in a tomb just large enough to contain it. Nothing can enter the tomb. No teleportation or planar travel can be used to enter, leave, or affect the tomb or its contents. A small mithral orb is required for this casting.
* **Chaining:** Chains made of unbreakable material erupt from the ground and root the objetivo in place. The objetivo is apresado and cannot be moved by any means. A small adamantine chain is required for this casting.
* **Hedged Prison:** The objetivo is imprisoned in a maze-like demiplane of your choosing, such as a labyrinth, a cage, a tower, a hedge maze, or any similar structure you desire. The demiplane is warded against teleportation and planar travel. A small jade representation of the demiplane is required for this casting.
* **Minimus Containment:** The objetivo shrinks to just under an inch and is imprisoned inside a gemstone, crystal, jar, or similar object. Nothing but ligera can pass in and out of the vessel, and it cannot be broken, cut, or otherwise damaged. The special component for this effect is whatever prison you wish to use.
* **Slumber:** The objetivo is plunged into an unbreakable slumber and cannot be awoken. Special soporific draughts are required for this casting.

The objetivo does not need sustenance or air, nor does it age. No divination spells of any sort can be used to reveal the objetivo's location.

When cast, you must specify a condition that will cause the spell to end and release the objetivo. This condition must be based on some observable action or quality and not related to mechanics like level, hitpoints, or class, and the Narrator must agree to it.

A dispel magic only dispels an _imprisonment_ if it is cast using a 9th-level espacio de conjuro and objetivos the prison or the special component used to create the prison.

Each casting that uses the same spell effect requires its own special component. Repeated castings with the same component free the prior occupant.

name: Incantation of Lies Made Truth
desc: This ritual must be cast during a solar eclipse. It can objetivo a person, an organization (including a city), or a kingdom. If objetivoing an organization or a kingdom, the incantation requires an object epitomizing the entity as part of the material component, such as a crown, mayoral seal, standard, or primary relic. If objetivoing a person, the primary performer must hold a vial of the person's blood. Over the course of the incantation, the components are mixed and the primary caster inscribes a false Historia and a sum of knowledge concerning the objetivo into the book using the mockingbird quills. When the incantation is completed, whatever the caster wrote in the book becomes known and accepted as truth by the objetivo. The objetivo can attempt a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría to negate this effect. If the objetivo was a city or a kingdom, the tirada de salvación is made with ventaja by its current leader or ruler. If the tirada de salvación fails, all citizens or members of the objetivo organization or kingdom believe the account written in the book to be fact. Any information contrary to what was written in the book is forgotten within an hora, but individuals who make a sustained study of such information can attempt a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría to retain the contradictory knowledge. Books containing contradictory information are considered obsolete or purposely misleading. Permanent structures such as statues of heroes who've been written out of existence are believed to be purely artistic endeavors or so old that no one remembers their identities anymore. The effects of this ritual can be reversed by washing the written words from the book using universal solvent and then burning the book to ashes in a mágico fuego. Incantation of lies made truth is intended to be a villainous motivator in a campaign, with the player characters fighting to uncover the truth and reverse the spell's effect. The GM should take care not to remove too much player agency with this ritual. The criaturas affected should be predominantly NPCs, with PCs and even select NPCs able to resist it. Reversing the effect of the ritual can be the entire basis of a campaign.

name: Incendiary Cloud
desc: Una nube arremolinada de humo surcada por ascuas al rojo vivo aparece en una esfera de 6 m de radio centrada en un punto dentro del alcance. La nube se extiende alrededor de las esquinas y oscurece fuertemente el área. Dura mientras el conjuro esté activo o hasta que un viento de velocidad moderada o superior (al menos 16 km/h) la disperse. Cuando la nube aparece, cada criatura que se encuentre en ella debe realizar una tirada de salvación de Destreza. Una criatura recibe 10d8 de daño por fuego si falla la tirada, o la mitad si la supera. Una criatura también debe realizar esta tirada de salvación cuando entra en el área del conjuro por primera vez en un turno o termina su turno en ella. La nube se desplaza 3 m directamente en dirección contraria a ti, en una dirección que elijas al inicio de cada uno de tus turnos.

name: Incendiary Cloud
desc:
A cloud of burning embers, smoke, and roiling flame appears within range. The cloud heavily obscures its area, spreading around corners and through cracks. When the cloud appears and a criatura is in it, when a criatura enters the cloud for the first time on a turn, or when a criatura ends its turn within the cloud it makes a tirada de salvación de Destreza, taking 10d8 daño de fuego en una salvación fallida, or half as much on a successful one.

The cloud can be dispelled by a wind of at least 10 millas per hora. After it is cast, the cloud moves 10 pies away from you in a direction that you choose at the start of each of your turns.

name: Inconspicuous Facade
desc: By means of this spell, you make a objetivo building seem much less important or ostentatious than it is. You can give the objetivo an unremarkable appearance or one that blends in with nearby buildings. By its Naturaleza, this spell does not allow you to specify features that would make the building stand out. You also cannot make a building look more opulent to match surrounding buildings. You can make the building appear smaller or larger that its actual size to better fit into its environs. However, these size changes are noticeable with cursory physical inspection as an object will pass through extra illusory space or bump into a seemingly smaller section of the building. A criatura can use its action to inspect the building and make an Inteligencia (Investigación) check against your CD de salvación del conjuro. If it succeeds, it becomes aware the building has been disguised. In addition to you dispelling inconspicuous facade, the spell ends if the objetivo building is destroyed.

name: Inescapable Malady
desc:
You infect your objetivo with an arcane disease. At any time after you cast this spell, as long as you are on the same plane of existence as the objetivo, you can use an action to deal 7d10 daño necrótico to the objetivo. If this damage would reduce the objetivo to 0 puntos de golpe, you can choose to leave it with 1 punto de golpe.

As part of dealing el daño, you may expend a 7th-level espacio de conjuro to sustain the disease. Otherwise, the spell ends. The spell ends when you die.

Casting remove curse, greater restoration, or heal on the objetivo allows the objetivo to make a tirada de salvación de Constitución against the disease. Otherwise the disease can only be cured by a wish spell.
higher_level: el daño increases by 1d10 for each slot level above 7th.

name: Inexorable Summons
desc: You alcance out toward a criatura and call to it. The objetivo teleports to an unoccupied space that you can see within 5 pies of you. An unwilling criatura can make a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría, and if it succeeds, it isn't affected by this spell. You can't teleport a objetivo into dangerous terrain, such as lava, and the objetivo must be teleported to a space on the ground or on a floor.

name: Infernal Weapon
desc:
A weapon formed from the essence of Hell appears in your hands. You must use two hands to wield the weapon. If you let go of the weapon, it disappears and the spell ends.

When you cast the spell, choose either a flame fork or ice spear. While the spell lasts, you can use an action to make a melee ataque de conjuro with the weapon against a criatura within 10 pies of you.

On a hit, you deal 5d8 damage of a type determined by the weapon's form. On a critical hit, you inflict an additional effect.

In addition, on a hit with the Infernal weapon, you can end the spell early to inflict an automatic critical hit.

**Flame Fork.** The weapon causa daño de fuego.

On a critical hit, the objetivo catches fuego, taking 2d6 ongoing daño de fuego.

**Ice Spear.** The weapon causa daño de frío. On a critical hit, for 1 minuto the objetivo is slowed.

At the end of each of its turns a slowed criatura can make a tirada de salvación de Constitución, ending the effect on itself en un éxito.

A criatura reduced to 0 puntos de golpe by an Infernal weapon immediately dies in a gruesome fashion.

For example, a criatura killed by an ice spear might freeze solid, then shatter into a thousand pieces. cada criatura of your choice within 60 pies of the criatura and who can see it when it dies debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría. en un fallo, a criatura becomes asustado of you until the end of your next turn.

name: Inflict Wounds
desc: Realiza un ataque de conjuro cuerpo a cuerpo contra una criatura que tengas a tu alcance. Si impactas, el objetivo recibe 3d10 de daño necrótico.
higher_level: Cuando lanzas este conjuro usando un espacio de conjuro de nivel 2 o superior, el daño aumenta en 1d10 por cada nivel de espacio por encima del 1.º.

name: Inflict Wounds
desc: You impart fell energies that suck away the objetivo's life fuerza, making a melee ataque de conjuro that causa 3d10 daño necrótico.
higher_level: el daño increases by 1d10 for each slot level above 1st.

name: Innocuous Aspect
desc:
An area of false vision encompasses todas las criaturas within 20 pies of you. You and cada criatura in the area that you choose to affect take on the appearance of a harmless criatura or object, chosen by you. Each image is identical, and only appearance is affected. Sound, movement, or physical inspection can reveal the ruse.

A criatura that uses its action to study the image visually can determine that it is an illusion with a successful Inteligencia (Investigación) check against your CD de salvación del conjuro. If a criatura discerns the illusion for what it is, that criatura sees through the image.
material: a paper ring

name: Insect Plague
desc: Una nube de langostas voraces y mordedoras llena una esfera de 6m de radio centrada en un punto que eliges dentro del alcance. La esfera se extiende alrededor de las esquinas. La esfera permanece durante la duración del conjuro y su área está levemente oscurecida. El área de la esfera es terreno difícil. Cuando el área aparece, cada criatura que se encuentre en ella debe realizar una tirada de salvación de Constitución. Una criatura sufre 4d10 de daño perforante si falla la tirada, o la mitad si la supera. Una criatura también debe realizar esta tirada de salvación cuando entra por primera vez en el área del conjuro durante su turno o cuando termina su turno en ella.
higher_level: Cuando lanzas este conjuro usando un espacio de conjuro de nivel 6 o superior, el daño aumenta en 1d10 por cada nivel de espacio por encima del 5º.
material: Unos pocos granos de azúcar, algunos granos de cereal y una mancha de grasa.

name: Insect Plague
desc: A roiling cloud of insects appears, biting and stinging any criaturas it touches. The cloud lightly obscures its area, spreads around corners, and is considered difficult terrain. When the cloud appears and a criatura is in it, when a criatura enters the cloud for the first time on a turn, or when a criatura ends its turn within the cloud it makes a tirada de salvación de Constitución, taking 4d10 daño perforante en una salvación fallida, or half as much on a successful one.
higher_level: el daño increases by 1d10 for each slot level above 5th.

name: Insightful Maneuver
desc: With a flash of Perspicacia, you know how to take ventaja of your foe’s vulnerabilities. Until the end of your turn, the objetivo has vulnerability to one type of damage (your choice). Additionally, if the objetivo has any other vulnerabilities, you learn them.
dnd_class: Cleric, Paladin, Ranger, Sorcerer, Warlock, Wizard

name: Inspiring Speech
desc: The verbal component of this spell is a 10-minuto-long, rousing speech. At the end of the speech, all your aliados within the affected area who heard the speech gain a +1 bonus on attack rolls and ventaja on tirada de salvacións for 1 hora against effects that cause the hechizado or asustado condition. Additionally, each recipient gains temporary puntos de golpe equal to your spellcasting ability modifier. If you move farther than 1 milla from your aliados or you die, this spell ends. A character can be affected by only one casting of this spell at a time; subsequent, overlapping castings have no additional effect and don't extend the spell's duration.

name: Instant Armored Vehicle
desc:
You transform a handful of materials into a Huge armored vehicle. The vehicle can take whatever form you want, but it has AC 18 and 100 puntos de golpe. If it is reduced to 0 puntos de golpe, it is destroyed. If it is a ground vehicle, it has a Velocidad of 90 pies. If it is an airborne vehicle, it has a volando Velocidad of 45 pies. If it is a waterborne vehicle, it has a Velocidad of 2 millas per hora. The vehicle can hold up to four Medium criaturas within it.
  A criatura inside it has three-quarters cover from attacks outside the vehicle, which contains arrow slits, portholes, and other small openings. A criatura piloting the armored vehicle can take the Careen action. To do so, the vehicle must move at least 10 pies in a straight line and enter or pass through the space of at least one Large or smaller criatura. This movement doesn't provoke opportunity attacks. cada criatura in the armored vehicle's path debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Destreza against your CD de salvación del conjuro. en una salvación fallida, the criatura recibe 5d8 daño contundente and is knocked derribado. en una salvación exitosa, the criatura can choose to be pushed 5 pies away from the space through which the vehicle passed. A criatura that chooses not to be pushed suffers the consequences of a failed tirada de salvación. If the criatura piloting the armored vehicle isn't proficient in land, water, or air vehicles (whichever is appropriate for the vehicle's type), each objetivo has ventaja on the tirada de salvación against the Careen action.

name: Instant Fortification
desc:
Through this spell, you transform a miniature statuette of a keep into an actual fort. The fortification springs from the ground in an unoccupied space within range. It is a 10- pie cube (including floor and roof).

Each wall has two arrow slits. One wall also includes a metal door with an [arcane lock](https://api.open5e.com/spells/arcane-lock) effect on it. You designate at the time of the fort’s creation which criaturas can ignore the lock and enter the fortification. The door has AC 20 and 60 puntos de golpe, and it can be broken open with a successful CD 25 Fuerza (Atletismo) check. The walls are made of stone (AC 15) and are immune to necrótico, veneno, and daño psíquico. Each 5-pie-square section of wall has 90 puntos de golpe. Reducing a section of wall to 0 puntos de golpe destroys it, allowing access to the inside of the fortification.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 6th level or higher, you can increase the length or width of the fortification by 5 pies for each slot level above 5th. You can make a different choice (width or length) for each slot level above 5th.
material: a statuette of a keep worth 250 gp, which is consumed in the casting

name: Instant Siege Weapon
desc:
With this spell, you instantly transform raw materials into a siege engine of Large size or smaller (the GM has information on this topic). The raw materials for the spell don’t need to be the actual components a siege weapon is normally built from; they just need to be manufactured goods made of the appropriate substances (typically including some form of finished wood and a few bits of worked metal) and have a gold piece value of no less than the weapon’s puntos de golpe.

For example, a mangonel has 100 puntos de golpe. **Instant siege weapon** will fashion any collection of raw materials worth at least 100 gp into a mangonel. Those materials might be lumber and fittings salvaged from a small house, or 100 gp worth of finished goods such as three wagons or two pesada crossbows. The spell also creates enough munición for ten shots, if the siege engine uses munición.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 6th level, a Huge siege engine can be made; at 8th level, a Gargantuan siege engine can be made. In addition, for each slot level above 4th, the spell creates another ten shots’ worth of munición.
material: raw materials with a value in gp equal to the puntos de golpe of the siege weapon to be created

name: Instant Snare
desc:
You create a snare on a point you can see within range. You can leave the snare as a mágico trap, or you can use your reacción to trigger the trap when a Large or smaller criatura you can see moves within 10 pies of the snare. If you leave the snare as a trap, a criatura debe tener éxito en an Inteligencia (Investigación) or Sabiduría (Percepción) check against your CD de salvación del conjuro to find the trap.
  When a Large or smaller criatura moves within 5 pies of the snare, the trap triggers. The criatura debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Destreza or be magically pulled into the air. The criatura is apresado and hangs upside down 5 pies above the snare's location for 1 minuto. A apresado criatura can repeat the tirada de salvación at the end of each of its turns, escaping the snare en un éxito. Alternatively, a criatura, including the apresado objetivo, can use its action to make an Inteligencia (Arcanos) check against your CD de salvación del conjuro. en un éxito, the apresado criatura is freed, and the snare resets itself 1 minuto later. If the criatura succeeds on the check by 5 or more, the snare is destroyed instead.
  This spell alerts you with a ping in your mind when the trap is triggered if you are within 1 milla of the snare. This ping awakens you if you are sleeping.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 3rd level or higher, you can create one additional snare for each slot level above 3rd. When you receive the mental ping that a trap was triggered, you know which snare was triggered if you have more than one.
material: a loop of twine

name: Instant Summons
desc: Tocas un objeto que pesa 4,5 kg o menos y cuya dimensión más larga no supera 1,8m. El conjuro deja una marca invisible en su superficie e inscribe de forma invisible el nombre del objeto en el zafiro que usas como componente material. Cada vez que lanzas este conjuro, debes usar un zafiro diferente. A partir de ese momento, puedes usar tu acción para pronunciar el nombre del objeto y aplastar el zafiro. El objeto aparece instantáneamente en tu mano, independientemente de las distancias físicas o planares, y el conjuro termina. Si otra criatura sostiene o transporta el objeto, aplastar el zafiro no te transporta el objeto, sino que en su lugar descubres qué criatura posee el objeto y dónde se encuentra aproximadamente en ese momento. Dispel magic u un efecto similar aplicado con éxito al zafiro pone fin al efecto de este conjuro.
material: Un zafiro con un valor de 1.000 po.

name: Instant Summons
desc:
Until the spell ends, a mystical bond connects the objetivo and the precious stone used to cast this spell.

Any time after, you may crush the stone and speak the name of the item, summoning it instantly into your hand no matter the physical, metaphysical, or planar distances involved, at which point the spell ends. If another criatura is holding the item when the stone is crushed, the item is not summoned to you. Instead, the spell grants you the knowledge of who possesses it and a general idea of the criatura's location.

Each time you cast this spell, you must use a different precious stone.

Dispel magic or a similar effect objetivoing the stone ends the spell.

name: Invested Champion
desc:
You touch una criatura and choose either to become its champion, or for it to become yours. If you choose a criatura to become your champion, it fights on your behalf. While this spell is in effect, you can cast any spell with a range of touch on your champion as if the spell had a range of 60 pies. Your champion's attacks are considered mágico, and you can use a acción adicional on your turn to encourage your champion, granting it ventaja on its next tirada de ataque.
  If you become the champion of another criatura, you gain ventaja on all attack rolls against criaturas that have attacked your charge within the last ronda. If you are wielding a shield, and a criatura within 5 pies of you attacks your charge, you can use your reacción to impose desventaja on the tirada de ataque, as if you had the Protection fighting style. If you already have the Protection fighting style, then in addition to imposing desventaja, you can also push an enemigo 5 pies in any direction away from your charge when you take your reacción. You can use a acción adicional on your turn to reroll el daño for any successful attack against a criatura that is threatening your charge.
  Whichever version of the spell is cast, if the distance between the champion and its designated aliado increases to more than 60 pies, the spell ends.

name: Invigorated Strikes
