La esfera es inmune a todo daño, y una criatura u objeto en su interior no puede recibir daño de ataques o efectos procedentes del exterior, ni tampoco una criatura dentro de la esfera puede dañar nada fuera de ella. La esfera no tiene peso y es justo lo suficientemente grande para contener a la criatura u objeto en su interior. Una criatura encerrada puede usar su acción para empujar contra las paredes de la esfera y así hacerla rodar a una velocidad de hasta la mitad de la velocidad de la criatura. Del mismo modo, otras criaturas pueden recoger y mover el globo. Un conjuro Disintegrate dirigido al globo lo destruye sin causar daño a nada de lo que hay en su interior.
material: Una pieza hemisférica de cristal transparente y una pieza hemisférica a juego de goma arábiga.

name: Resilient Sphere
desc:
A transparent sphere of fuerza encloses the objetivo.

The sphere is weightless and just large enough for the objetivo to fit inside. The sphere can be destroyed without harming anyone inside by being dealt at least 15 daño de fuerza at once or by being objetivoed with a dispel magic spell cast using a 4th-level or higher espacio de conjuro. The sphere is immune to all other damage, and no spell effects, physical objects, or anything else can pass through, though a objetivo can breathe while inside it. The objetivo cannot be damaged by any attacks or effects originating from outside the sphere, and the objetivo cannot damage anything outside of it.

The objetivo can use an action to roll the sphere at half its Velocidad. Similarly, the sphere can be picked up and moved by other criaturas.

name: Resistance
desc: Tocas a una criatura voluntaria. Una vez antes de que el conjuro termine, el objetivo puede tirar un d4 y añadir el número obtenido a una tirada de salvación de su elección. Puede tirar el dado antes o después de realizar la tirada de salvación. El conjuro termina entonces.
material: Una capa en miniatura.

name: Resistance
desc: The objetivo gains an expertise die to one tirada de salvación of its choice, ending the spell. The expertise die can be rolled before or after the tirada de salvación is made.

name: Resurrection
desc: Tocas a una criatura muerta que lleva sin vida no más de un siglo, que no murió de vejez y que no es un no-muerto. Si su alma es libre y está dispuesta, el objetivo regresa a la vida con todos sus puntos de golpe. Este conjuro neutraliza cualquier veneno y cura las enfermedades normales que afligían a la criatura en el momento de su muerte. Sin embargo, no elimina enfermedades mágicas, maldiciones ni efectos similares; si dichos efectos no son eliminados antes de lanzar el conjuro, afligen al objetivo cuando este regresa a la vida. Este conjuro cierra todas las heridas mortales y restaura cualquier parte del cuerpo que faltara. Regresar de la muerte es una prueba dura. El objetivo sufre una penalización de -4 a todas las tiradas de ataque, tiradas de salvación y pruebas de característica. Cada vez que el objetivo completa un descanso largo, la penalización se reduce en 1 hasta desaparecer. Lanzar este conjuro para devolver la vida a una criatura que lleva muerta un año o más te agota enormemente. Hasta que completes un descanso largo, no puedes volver a lanzar conjuros, y tienes desventaja en todas las tiradas de ataque, pruebas de característica y tiradas de salvación.
material: Un diamante con un valor mínimo de 1.000 po, que el conjuro consume.

name: Resurrection
desc:
Provided the objetivo's soul is willing and able to return to its body, so long as it is not undead it returns to life with all of its puntos de golpe.

The spell cures any poisons and no mágico diseases that affected the objetivo at the time of death.

It does not remove any mágico diseases, curses, or other mágico effects; these must be removed prior to the spell being cast, otherwise they immediately take effect when the objetivo returns to life. The spell closes all mortal wounds and restores any missing body parts.

Being raised from the dead recibe a toll on the body, mind, and spirit. The objetivo recibe a -4 penalty to attack rolls, tirada de salvacións, and ability checks.

At the conclusion of each descanso largo, the penalty is reduced by 1 until the objetivo completely recovers.

Resurrecting a criatura that has been dead for one year or longer is exhausting. Until you finish a descanso largo, you can't cast spells again and you have desventaja on attack rolls, ability checks, and tirada de salvacións.

name: Retribution
desc: You wrap yourself in shimmering ethereal armor. The next time a criatura hits you with a ataque cuerpo a cuerpo, it recibe daño de fuerza equal to half el daño it dealt to you, and it debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Fuerza. en una salvación fallida, the criatura is pushed up to 5 pies away from you. Then the spell ends.

name: Revenge's Eye
desc: You touch a criatura's visual organs and grant them the ability to see the trail left by criaturas damaged by a weapon you cast invisible criaturas; it only reveals trails left by those affected by order of revenge also cast by the spellcaster.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 3rd level or higher, you can objetivo +1 criatura for each slot level above second.

name: Reverberate
desc: You touch the ground at your pies with the metal ring, creating an impact that shakes the earth ahead of you. criaturas and unattended objects touching the ground in a 15-pie cone emanating from you take 4d6 daño de trueno, and criaturas fall derribado; a criatura that makes a successful tirada de salvación de Destreza recibe half el daño and does not fall derribado.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 3rd level or higher, el daño increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 2nd.
material: a metal ring

name: Reverse Gravity
desc: Este conjuro invierte la gravedad en un cilindro de 15 metros de radio y 30 metros de altura centrado en un punto dentro del alcance. Todas las criaturas y objetos que no estén anclados de algún modo al suelo dentro del área caen hacia arriba y alcanzan la parte superior del área cuando lanzas este conjuro. Una criatura puede realizar una tirada de salvación de Destreza para aferrarse a un objeto fijo que pueda alcanzar, evitando así la caída. Si durante esta caída se encuentra algún objeto sólido (como un techo), los objetos y criaturas que caen chocan contra él igual que lo harían en una caída normal hacia abajo. Si un objeto o criatura alcanza la parte superior del área sin chocar con nada, permanece allí, oscilando levemente, durante la duración. Al final de la duración, los objetos y criaturas afectados caen de nuevo hacia abajo.
material: Una piedra imán y limaduras de hierro.

name: Reverse Gravity
desc:
Gravity reverses in the area. Any criaturas or objects not anchored to the ground fall upward until they alcance the top of the area. A criatura may make a tirada de salvación de Destreza to prevent the fall by grabbing hold of something. If a solid object (such as a ceiling) is encountered, the affected criaturas and objects impact against it with the same fuerza as a downward fall. When an object or criatura reaches the top of the area, it remains suspended there until the spell ends.

When the spell ends, all affected objects and criaturas fall back down.

name: Revive Beast
desc: You touch a beast that has died within the last minuto. That beast returns to life with 1 punto de golpe. This spell can’t return to life a beast that has died of old age, nor can it restore any missing body parts.
material: emeralds worth 100 gp, which the spell consumes

name: Revivify
desc: Tocas a una criatura que ha muerto en el último minuto. Esa criatura regresa a la vida con 1 punto de golpe. Este conjuro no puede devolver la vida a una criatura que haya muerto de vejez, ni puede restaurar partes del cuerpo que faltaran.
material: Diamantes con un valor de 300 po, que el conjuro consume.

name: Revivify
desc: The objetivo returns to life with 1 punto de golpe. The spell does not restore any missing body parts and cannot return to life a criatura that died of old age.

name: Right the Stars
desc: You subtly warp the flow of space and time to enhance your conjurations with cosmic potency. Until the spell ends, the maximum duration of any conjuration spell you cast that requires Concentración is doubled, any criatura that you summon or create with a conjuration spell has 30 temporary puntos de golpe, and you have ventaja on Carisma checks and Carisma tirada de salvacións.
material: seven black candles and a circle of powdered charred bone or basalt
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Paladin, Ranger, Sorcerer, Warlock, Wizard

name: Ring Strike
desc: You infuse two metal rings with magic, causing them to revolve in a slow orbit around your head or hand. For the duration, when you hit a objetivo within 60 pies of you with an attack, you can launch one of the rings to strike the objetivo as well. The objetivo recibe 1d10 daño contundente and debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Fuerza or be pushed 5 pies directly away from you. The ring is destroyed when it strikes.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 2nd level or higher, you can affect up to two additional rings for each espacio de conjuro level above 1st.
material: two metal rings

name: Ring Ward
desc: The iron ring you use to cast the spell becomes a faintly shimmering circlet of energy that spins slowly around you at a radius of 15 pies. For the duration, you and your aliados inside the protected area have ventaja on tirada de salvacións against spells, and all affected criaturas gain resistance to one type of damage of your choice.
material: an iron ring worth 200 gp, which the spell consumes

name: Riptide
desc:
With a sweeping gesture, you cause water to swell up into a 20-pie tall, 20-pie radius cylinder centered on a point on the ground that you can see. cada criatura in the cylinder debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Fuerza. en una salvación fallida, the criatura is apresado and suspended in the cylinder; en una salvación exitosa, the criatura moves to just outside the nearest edge of the cylinder.

At the start of your next turn, you can direct the current of the swell as it dissipates. Choose one of the following options.

* ***Riptide.*** The water in the cylinder flows in a direction you choose, sweeping along cada criatura in the cylinder. An affected criatura recibe 3d8 daño contundente and is pushed 40 pies in the chosen direction, landing derribado.
* ***Undertow.*** The water rushes downward, pulling cada criatura in the cylinder into an unoccupied space at the center. cada criatura is knocked derribado and debe realizar a successful tirada de salvación de Constitución or be aturdido until the start of your next turn.

name: Rise of the Green
desc: The spell gives life to existing plants in range. If there are no plants in range, the spell creates undergrowth and trees that persist for the duration. One of the trees becomes a treant friendly to you and your companions. Roll initiative for the treant, which has its own turn. It obeys any verbal commands that you issue to it. If you don't issue it any commands, it defends itself from hostile criaturas but otherwise recibe no actions. The animated undergrowth creates difficult terrain for your enemigos. Additionally, at the beginning of each of your turns, todas las criaturas that are on the ground in range debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Fuerza or become apresado until the spell ends. A apresado criatura can use an action to make a Fuerza (Atletismo) check against your CD de salvación del conjuro, ending the effect on itself en un éxito. If a criatura is apresado by plants at the beginning of your turn, it recibe 1d6 daño contundente. Finally, the trees swing at each enemigo in range, requiring cada criatura to make a tirada de salvación de Destreza. A criatura recibe 6d6 daño contundente en una salvación fallida or half as much damage on a successful one. You can use a acción adicional to recenter the spell on yourself. This does not grow additional trees in areas that previously had none.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a 9th-level slot, an additional tree becomes a treant, the undergrowth causa an additional 1d6 daño contundente, and the trees inflict an additional 2d6 daño contundente.

name: Risen Road
desc: When you cast this spell, you open a glowing portal into the plane of shadow. The portal remains open for 1 minuto, until 10 criaturas step through it, or until you collapse it (no action required). Stepping through the portal places you on a shadow road leading to a destination within 50 millas, or in a direction specified by you. The road is in ideal condition. You and your companions can travel it safely at a normal pace, but you can't rest on the road; if you stop for more than 10 minutos, the spell expires and dumps you back into the real world at a random spot within 10 millas of your starting point. The spell expires 2d6 horas after being cast. When that happens, travelers on the road are safely deposited near their specified destination or 50 millas from their starting point in the direction that was specified when the spell was cast. Travelers never incur agotamiento no matter how many horas they spent walking or riding on the shadow road. The temporary shadow road ceases to exist; anything left behind is lost in the shadow realm. Each casting of risen road creates a new shadow road. A small chance exists that a temporary shadow road might intersect with an existing shadow road, opening the possibility for meeting other travelers or monsters, or for choosing a different destination mid-journey. The likelihood is entirely up to the GM.

name: Rive
desc: You pull on the filaments of transition and possibility to tear at your enemigos. Choose a criatura you can see within range and make a ranged ataque de conjuro. On a hit, the objetivo recibe 5d8 daño de frío as strands of icy nothingness whip from your outstretched hand to envelop it. If the objetivo isn't native to the plane you're on, it recibe an extra 3d6 daño psíquico and debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Constitución or be aturdido until the end of its next turn.

name: Robe of Shards
desc: Deep Magic: clockwork You create a robe of metal shards, gears, and cogs that provides a base AC of 14 + your Destreza modifier. As a acción adicional while protected by a robe of shards, you can command bits of metal from a fallen foe to be absorbed by your robe; each infusion of metal increases your AC by 1, to a maximum of 18 + Destreza modifier. You can also use a acción adicional to dispel the robe, causing it to explode into a shower of volando metal that does 8d6 daño cortante, +1d6 per point of basic (non-Destreza) AC above 14, to todas las criaturas within 30 pies of you.

name: Rockfall Ward
desc: You temporarily halt the fall of up to a 10-pie cube of no mágico objects or debris, saving those who might have been crushed. The falling material's rate of descent slows to 60 pies per ronda and comes to a stop 5 pies above the ground, where it hovers until the spell ends. This spell can't prevent missile weapons from striking a objetivo, and it can't slow the descent of an object larger than a 10-pie cube. However, at the GM's discretion, it can slow the descent of a section of a larger object, such as the wall of a falling building or a section of sail and rigging tied to a falling mast.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 2nd level or higher, the cube of debris and objects you can halt increases by 5 pies for each slot level above 1st.
casting_time: 1 reaction, which you take when nonmagical debris fall within 120 feet of you

name: Rolling Thunder
desc:
A tremendous bell note explodes from your outstretched hand and rolls forward in a line 30 pies long and 5 pies wide. cada criatura in the line debe realizar a successful tirada de salvación de Constitución or be ensordecido for 1 minuto. A criatura made of material such as stone, crystal, or metal has desventaja on its tirada de salvación against this spell.

While a criatura is ensordecido in this way, it is wreathed in thundering energy; it recibe 2d8 daño de trueno at the start of its turn, and its Velocidad is halved. A ensordecido criatura can repeat the tirada de salvación at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself en un éxito.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 3rd level or higher, el daño increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 2nd.
material: a sliver of metal from a gong

name: Rope Trick
desc: Tocas una cuerda de hasta 18 metros de longitud. Uno de los extremos de la cuerda asciende por el aire hasta que toda la cuerda queda perpendicular al suelo. En el extremo superior de la cuerda, se abre una entrada invisible a un espacio extradimensional que dura hasta que el conjuro finaliza. Se puede acceder al espacio extradimensional trepando hasta lo alto de la cuerda. El espacio puede albergar hasta ocho criaturas de tamaño Mediano o más pequeñas. La cuerda puede ser introducida en el espacio, haciéndola desaparecer de la vista desde el exterior. Los ataques y conjuros no pueden cruzar la entrada hacia dentro o fuera del espacio extradimensional, pero quienes estén en su interior pueden ver hacia afuera como si miraran a través de una ventana de 1 metro por 1,5 metros centrada en la cuerda. Todo lo que haya en el espacio extradimensional cae al suelo cuando el conjuro termina.
material: Extracto de maíz en polvo y un trozo de pergamino retorcido en bucle.

name: Rope Trick
desc:
One end of the objetivo rope rises into the air until it hangs perpendicular to the ground. At the upper end, a nearly imperceptible entrance opens to an extradimensional space that can fit up to 8 Medium or smaller criaturas. The entrance can be reached by escalando the rope. Once inside, the rope can be pulled into the extradimensional space.

No spells or attacks can cross into or out of the extradimensional space. criaturas inside the extradimensional space can see out of a 3-pie-by- 5-pie window centered on its entrance. criaturas outside the space can spot the entrance with a Percepción check against your CD de salvación del conjuro. If they can alcance it, criaturas can pass in and out of the space.

When the spell ends, anything inside the extradimensional space falls to the ground.

name: Rotting Corpse
desc:
Your familiarity with the foul effects of death allows you to prevent a dead body from being returned to life using anything but the most powerful forms of magic.

You cast this spell by touching a criatura that died within the last 24 horas. The body immediately decomposes to a state that prevents the body from being returned to life by the [raise dead](https://api.open5e.com/spells/raise-dead) spell (though a [resurrection](https://api.open5e.com/spells/resurrection) spell still works). At the end of this spell’s duration, the body decomposes to a rancid slime, and it can’t be returned to life except through a [true resurrection](https://api.open5e.com/spells/true-resurrection) spell.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 3rd level or higher, you can affect one additional corpse for each slot level above 2nd.
material: a rotting piece of flesh from an undead criatura

name: Rune of Imprisonment
desc:
You trace a glowing black rune in the air which streaks toward and envelops its objetivo. Make a ranged ataque de conjuro against the objetivo. On a successful hit, the rune absorbs the objetivo criatura, leaving only the glowing rune hanging in the space the objetivo occupied. The subject can take no actions while imprisoned, nor can the subject be objetivoed or affected by any means. Any spell durations or conditions affecting the criatura are postponed until the criatura is freed. A dying criatura does not lose puntos de golpe or stabilize until freed.

A criatura adjacent to the rune can use a move action to attempt to disrupt its energies; doing so allows the imprisoned criatura to make a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría. en un éxito, this disruption negates the imprisonment and ends the effect. Disruption can be attempted only once per ronda.
material: ink

name: Sacred Flame
desc: Una radiancia similar a una llama desciende sobre una criatura que puedas ver dentro del alcance. El objetivo debe superar una tirada de salvación de Destreza o recibir 1d8 de daño radiante. El objetivo no obtiene ningún beneficio por cobertura en esta tirada de salvación.
higher_level: El daño del conjuro aumenta en 1d8 cuando alcanzas el nivel 5 (2d8), el nivel 11 (3d8) y el nivel 17 (4d8).

name: Sacred Flame
desc: As long as you can see the objetivo (even if it has cover) radiante holy flame envelops it, dealing 1d8 daño radiante.
higher_level: This spell's damage increases by 1d8 when you alcance 5th level (2d8), 11th level (3d8), and 17th level (4d8).

name: Sacrifice Pawn
desc: Sometimes one must fall so others might rise. When a friendly criatura you can see within range drops to 0 puntos de golpe, you can harness its escaping life energy to heal yourself. You regain puntos de golpe equal to the fallen criatura's level (or CR for a criatura without a level) + your spellcasting ability modifier.
casting_time: 1 reaction, which you take when a friendly creature within 60 feet drops to 0 hit points

name: Sacrificial Healing
desc: You heal another criatura's wounds by taking them upon yourself or transferring them to another willing criatura in range. Roll 4d8. The number rolled is the amount of damage healed by the objetivo and el daño you take, as its wounds close and similar damage appears on your body (or the body of the other willing objetivo of the spell).

name: Safe Transposition
desc: You cast this spell when an aliado below half its punto de golpe maximum within range is attacked. You swap places with your aliado, each of you instantly teleporting into the space the other just occupied. If there isn't room for you in the new space or for your aliado in your former space, this spell fails. After the two of you teleport, the triggering tirada de ataque is compared to your AC to determine if it hits you.
casting_time: 1 reaction, which you take when an injured ally is attacked

name: Salt Lash
desc:
You create a long, thin blade of razor-sharp salt crystals. You can wield it as a longsword, using your spellcasting ability to modify your weapon attack rolls. The sword causa 2d8 daño cortante on a hit, and any criatura struck by the blade debe realizar a successful tirada de salvación de Constitución or be aturdido by searing pain until the start of your next turn. Constructs and undead are immune to the blade’s secondary (stun) effect; plants and criaturas composed mostly of water, such as water elementals, also take an additional 2d8 daño necrótico if they fail the tirada de salvación.

The spell lasts until you stop concentrating on it, the duration expires, or you let go of the blade for any reason.
material: a pinch of salt worth 1 sp, which is consumed during the casting

name: Sanctuary
desc: Proteges a una criatura que se encuentre dentro del alcance contra los ataques. Hasta que el conjuro termine, cualquier criatura que elija a la criatura protegida como objetivo de un ataque o un conjuro dañino debe realizar primero una tirada de salvación de Sabiduría. Si falla la tirada, la criatura debe elegir un nuevo objetivo o perder el ataque o el conjuro. Este conjuro no protege a la criatura protegida de los efectos de área, como la explosión de un Fireball. Si la criatura protegida realiza un ataque o lanza un conjuro que afecte a una criatura enemiga, este conjuro termina.
material: Un pequeño espejo de plata.

name: Sanctuary
desc:
You ward a criatura against intentional harm.

Any criatura that makes an attack against or casts a harmful spell against the objetivo must first make a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría. en una salvación fallida, the attacking criatura must choose a different criatura to attack or it loses the attack or spell. This spell doesn't protect the objetivo from area effects, such as an explosion.

This spell ends early when the objetivo attacks or casts a spell that affects an enemigo criatura.

name: Sand Ship
desc: Casting **sand ship** on a water vessel up to the size of a small sailing ship transforms it into a vessel capable of sailing on sand as easily as water. The vessel still needs a trained crew and relies on wind or oars for propulsion, but it moves at its normal Velocidad across sand instead of water for the duration of the spell. It can sail only over sand, not soil or solid rock. For the duration of the spell, the vessel doesn’t float; it must be beached or resting on the bottom of a body of water (partially drawn up onto a beach, for example) when the spell is cast, or it sinks into the water.
material: a boat or ship of 10,000 gp value or less

name: Sanguine Horror
desc:
When you cast this spell, you prick yourself with the material component, taking 1 daño perforante. The spell fails if this damage is prevented or negated in any way. From the drop of blood, you conjure a [blood elemental](https://api.open5e.com/monsters/blood-elemental). The blood elemental is friendly to you and your companions for the duration. It disappears when it’s reduced to 0 puntos de golpe or when the spell ends.

Roll initiative for the elemental, which has its own turns. It obeys verbal commands from you (no action required by you). If you don’t issue any commands to the blood elemental, it defends itself but otherwise recibe no actions. If your Concentración is broken, the blood elemental doesn’t disappear, but you lose control of it and it becomes hostile to you and your companions. An uncontrolled blood elemental cannot be dismissed by you, and it disappears 1 hora after you summoned it.
material: a miniature dagger

name: Sanguine Spear
desc: You draw blood from the corpse of a criatura that has been dead for no more than 24 horas and magically fashion it into a spear of frozen blood. This functions as a +1 spear that does daño de frío instead of daño perforante. If the spear leaves your hand for more than 1 ronda, it melts and the spell ends.
higher_level: If the spell is cast with a 4th-level espacio de conjuro, it creates a +2 spear. A 6th-level espacio de conjuro creates a +3 spear.

name: Scale Rot
desc:
You summon death and decay to plague your enemigos. For dragons, this act often recibe the form of attacking a foe’s armor and scales, as a way of weakening an enemigo dragon and leaving it plagued by self-doubt and fear. (This enchantment is useful against any armored criatura, not just dragons.)

una criatura of your choice within range that has natural armor debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Constitución. If it fails, attacks against that criatura’s Clase de Armadura are made with ventaja, and the criatura can’t regain puntos de golpe through any means while the spell remains in effect. An affected criatura can end the spell by making a successful tirada de salvación de Constitución, which also makes the criatura immune to further castings of **scale rot** for 24 horas.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 5th level or higher, the number of affected objetivos increases by one for each slot level above 4th.
material: a piece of rotten meat
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Ranger, Sorcerer, Warlock, Wizard

name: Scattered Images
desc: When you cast this spell, you create illusory doubles that move when you move but in different directions, distracting and misdirecting your opponents. When scattered images is cast, 1d4 + 2 images are created. Images behave exactly as those created with mirror image, with the exceptions described here. These images remain in your space, acting as invisible or the attacker is blind, the spell has no effect.

name: Scentless
desc: You touch a willing criatura or object that is not being worn or carried. For the duration, the objetivo gives off no odor. A criatura that relies on smell has desventaja on Sabiduría (Percepción) checks to detect the objetivo and Sabiduría (Supervivencia) checks to track the objetivo. The objetivo is invisible to a criatura that relies solely on smell to sense its surroundings. This spell has no effect on objetivos with unusually strong scents, such as ghasts.
material: 1 ounce of pure water

name: Scorching Ray
desc: Creas tres rayos de fuego y los lanzas contra objetivos dentro del alcance. Puedes lanzarlos contra un solo objetivo o contra varios. Realiza un ataque de conjuro a distancia por cada rayo. Si impacta, el objetivo recibe 2d6 de daño por fuego.
higher_level: Cuando lanzas este conjuro usando un espacio de conjuro de nivel 3 o superior, creas un rayo adicional por cada nivel de espacio por encima del 2.º.

name: Scorching Ray
desc:
Three rays of blazing orange fuego shoot from your fingertips. Make a ranged ataque de conjuro for each ray.

On a hit, the objetivo recibe 2d6 daño de fuego.
higher_level: Create an additional ray for each slot level above 2nd.

name: Screaming Ray
desc: You create a ray of psíquico energy to attack your enemigos. Make a ranged ataque de conjuro against a criatura. On a hit, the objetivo recibe 1d4 daño psíquico and is ensordecido until the end of your next turn. If the objetivo succeeds on a tirada de salvación de Constitución, it is not ensordecido.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 2nd level or higher, you create one additional ray for each slot level above 1st. You can direct the rays at un objetivo or several.

name: Scribe
desc: This spell enables you to create a copy of a one-page written work by placing a blank piece of paper or parchment near the work that you are copying. All the writing, illustrations, and other elements in the original are reproduced in the new document, in your handwriting or drawing style. The new medium must be large enough to accommodate the original source. Any mágico properties of the original aren’t reproduced, so you can’t use scribe to make copies of spell scrolls or magic books.

name: Scry Ambush
desc:
You foresee your foe’s strike a split second before it occurs. When you cast this spell successfully, you also designate a number of your aliados that can see or hear you equal to your spellcasting ability modifier + your competencia bonus. Those aliados are also not surprised by the attack and can act normally in the first ronda of combat.

If you would be surprised, you debe realizar a check using your spellcasting ability at the moment your reacción would be triggered. The check CD is equal to the current initiative count. On a failed check, you are surprised and can’t use your reacción to cast this spell until after your next turn. On a successful check, you can use your reacción to cast this spell immediately.
casting_time: 1 reaction, which you take when an enemy tries to make a surprise attack against you
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Ranger, Sorcerer, Warlock, Wizard

name: Scrying
desc:
Puedes ver y escuchar a una criatura concreta que elijas y que se encuentre en el mismo plano de existencia que tú. El objetivo debe realizar una tirada de salvación de Sabiduría, la cual se modifica según lo bien que conozcas al objetivo y el tipo de conexión física que tengas con él. Si el objetivo sabe que estás lanzando este conjuro, puede fallar la tirada de salvación voluntariamente si desea ser observado.

**Conocimiento y modificador a la tirada** De oídas (has oído hablar del objetivo) +5 De primera mano (te has encontrado con el objetivo) +0 Familiar (conoces bien al objetivo) -5 **Conexión y modificador a la tirada** Semejanza o retrato -2 Posesión o prenda de vestir -4 Parte del cuerpo, mechón de cabello, trozo de uña o similar -10 
Si la tirada de salvación tiene éxito, el objetivo no se ve afectado y no puedes usar este conjuro contra él durante 24 horas. Si falla la tirada, el conjuro crea un sensor invisible a 3m del objetivo. Puedes ver y escuchar a través del sensor como si estuvieras allí. El sensor se mueve con el objetivo, permaneciendo a 3m de él durante toda la duración. Una criatura que pueda ver objetos invisibles percibe el sensor como un orbe luminoso del tamaño aproximado de tu puño. En lugar de elegir una criatura como objetivo, puedes elegir una ubicación que hayas visto anteriormente. En ese caso, el sensor aparece en dicha ubicación y no se mueve.
material: Un foco valorado en al menos 1.000 po, como una bola de cristal, un espejo de plata o una fuente llena de agua bendita.
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Paladin, Warlock, Wizard

name: Scrying
desc:
You can see and hear a specific criatura that you choose. The difficulty of the tirada de salvación for this spell is modified by your knowledge of the objetivo and whether you possess a physical item with a connection to the objetivo.

en una salvación fallida, you can see and hear the objetivo through an invisible sensor that appears within 10 pies of it and moves with the objetivo. Any criatura who can see invisibility or rolls a critical success on its tirada de salvación perceives the sensor as a fist-sized glowing orb hovering in the air. criaturas cannot see or hear you through the sensor.

If you choose to objetivo a location, the sensor appears at that location and is immobile.

name: Sculpt Snow
desc:
When you **cast sculpt** snow in an area filled with snow, you can create one Large object, two Medium objects, or four smaller objects from snow. With a casting time of 1 action, your sculptings bear only a crude resemblance to generic criaturas or objects. If you increase the casting time to 1 minuto, your creations take on a more realistic appearance and can even vaguely resemble specific criaturas; the resemblance isn’t strong enough to fool anyone, but the criatura can be recognized. The sculptures are as durable as a typical snowman.

Sculptures created by this spell can be animated with [animate objects](https://api.open5e.com/spells/animate-objects) or comparable magic. Animated sculptures gain the AC, puntos de golpe, and other attributes provided by that spell. When they attack, they deal normal damage plus a similar amount of daño de frío; an animated Medium sculpture, for example, causa 2d6 + 1 daño contundente plus 2d6 + 1 daño de frío.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 3rd level or higher, you can sculpt one additional Large object for each slot level above 2nd. Two Large objects can be replaced with one Huge object.

name: Seal Red Portal
desc: You seal a Red Portal or other dimensional gate within range, rendering it inoperable until this spell is dispelled. While the portal remains sealed in this way, it cannot be found with the locate Red Portal spell.

name: Seal of Sanctuary
desc:
You inscribe an angelic seal on the ground, the floor, or other solid surface of a structure. The seal creates a spherical sanctuary with a radius of 50 pies, centered on the seal. For the duration, aberrations, elementals, fey, fiends, and undead that approach to within 5 pies of the boundary know they are about to come into contact with a deadly barrier. If such a criatura moves so as to touch the boundary, or tries to cross the boundary by any means, including teleportation and extradimensional travel, it debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Carisma. en una salvación fallida, it recibe 10d8 daño radiante, is repelled to 5 pies outside the boundary, and can’t objetivo anything inside the boundary with attacks, spells, or abilities until the spell ends. en una salvación exitosa, the criatura recibe half as much daño radiante and can cross the boundary. If the criatura is a fiend that isn’t on its home plane, it is immediately destroyed (no tirada de salvación) instead of taking damage.

Aberrations, elementals, fey, and undead that are within 50 pies of the seal (inside the boundary) have desventaja on ability checks, attack rolls, and tirada de salvacións, and each such criatura recibe 2d8 daño radiante at the start of its turn.

criaturas other than aberrations, elementals, fey, fiends, and undead can’t be hechizado or asustado while within 50 pies of the seal.

The seal has AC 18, 50 puntos de golpe, resistance to contundente, perforante, and daño cortante, and immunity to psíquico and daño de veneno. Ranged attacks against the seal are made with desventaja. If it is scribed on the surface of an object that is later destroyed (such as a wooden door), the seal is not damaged and remains in place, perhaps suspended in midair. The spell ends only if the seal is reduced to 0 puntos de golpe.
material: incense and special inks worth 250 gp, which the spell consumes

name: Searing Equation
desc:
You briefly go into a mágico trance and whisper an alien equation which you never fully remember once the spell is complete. cada criatura in the area recibe 3d4 daño psíquico and is ensordecido for 1 ronda.

criaturas who are unable to hear the equation, immune to daño psíquico, or who have an Inteligencia score lower than 4 are immune to this spell.
higher_level: criaturas are ensordecido for 1 additional ronda for each slot level above 1st.

name: Searing Sun
desc: This spell intensifies the ligera and heat of the sun, so that it burns exposed flesh. You must be able to see the sun when you cast the spell. The searing sunlight affects a cylindrical area 50 pies in radius and 200 pies high, centered on the a point within range. cada criatura that starts its turn in that area recibe 5d8 daño de fuego, or half el daño with a successful tirada de salvación de Constitución. A criatura that’s shaded by a solid object —such as an awning, a building, or an overhanging boulder— has ventaja on the tirada de salvación. On your turn, you can use an action to move the center of the cylinder up to 20 pies along the ground in any direction.
material: a magnifying lens

name: Secret Blind
desc:
A 5-pie-radius immobile sphere springs into existence around you and remains stationary for the duration. You and up to four Medium or smaller criaturas can occupy the sphere. If its area includes a larger criatura or more than five criaturas, each larger criatura and excess criatura is pushed to an unoccupied space outside of the sphere.
  criaturas and objects within the sphere when you cast this spell may move through it freely. All other criaturas and objects are barred from passing through the sphere after it forms. Spells and other mágico effects can't extend through the sphere, with the exception of transmutation or conjuration spells and mágico effects that allow you or the criaturas inside the sphere to willingly leave it, such as the *dimension door* and *teleport* spells. The atmosphere inside the sphere is cool, dry, and filled with air, regardless of the conditions outside.
  Until the effect ends, you can command the interior to be dimly lit or dark. The sphere is opaque from the outside and covered in an illusion that makes it appear as the surrounding terrain, but it is transparent from the inside. Physical interaction with the illusion reveals it to be an illusion as the criatura touches the cool, firm surface of the sphere. A criatura that uses an action to examine the sphere can determine it is covered by an illusion with a successful Inteligencia (Investigación) check against your CD de salvación del conjuro.
  The effect ends if you leave its area, or if the sphere is hit with the *disintegration* spell or a successful *dispel magic* spell.

name: Secret Chest
desc: Ocultas un cofre y todo su contenido en el Plano Etéreo. Debes tocar el cofre y la réplica en miniatura que sirve como componente material del conjuro. El cofre puede contener hasta 12 pies cúbicos de material inerte (0,9m x 0,6m x 0,6m). Mientras el cofre permanezca en el Plano Etéreo, puedes usar una acción y tocar la réplica para traer el cofre de vuelta. Este aparece en un espacio desocupado sobre el suelo a 1,5m o menos de ti. Puedes enviar el cofre de vuelta al Plano Etéreo usando una acción y tocando tanto el cofre como la réplica. Tras 60 días, existe una probabilidad acumulativa del 5% por día de que el efecto del conjuro termine. Este efecto termina si lanzas este conjuro de nuevo, si la réplica en miniatura del cofre es destruida, o si decides terminar el conjuro como una acción. Si el conjuro termina y el cofre grande se encuentra en el Plano Etéreo, se pierde de forma irrecuperable.
material: Un cofre exquisito de 0,9m x 0,6m x 0,6m, construido con materiales raros valorados en al menos 5.000 po, y una réplica de tamaño Diminuto fabricada con los mismos materiales valorada en al menos 50 po.

name: Secret Chest
desc:
You stash a chest and its contents on the Ethereal Plane. To do so, you must touch the chest and its Tiny replica. The chest can hold up to 12 cubic pies of nonliving matter. Food stored in the chest spoils after 1 day.

While the chest is in the Ethereal Plane, you can recall it to you at any point by using an action to touch the Tiny replica. The chest reappears in an unoccupied space on the ground within 5 pies of you. You can use an action at any time to return the chest to the Ethereal Plane so long as you are touching both the chest and its Tiny replica.

This effect ends if you cast the spell again on a different chest, if the replica is destroyed, or if you use an action to end the spell. After 60 days without being recalled, there is a cumulative 5% chance per day that the spell effect will end. If for whatever reason the spell ends while the chest is still in the Ethereal Plane, the chest and all of its contents are lost.

name: See Beyond
desc:
This spell enables a willing criatura you touch to see through any obstructions as if they were transparent. For the duration, the objetivo can see into and through opaque objects, criaturas, spells, and effects that obstruct line of sight to a range of 30 pies. Inside that distance, the criatura can choose what it perceives as opaque and what it perceives as transparent as freely and as naturally as it can shift its focus from nearby to distant objects.

Although the criatura can see any objetivo within 30 pies of itself, all other requirements must still be satisfied before casting a spell or making an attack against that objetivo. For example, the criatura can see an enemigo that has total cover but can’t shoot that enemigo with an arrow because the cover physically prevents it. That enemigo could be objetivoed by a [geas](https://api.open5e.com/spells/geas) spell, however, because [geas](https://api.open5e.com/spells/geas) needs only a visible objetivo.
material: a transparent crystal

name: See Invisibility
desc: Durante la duración del conjuro, ves las criaturas y los objetos invisibles como si fueran visibles, y puedes ver a través del Plano Etéreo. Los objetos y criaturas etéreos aparecen con un aspecto fantasmagórico y translúcido.
material: Una pizca de talco y una pequeña cantidad de polvo de plata.

name: See Invisibility
desc: You can see invisible criaturas and objects, and you can see into the Ethereal Plane. Ethereal criaturas and objects appear translucent.

name: Seed Bomb
desc:
Up to four seeds appear in your hand and are infused with magic for the duration. As an action, a criatura can throw one of these seeds at a point up to 60 pies away. cada criatura within 5 pies of that point makes a tirada de salvación de Destreza or recibe 4d6 daño perforante. Depending on the material component used, a seed bomb also causes one of the following additional effects: Pinecone. Seed shrapnel explodes outward.

A criatura in the area of the exploding seed bomb makes a tirada de salvación de Constitución or it is cegado until the end of its next turn.

Sunflower. Seeds enlarge into a blanket of pointy needles. The area affected by the exploding seed bomb becomes difficult terrain for the next minuto.

Tumbleweed. The weeds unravel to latch around criaturas. A criatura in the area of the exploding seed bomb makes a tirada de salvación de Destreza or it becomes agarrado until the end of its next turn.
higher_level: el daño increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 2nd.

name: Seed of Destruction
desc:
This spell impregnates a living criatura with a rapidly gestating [hydra](https://api.open5e.com/spells/hydra) that consumes the objetivo from within before emerging to wreak havoc on the world. Make a ranged ataque de conjuro against a living criatura within range that you can see. On a hit, you implant a five‑headed embryonic growth into the criatura. Roll 1d3 + 1 to determine how many rondas it recibe the embryo to mature.

During the rondas when the embryo is gestating, the affected criatura recibe 5d4 daño cortante at the start of its turn, or half el daño with a successful tirada de salvación de Constitución.

When the gestation period has elapsed, a tiny hydra erupts from the objetivo’s abdomen at the start of your turn. The hydra appears in an unoccupied space adjacent to the objetivo and immediately grows into a full-size Huge aberration. Nearby criaturas are pushed away to clear a sufficient space as the hydra grows. This criatura is a standard hydra, but with the ability to cast [bane](https://api.open5e.com/spells/bane) as an action (CD de salvación del conjuro 11) requiring no spell components. Roll initiative for the hydra, which recibe its own turns. It obeys verbal commands that you issue to it (no action required by you). If you don’t give it a command or it can’t follow your command, the hydra attacks the nearest living criatura.

At the end of each of the hydra’s turns, you debe realizar a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Carisma. en una salvación exitosa, the hydra remains under your control and friendly to you and your companions. en una salvación fallida, your control ends, the hydra becomes hostile to todas las criaturas, and it attacks the nearest criatura to the best of its ability.

The hydra disappears at the end of the spell’s duration, or its existence can be cut short with a [wish](https://api.open5e.com/spells/wish) spell or comparable magic, but nothing less. The embryo can be destroyed before it reaches maturity by using a [dispel magic](https://api.open5e.com/spells/dispel-magic) spell under the normal rules for dispelling high-level magic.
material: five teeth from a still-living humanoid and a vial of the caster’s blood
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Paladin, Ranger, Sorcerer, Warlock, Wizard

name: Seeming
desc: Este conjuro te permite cambiar la apariencia de cualquier número de criaturas que puedas ver dentro del alcance. A cada objetivo que elijas le otorgas una apariencia nueva e ilusoria. Un objetivo no dispuesto puede realizar una tirada de salvación de Carisma y, si tiene éxito, no se ve afectado por este conjuro. El conjuro disfraza la apariencia física, así como la ropa, la armadura, las armas y el equipo. Puedes hacer que cada criatura parezca 30 centímetros más baja o más alta, y que aparente ser delgada, corpulenta o cualquier punto intermedio. No puedes cambiar el tipo de cuerpo de un objetivo, por lo que debes elegir una forma que tenga la misma disposición básica de extremidades. Más allá de eso, el alcance de la ilusión queda a tu criterio. El conjuro dura mientras se mantenga su duración, a menos que uses tu acción para disiparla antes. Los cambios producidos por este conjuro no resisten una inspección física. Por ejemplo, si usas este conjuro para añadir un sombrero al atuendo de una criatura, los objetos atraviesan el sombrero y cualquiera que lo toque no sentirá nada o sentirá la cabeza y el cabello de la criatura. Si usas este conjuro para aparentar ser más delgado de lo que eres, la mano de alguien que intente tocarte chocará contigo cuando aparentemente aún esté en el aire. Una criatura puede usar su acción para inspeccionar a un objetivo y realizar una prueba de Inteligencia (Investigación) contra la CD de salvación de tus conjuros. Si tiene éxito, descubre que el objetivo está disfrazado.

name: Seeming
desc:
Until the spell ends or you use an action to dispel it, you can change the appearance of the objetivos. The spell disguises their clothing, weapons, and items as well as changes to their physical appearance. An unwilling objetivo can make a tirada de salvación de Carisma to avoid being affected by the spell.

You can alter the appearance of the objetivo as you see fit, including but not limited to: its heritage, 1 pie of height, weight, clothing, tattoos, piercings, facial features, hair style and length, skin and eye coloration, sex and any other distinguishing features.

You cannot disguise the objetivo as a criatura of a different size category, and its limb structure remains the same; for example if it's bipedal, you can't use this spell to make it appear as a quadruped.

The disguise does not hold up to physical inspection. A criatura that tries to grab an illusory hat, for example, finds its hand passes straight through the figment. To see through your disguise without such an inspection, a criatura must use its action to make an Investigación check against your CD de salvación del conjuro.

name: Seeping Death
desc:
Your touch inflicts a virulent, flesh-eating disease. Make a melee ataque de conjuro against a criatura within your alcance. On a hit, the criatura’s Destreza score is reduced by 1d4, and it is afflicted with the seeping death disease for the duration.

Since this spell induces a natural disease in its objetivo, any effect that removes a disease or otherwise ameliorates a disease’s effects apply to it and can end the spell early.

***Seeping Death.*** The criatura’s flesh is slowly liquefied by a lingering necrótico pestilence. At the end of each descanso largo, the diseased criatura debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Constitución or its Destreza score is reduced by 1d4. The reduction lasts until the objetivo finishes a descanso largo after the disease is cured. If the disease reduces the criatura’s Destreza to 0, the criatura dies.

name: Seer’s Reaction
desc: Your foreknowledge allows you to act before others, because you knew what was going to happen. When you cast this spell, make a new initiative roll with a +5 bonus. If the result is higher than your current initiative, your place in the initiative order changes accordingly. If the result is also higher than the current place in the initiative order, you take your next turn immediately and then use the higher number starting in the next ronda.
casting_time: 1 reaction, which you take at the start of another creature’s turn
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Ranger, Sorcerer, Wizard

name: Selfish Wish
desc: The selfish wish grants the desires of a supplicant in exchange for power. Like a wish for a great increase in Fuerza may come with an equal reduction in Inteligencia). In exchange for casting the selfish wish, the caster also receives an influx of power. The caster receives the following bonuses for 2 minutos: Doubled Velocidad one extra action each ronda (as haste) Clase de Armadura increases by 3

name: Semblance of Dread
desc:
You adopt the visage of the faceless god Nyarlathotep. For the duration, any criatura within 10 pies of you and able to see you can’t willingly move closer to you unless it makes a successful tirada de salvación de Sabiduría at the start of its turn. Constructs and undead are immune to this effect.

For the duration of the spell, you also gain vulnerability to daño radiante and have ventaja on tirada de salvacións against effects that cause the asustado condition.
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Paladin, Ranger, Sorcerer, Warlock, Wizard

name: Sending
desc: Envías un breve mensaje de veinticinco palabras o menos a una criatura con la que estés familiarizado. La criatura escucha el mensaje en su mente, te reconoce como el remitente si te conoce y puede responderte de igual manera de forma inmediata. El conjuro permite que las criaturas con una puntuación de Inteligencia de al menos 1 comprendan el significado de tu mensaje. Puedes enviar el mensaje a cualquier distancia e incluso a otros planos de existencia, pero si el objetivo se encuentra en un plano diferente al tuyo, hay un 5 por ciento de probabilidad de que el mensaje no llegue.
material: Un trozo corto de fino hilo de cobre.

name: Sending
desc: You send a message of 25 words or less to the objetivo. It recognizes you as the sender and can reply immediately in kind. The message travels across any distance and into other planes of existence. If the objetivo is on a different plane of existence than you, there is a 5% chance it doesn't receive your message. A objetivo with an Inteligencia score of at least 1 entiende your message as you intend it (whether you share a language or not).

name: Sequester
desc: Mediante este conjuro, una criatura dispuesta o un objeto pueden quedar ocultos, a salvo de cualquier detección durante la duración. Cuando lanzas el conjuro y tocas el objetivo, este se vuelve invisible y no puede ser objetivo de conjuros de adivinación ni percibido a través de sensores de observación creados por conjuros de adivinación. Si el objetivo es una criatura, cae en un estado de animación suspendida. El tiempo deja de transcurrir para ella y no envejece. Puedes establecer una condición para que el conjuro termine antes de tiempo. La condición puede ser cualquier cosa que elijas, pero debe ocurrir o ser visible dentro de 1,5 kilómetros del objetivo. Algunos ejemplos serían "tras 1.000 años" o "cuando el tarrasque despierte". Este conjuro también termina si el objetivo recibe cualquier daño.
material: Un polvo compuesto de polvo de diamante, esmeralda, rubí y zafiro con un valor de al menos 5.000 po, que el conjuro consume.

name: Sequester
desc:
You magically hide away a willing criatura or object. The objetivo becomes invisible, and it cannot be traced or detected by divination or scrying sensors. If the objetivo is a living criatura, it falls into a state of suspended animation and stops aging.

The spell ends when the objetivo recibe damage or a condition you set occurs. The condition can be anything you choose, like a set amount of time or a specific event, but it must occur within or be visible within 1 milla of the objetivo.

name: Shade
desc: You create a mágico screen across your eyes. While the screen remains, you are immune to blindness caused by visible effects, such as [color spray](https://api.open5e.com/spells/color-spray). The spell doesn’t alleviate blindness that’s already been inflicted on you. If you normally suffer penalties on attacks or ability checks while in sunlight, those penalties don’t apply while you’re under the effect of this spell.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 3rd level or higher, the duration of the spell increases by 10 minutos for each slot level above 2nd.

name: Shadow Adaptation
desc: Your flesh and clothing pale and become faded as your body recibe on a tiny fragment of the Shadow Realm. For the duration of this spell, you are immune to shadow corruption and have resistance to daño necrótico. In addition, you have ventaja on tirada de salvacións against effects that reduce your Fuerza score or punto de golpe maximum, such as a shadow's Fuerza Drain or the harm spell.

name: Shadow Armor
desc: You can siphon energy from the plane of shadow to protect yourself from an immediate threat. As a reacción, you pull shadows around yourself to distort reality. The attack against you is made with desventaja, and you have resistance to daño radiante until the start of your next turn.
casting_time: 1 reaction, which you take when you are targeted by an attack but before the roll is made

name: Shadow Bite
desc: You create a momentary needle of frío, sharp pain in a criatura within range. The objetivo debe realizar a successful tirada de salvación de Constitución or take 1d6 daño necrótico immediately and have its Velocidad halved until the start of your next turn.
higher_level: This spell’s damage increases to 2d6 when you alcance 5th level, 3d6 when you alcance 11th level, and 4d6 when you alcance 17th level.

name: Shadow Blindness
desc: You make a melee ataque de conjuro against a criatura you touch that has visión en la oscuridad as an innate ability; on a hit, the objetivo’s visión en la oscuridad is negated until the spell ends. This spell has no effect against visión en la oscuridad that derives from a spell or a magic item. The objetivo retains all of its other senses.

name: Shadow Hands
desc: A freezing blast of shadow explodes out from you in a 10-pie cone. Any criatura caught in the shadow recibe 2d4 daño necrótico and is asustado; a successful tirada de salvación de Sabiduría halves el daño and negates the asustado condition.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 2nd level or higher, el daño dealt by the attack increases by 2d4 for each slot level above 1st.

name: Shadow Monsters
desc: You choose up to two criaturas within range. cada criatura debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría. en una salvación fallida, the criatura perceives its aliados as hostile, shadowy monsters, and it must attack its nearest aliado. An affected criatura can repeat the tirada de salvación at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself en un éxito.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 5th level or higher, you can objetivo one additional criatura for each slot level above 4th.
material: a doll

name: Shadow Puppets
desc: You animate the shadow of a criatura within range, causing it to attack that criatura. As a acción adicional when you cast the spell, or as an action on subsequent rondas while you maintain Concentración, make a melee ataque de conjuro against the criatura. If it hits, the objetivo recibe 2d8 daño psíquico and debe realizar a successful tirada de salvación de Inteligencia or be incapacitado until the start of your next turn.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 3rd level or higher, el daño increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 2nd.
material: a pinch of powdered lead

name: Shadow Realm Gateway
desc: By drawing a circle of black chalk up to 15 pies in diameter and chanting for one minuto, you open a portal directly into the Shadow Realm. The portal fills the chalk circle and appears as a vortex of inky blackness; nothing can be seen through it. Any object or criatura that passes through the portal instantly arrives safely in the Shadow Realm. The portal remains open for one minuto or until you lose Concentración on it, and it can be used to travel between the Shadow Realm and the chalk circle, in both directions, as many times as desired during the spell's duration. This spell can only be cast as a ritual.

name: Shadow Spawn
desc: Casting this spell consumes the corpse of a criatura and creates a shadowy duplicate of it. The criatura returns as a shadow beast. The shadow beast has dim memories of its former life and retains free will; casters are advised to be ready to make an attractive offer to the newly-risen shadow beast, to gain its cooperation.

name: Shadow Tree
desc:
This spell temporarily draws a willow tree from the Shadow Realm to the location you designate within range. The tree is 5 pies in diameter and 20 pies tall.
  When you cast the spell, you can specify individuals who can interact with the tree. All other criaturas see the tree as a shadow version of itself and can't grasp or climb it, passing through its shadowy substance. A criatura that can interact with the tree and that has Sunlight Sensitivity or Sunlight Hypersensitivity is protected from sunlight while within 20 pies of the tree. A criatura that can interact with the tree can climb into its branches, giving the criatura half cover.

name: Shadow Trove
desc: You paint a small door approximately 2 pies square on a hard surface to create a portal into the void of space. The portal “peels off” the surface you painted it on and follows you when you move, always floating in the air within 5 pies of you. An icy chill flows out from the portal. You can place up to 750 pounds of nonliving matter in the portal, where it stays suspended in the frigid void until you withdraw it. Items that are still inside the shadow trove when the duration ends spill out onto the ground. You can designate a number of criaturas up to your Inteligencia modifier who have access to the shadow trove; only you and those criaturas can move objects into the portal.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 4th level or higher, the duration increases by 2 horas for each slot level above 3rd.
material: ink made from the blood of a raven

name: Shadow's Brand
desc:
You draw a rune or inscription no larger than your hand on the objetivo. The objetivo debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Constitución or be branded with the mark on a location of your choosing. The brand appears as an unintelligible mark to most criaturas. Those who understand the Umbral language recognize it as a mark indicating the objetivo is an enemigo of the shadow fey. Shadow fey who view the brand see it outlined in a faint glow. The brand can be hidden by mundane means, such as clothing, but it can be removed only by the *remove curse* spell.
  While branded, the objetivo has desventaja on ability checks when interacting socially with shadow fey.
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Ranger, Sorceror, Warlock, Wizard

name: Shadows Brought to Light
desc:
If a criatura you designate within range fails a tirada de salvación de Carisma, you cause the objetivo’s shadow to come to life and reveal one of the criatura’s most scandalous secrets: some fact that the objetivo would not want widely known (GM’s choice). When casting the spell, you choose whether everyone present will hear the secret, in which case the shadow speaks loudly in a twisted version of the objetivo’s voice, or if the secret is whispered only to you. The shadow speaks in the objetivo’s native language.

If the objetivo does not have a scandalous secret or does not have a spoken language, the spell fails as if the criatura’s tirada de salvación had succeeded.

If the secret was spoken aloud, the objetivo recibe a −2 penalty to Carisma checks involving anyone who was present when it was revealed. This penalty lasts until you finish a descanso largo.

***Ritual Focus.*** If you expend your ritual focus, the objetivo has desventaja on Carisma checks instead of taking the −2 penalty.
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Paladin, Warlock, Wizard

name: Shadowy Retribution
desc:
You fill a small silver cup with your own blood (taking 1d4 daño perforante) while chanting vile curses in the dark. Once the chant is completed, you consume the blood and swear an oath of vengeance against any who harm you.

If you are reduced to 0 puntos de golpe, your oath is invoked; a shadow materializes within 5 pies of you. The shadow attacks the criatura that reduced you to 0 puntos de golpe, ignoring all other objetivos, until it or the objetivo is slain, at which point the shadow dissipates into nothing.
higher_level:
When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 5th level or higher, an additional shadow is conjured for each slot level above 4th.

***Ritual Focus.*** If you expend your ritual focus, the spell summons a banshee instead of a shadow. If you also use a higher-level espacio de conjuro, additional undead are still shadows.
material: a small silver cup filled with the caster’s blood

name: Shapechange
desc: Adoptas la forma de una criatura diferente durante la duración. La nueva forma puede ser la de cualquier criatura con un índice de desafío igual a tu nivel o inferior. La criatura no puede ser un constructo ni un no muerto, y debes haber visto ese tipo de criatura al menos una vez. Te transformas en un ejemplar promedio de esa criatura, sin niveles de clase ni el rasgo Lanzamiento de conjuros. Tus estadísticas de juego son reemplazadas por las estadísticas de la criatura elegida, aunque conservas tu alineamiento y tus puntuaciones de Inteligencia, Sabiduría y Carisma. También conservas todas tus competencias en habilidades y tiradas de salvación, además de adquirir las de la criatura. Si la criatura tiene la misma competencia que tú y el bonificador indicado en sus estadísticas es superior al tuyo, usa el bonificador de la criatura en lugar del tuyo. No puedes usar ninguna acción legendaria ni acción de guarida de la nueva forma. Adoptas los puntos de golpe y los Dados de Golpe de la nueva forma. Cuando vuelves a tu forma normal, recuperas el número de puntos de golpe que tenías antes de transformarte. Si regresas a tu forma normal como resultado de caer a 0 puntos de golpe, cualquier daño sobrante se traslada a tu forma normal. Siempre que el daño sobrante no reduzca tu forma normal a 0 puntos de golpe, no caes inconsciente. Conservas el beneficio de cualquier rasgo proveniente de tu clase, raza u otra fuente y puedes utilizarlos, siempre que tu nueva forma sea físicamente capaz de hacerlo. No puedes usar ningún sentido especial que poseas (por ejemplo, visión en la oscuridad) a menos que tu nueva forma también tenga ese sentido. Solo puedes hablar si la criatura normalmente puede hablar. Cuando te transformas, eliges si tu equipo cae al suelo, se fusiona con la nueva forma o es llevado puesto por ella. El equipo llevado puesto funciona con normalidad. El DM determina si resulta práctico que la nueva forma lleve puesto un objeto de equipo, según la forma y el tamaño de la criatura. Tu equipo no cambia de forma ni de tamaño para adaptarse a la nueva forma, y cualquier equipo que la nueva forma no pueda llevar puesto debe caer al suelo o fusionarse con tu nueva forma. El equipo fusionado no tiene ningún efecto en ese estado. Durante la duración de este conjuro, puedes usar tu acción para adoptar una forma diferente siguiendo las mismas restricciones y reglas que para la forma original, con una excepción: si tu nueva forma tiene más puntos de golpe que tu forma actual, tus puntos de golpe permanecen en su valor actual.
material: Un aro de jade con un valor de al menos 1.500 po, que debes colocarte en la cabeza antes de lanzar el conjuro.

name: Shapechange
desc:
You assume the form of a criatura of a Challenge Rating equal to or lower than your level. The criatura cannot be an undead or a construct, and it must be a criatura you have seen. You change into the average version of that criatura, and do not gain any class levels or the Spellcasting trait.

Until the spell ends or you are dropped to 0 puntos de golpe, your game statistics (including your puntos de golpe) are replaced by the statistics of the chosen criatura, though you keep your Carisma, Inteligencia, and Sabiduría scores. You also keep your skill and tirada de salvación proficiencies as well as gaining the criatura's. However, if you share a competencia with the criatura, and the criatura's bonus is higher than yours, you use the criatura's bonus. You keep all of your features, skills, and traits gained from your class, heritage, culture, background, or other sources, and can use them as long as the criatura is physically capable of doing so. You do not keep any special senses, such as visión en la oscuridad, unless the criatura also has them. You can only speak if the criatura is typically capable of speech. You cannot use legendary actions or lair actions. Your gear melds into the new form. Equipment that merges with your form has no effect until you leave the form.

When you revert to your normal form, you return to the number of puntos de golpe you had before you transformed. If the spell's effect on you ends early from dropping to 0 puntos de golpe, any excess damage carries over to your normal form and knocks you inconsciente if el daño reduces you to 0 puntos de golpe.

Until the spell ends, you can use an action to change into another form of your choice. The new form follows all the rules as the previous form, with one exception: if the new form has more puntos de golpe than your previous form, your puntos de golpe remain at their previous value.

name: Shared Frenzy
desc: You yell defiantly as part of casting this spell to encourage a battle fury among your aliados. Each friendly criatura in range debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Carisma; a criatura can choose to fail this tirada de salvación if it wishes. If a criatura fails its tirada de salvación, it has resistance to contundente, perforante, and daño cortante and has ventaja on attack rolls for the duration. However, attack rolls made against an affected criatura have ventaja.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 4th level or higher, this spell no longer causes criaturas to have ventaja against the spell's objetivos.

name: Shared Sacrifice
desc: You and up to five of your aliados within range contribute part of your life fuerza to create a pool that can be used for healing. Each objetivo recibe 5 daño necrótico (which can’t be reduced but can be healed normally), and those donated puntos de golpe are channeled into a reservoir of life essence. As an action, any criatura who contributed to the pool of puntos de golpe can heal another criatura by touching it and drawing puntos de golpe from the pool into the injured criatura. The injured criatura heals a number of puntos de golpe equal to your spellcasting ability modifier, and the puntos de golpe in the pool decrease by the same amount. This process can be repeated until the pool is exhausted or the spell’s duration expires.

name: Shatter
desc: Un repentino y ensordecedor estruendo, de una intensidad dolorosa, surge desde un punto de tu elección dentro del alcance. Cada criatura en una esfera de 3 metros de radio centrada en ese punto debe realizar una tirada de salvación de Constitución. Una criatura sufre 3d8 de daño por trueno si falla la tirada de salvación, o la mitad del daño si la supera. Una criatura compuesta de material inorgánico, como piedra, cristal o metal, tiene desventaja en esta tirada de salvación. Un objeto no mágico que no esté siendo llevado puesto o transportado también sufre el daño si se encuentra en el área del conjuro.
higher_level: Cuando lanzas este conjuro usando un espacio de conjuro de nivel 3 o superior, el daño aumenta en 1d8 por cada nivel de espacio por encima del 2.°.
material: Un fragmento de mica.

name: Shatter
desc:
An ear-splitting ringing sound emanates through the area. criaturas in the area take 3d8 daño de trueno. A criatura made of stone, metal, or other inorganic material has desventaja on its tirada de salvación.

Any no mágico items within the area that are not worn or carried also take damage.
higher_level: el daño increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 2nd.

name: Shattering Barrage
desc:
You create three orbs of jagged broken glass and hurl them at objetivos within range. You can hurl them at un objetivo or several.

Make a ranged ataque de conjuro for each orb. On a hit, the objetivo recibe 2d4 daño cortante and the shards of broken glass remain suspended in midair, filling the area they occupy (or 5 pies of the space they occupy if the criatura is Large-sized or larger) with shards of suspended broken glass. Whenever a criatura enters an area of broken glass for the first time or starts its turn there, it debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Destreza or take 2d4 daño cortante.

The shards of broken glass dissolve into harmless wisps of sand and blow away after 1 minuto.
higher_level: You create one additional orb for each slot level above 2nd.

name: Sheen of Ice
desc: A small icy globe shoots from your finger to a point within range and then explodes in a spray of ice. cada criatura within 20 pies of that point debe realizar a successful tirada de salvación de Destreza or become coated in ice for 1 minuto. Ice-coated criaturas move at half Velocidad. An invisible criatura becomes outlined by the ice so that it loses the benefits of invisibility while the ice remains. The spell ends for a specific criatura if that criatura recibe 5 or more daño de fuego.
material: water within a glass globe

name: Shield
desc: Una barrera invisible de fuerza mágica aparece y te protege. Hasta el inicio de tu siguiente turno, obtienes un bonificador de +5 a la CA, incluyendo contra el ataque que activó el conjuro, y no recibes daño de magic missile.

name: Shield
desc: You create a shimmering arcane barrier between yourself and an oncoming attack. Until the spell ends, you gain a +5 bonus to your AC (including against the triggering attack) and any magic missile objetivoing you is harmlessly deflected.

name: Shield of Faith
desc: Un campo centelleante aparece y rodea a una criatura de tu elección dentro del alcance, otorgándole un bonificador de +2 a la CA durante la duración.
material: Un pequeño pergamino con un fragmento de texto sagrado escrito en él.

name: Shield of Faith
desc: Until the spell ends, a barrier of divine energy envelops the objetivo and increases its AC by +2.
higher_level: The bonus to AC increases by +1 for every three slot levels above 1st.

name: Shield of Star and Shadow
desc: You wrap yourself in a protective shroud of the night sky made from swirling shadows punctuated with twinkling motes of ligera. The shroud grants you resistance against either radiante or daño necrótico (choose when the spell is cast). You also shed dim ligera in a 10-pie radius. You can end the spell early by using an action to dismiss it.

name: Shifting the Odds
desc: By wrapping yourself in strands of chaotic energy, you gain ventaja on the next tirada de ataque or ability check that you make. Fate is a cruel mistress, however, and her scales must always be balanced. The second tirada de ataque or ability check (whichever occurs first) that you make after casting **shifting the odds** is made with desventaja.

name: Shillelagh
desc: La madera de un garrote o un bastón que estés sosteniendo queda imbuida con el poder de la naturaleza. Durante la duración, puedes usar tu característica de lanzamiento de conjuros en lugar de Fuerza para las tiradas de ataque y daño de los ataques cuerpo a cuerpo realizados con dicha arma, y el dado de daño del arma se convierte en un d8. El arma también se vuelve mágica, si no lo era ya. El conjuro termina si lo lanzas de nuevo o si sueltas el arma.
material: Muérdago, una hoja de trébol y un garrote o bastón.

name: Shillelagh
desc: You imbue the objetivo with Naturaleza's mágico energy. Until the spell ends, the objetivo becomes a mágico weapon (if it wasn't already), its damage becomes 1d8, and you can use your spellcasting ability instead of Fuerza for ataque cuerpo a cuerpo and damage rolls made using it. The spell ends if you cast it again or let go of the objetivo.

name: Shiver
desc: You fill a humanoid criatura with such frío that its teeth begin to chatter and its body shakes uncontrollably. Roll 5d8; the total is the maximum puntos de golpe of a criatura this spell can affect. The affected criatura debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Constitución, or it cannot cast a spell or load a missile weapon until the end of your next turn. Once a criatura has been affected by this spell, it is immune to further castings of this spell for 24 horas.
higher_level: The maximum puntos de golpe you can affect increases by 4d8 when you alcance 5th level (9d8), 11th level (13d8), and 17th level (17d8).
material: humanoid tooth

name: Shocking Grasp
desc: Un rayo surge de tu mano para descargar una sacudida eléctrica sobre una criatura a la que intentas tocar. Realiza un ataque de conjuro cuerpo a cuerpo contra el objetivo. Tienes ventaja en la tirada de ataque si el objetivo lleva armadura de metal. Si impactas, el objetivo recibe 1d8 de daño eléctrico y no puede realizar reacciones hasta el inicio de su siguiente turno.
higher_level: El daño del conjuro aumenta en 1d8 cuando alcanzas el nivel 5 (2d8), el nivel 11 (3d8) y el nivel 17 (4d8).

name: Shocking Grasp
desc: Electricity arcs from your hand to shock the objetivo. Make a melee ataque de conjuro (with ventaja if the objetivo is wearing armor made of metal). On a hit, you deal 1d8 daño de rayo, and the objetivo can't take reactions until the start of its next turn as the electricity courses through its body.
higher_level: This spell's damage increases by 1d8 when you alcance 5th level (2d8), 11th level (3d8), and 17th level (4d8).

name: Shocking Volley
desc: You draw back and release an imaginary bowstring while aiming at a point you can see within range. Bolts of arrow-shaped rayo shoot from the imaginary bow, and cada criatura within 20 pies of that point debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Destreza. en una salvación fallida, a criatura recibe 2d8 daño de rayo and is incapacitado until the end of its next turn. en una salvación exitosa, a criatura recibe half as much damage.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 3rd level or higher, el daño increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 2nd.

name: Shroud of Death
desc: You call up a black veil of necrótico energy that devours the living. You draw on the life energy of all living criaturas within 30 pies of you that you can see. When you cast the spell, every living criatura within 30 pies of you that you can see recibe 1 daño necrótico, and all those puntos de golpe transfer to you as temporary puntos de golpe. el daño and the temporary puntos de golpe increase to 2 per criatura at the start of your second turn concentrating on the spell, 3 per criatura at the start of your third turn, and so on. All living criaturas you can see within 30 pies of you at the start of each of your turns are affected. A criatura can avoid the effect by moving more than 30 pies away from you or by getting out of your line of sight, but it becomes susceptible again if the necessary conditions are met. The temporary puntos de golpe last until the spell ends.
material: a piece of ice

name: Sidestep Arrow
desc: With a few perfectly timed steps, you interpose a foe between you and danger. You cast this spell when an enemigo makes a ataque a distancia or a ranged ataque de conjuro against you but before the attack is resolved. At least one other foe must be within 10 pies of you when you cast **sidestep arrow**. As part of casting the spell, you can move up to 15 pies to a place where an enemigo lies between you and the attacker. If no such location is available, the spell has no effect. You must be able to move (not apresado or agarrado or prevented from moving for any other reason), and this move does not provoke opportunity attacks. After you move, the ataque a distancia is resolved with the intervening foe as the objetivo instead of you.
casting_time: 1 reaction, which you take when an enemy targets you with a ranged attack
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Ranger, Sorcerer, Warlock, Wizard

name: Sightburst
desc: A wave of echoing sound emanates from you. Until the start of your next turn, you have vista ciega out to a range of 100 pies, and you know the location of any natural hazards within that area. You have ventaja on tirada de salvacións made against hazards detected with this spell.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 3rd level or higher, the duration is Concentración, up to 1 minuto. When you use a espacio de conjuro of 5th level or higher, the duration is Concentración, up to 10 minutos. When you use a espacio de conjuro of 7th level or higher, the duration is Concentración, up to 1 hora.

name: Sign of Koth
desc:
