You invoke the twilight citadels of Koth to create a field of mágico energy in the shape of a 60-pie-radius, 60-pie‑tall cylinder centered on you. The only visible evidence of this field is a black rune that appears on every doorway, window, or other portal inside the area.

Choose one of the following criatura types: aberration, beast, Celestial, dragon, elemental, fey, fiend, Gigante, humanoid, monstrosity, ooze, plant, or undead. The sign affects criaturas of the chosen type (including you, if applicable) in the following ways:
* The criaturas can’t willingly enter the cylinder’s area by no mágico means; the cylinder acts as an invisible, impenetrable wall of fuerza. If an affected criatura tries to enter the cylinder’s area by using teleportation, a dimensional shortcut, or other mágico means, it debe realizar a successful tirada de salvación de Carisma or the attempt fails.
* They cannot hear any sounds that originate inside the cylinder.
* They have desventaja on attack rolls against objetivos inside the cylinder.
* They can’t charm, frighten, or possess criaturas inside the cylinder.
criaturas that aren’t affected by the field and that take a descanso corto inside it regain twice the usual number of puntos de golpe for each Hit Die spent at the end of the rest.

When you cast this spell, you can choose to reverse its magic; doing this will prevent affected criaturas from leaving the area instead of from entering it, make them unable to hear sounds that originate outside the cylinder, and so forth. In this case, the field provides no benefit for taking a descanso corto.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 8th level or higher, the radius increases by 30 pies for each slot level above 7th.
material: a platinum dagger and a powdered black pearl worth 500 gp, which the spell consumes
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Paladin, Ranger, Sorcerer, Warlock, Wizard

name: Silence
desc: Durante la duración, no puede crearse ningún sonido dentro de una esfera de 6 m de radio centrada en un punto que elijas dentro del alcance, ni puede atravesarla. Cualquier criatura u objeto que se encuentre completamente dentro de la esfera es inmune al daño sónico, y las criaturas quedan ensordecidas mientras permanezcan completamente en su interior. Lanzar un conjuro que incluya un componente verbal es imposible en ese espacio.
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Ranger, Ritual Caster

name: Silence
desc:
Until the spell ends, a bubble of silence envelops the area, and no sound can travel in or out of it.

While in the area a criatura is ensordecido and immune to daño de trueno. Casting a spell that requires a vocalized component is impossible while within the area.

name: Silent Image
desc: Creas la imagen de un objeto, una criatura u otro fenómeno visible que no ocupe más de un cubo de 4,5m. La imagen aparece en un punto dentro del alcance y dura lo que dure el conjuro. La imagen es puramente visual; no va acompañada de sonido, olor ni ningún otro efecto sensorial. Puedes usar tu acción para desplazar la imagen a cualquier punto dentro del alcance. A medida que la imagen cambia de posición, puedes alterar su apariencia para que sus movimientos resulten naturales. Por ejemplo, si creas la imagen de una criatura y la desplazas, puedes modificarla para que parezca que está caminando. La interacción física con la imagen revela que se trata de una ilusión, ya que los objetos pueden atravesarla. Una criatura que use su acción para examinar la imagen puede determinar que es una ilusión superando una prueba de Inteligencia (Investigación) contra la CD de salvación de tu conjuro. Si una criatura reconoce la ilusión por lo que es, puede ver a través de la imagen.
material: Un poco de lana de oveja.

name: Silent Image
desc:
You create an illusory image of a criatura, object, or other visible effect within the area. The illusion is purely visual, it cannot produce sound or smell, and items and other criaturas pass through it.

As an action, you can move the image to any point within range. The image's movement can be natural and lifelike (for example, a ball will roll and a bird will fly).

A criatura can spend an action to make an Investigación check against your CD de salvación del conjuro to determine if the image is an illusion. en un éxito, it is able to see through the image.

name: Silhouette
desc: You create a shadow play against a screen or wall. The surface can encompass up to 100 square pies. The number of criaturas that can see the shadow play equals your Inteligencia score. The shadowy figures make no sound but they can dance, run, move, kiss, fight, and so forth. Most of the figures are generic types—a rabbit, a dwarf—but a number of them equal to your Inteligencia modifier can be recognizable as specific individuals.

name: Silvershout
desc: You unleash a shout that coats todas las criaturas in a 30'pie cone in silver dust. If a criatura in that area is a shapeshifter, the dust covering it glows. In addition, cada criatura in the area debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Constitución. en una salvación fallida, weapon attacks against that criatura are considered to be silvered for the purposes of overcoming resistance and immunity to ataques no mágicos that aren't silvered for 1 minuto.

name: Simulacrum
desc: Durante todo el tiempo de lanzamiento del conjuro, das forma a un duplicado ilusorio de una bestia o humanoide que se encuentre dentro del alcance. El duplicado es una criatura, parcialmente real y formada a partir de hielo o nieve, y puede realizar acciones y verse afectada como cualquier criatura normal. Parece idéntica al original, pero tiene la mitad del máximo de puntos de golpe de la criatura y se forma sin ningún equipo. En todo lo demás, la ilusión utiliza todas las estadísticas de la criatura que duplica. El simulacrum es amistoso contigo y con las criaturas que designes. Obedece tus órdenes verbales, moviéndose y actuando según tus deseos, y actúa en tu turno durante el combate. El simulacrum carece de la capacidad de aprender o ganar poder, por lo que nunca aumenta su nivel ni mejora sus otras capacidades, ni puede recuperar espacios de conjuro gastados. Si el simulacrum sufre daño, puedes repararlo en un laboratorio alquímico utilizando hierbas y minerales raros por un valor de 100 po por cada punto de golpe que recupere. El simulacrum dura hasta que cae a 0 puntos de golpe, momento en el que se convierte en nieve y se derrite al instante. Si lanzas este conjuro de nuevo, todos los duplicados activos que hayas creado con él son destruidos de inmediato.
material: Nieve o hielo en cantidad suficiente para hacer una copia a tamaño real de la criatura duplicada; algún cabello, recortes de uñas u otro fragmento del cuerpo de esa criatura colocado dentro de la nieve o el hielo; y rubí en polvo por un valor de 1.500 po, espolvoreado sobre el duplicado y consumido por el conjuro.

name: Simulacrum
desc:
You sculpt an illusory duplicate of the objetivo from ice and snow. The duplicate looks exactly like the objetivo and uses all the statistics of the original, though it is formed without any gear, and has only half of the objetivo's punto de golpe maximum. The duplicate is a criatura, can take actions, and be affected like any other criatura. If the objetivo is able to cast spells, the duplicate cannot cast spells of 7th-level or higher.

The duplicate is friendly to you and criaturas you designate. It follows your spoken commands, and moves and acts on your turn in combat. It is a static criatura and it does not learn, age, or grow, so it never increases in levels and cannot regain any spent espacios de conjuro.

When the simulacrum is damaged you can repair it in an alchemy lab using components worth 100 gold per punto de golpe it regains. The simulacrum remains until it is reduced to 0 puntos de golpe, at which point it crumbles into snow and melts away immediately.

If you cast this spell again, any existing simulacrum you have created with this spell is instantly destroyed.

name: Sir Mittinz’s Move Curse
desc: When you are within range of a cursed criatura or object, you can transfer the curse to a different criatura or object that’s also within range. The curse must be transferred from object to object or from criatura to criatura.
material: a finely crafted hollow glass sphere and incense worth 50 gp, which the spell consumes

name: Skull Road
desc: You conjure a portal linking an unoccupied space you can see within range to an imprecise location on the plane of Evermaw. The portal is a circular opening, which you can make 5-20 pies in diameter. You can orient the portal in any direction you choose. The portal lasts for the duration. If your casting is at 5th level, this opens a pathway to the River of Tears, to the Vitreous Mire, or to the Plains of Bone-travel to a settlement can take up to 7 days (1d6+1). If cast at 7th level, the skull road spell opens a portal to a small settlement of gnolls, ghouls, or shadows on the plane near the Eternal Palace of Mot or a similar settlement. Undead casters can use this spell in the reverse direction, opening a portal from Evermaw to the mortal world, though with similar restrictions. At 5th level, the portal opens in a dark forest, cavern, or ruins far from habitation. At 7th level, the skull road leads directly to a tomb, cemetery, or mass grave near a humanoid settlement of some kind.

name: Sleep
desc: Este conjuro sume a las criaturas en un sueño mágico. Tira 5d8; el total indica cuántos puntos de golpe de criaturas puede afectar este conjuro. Las criaturas que se encuentren a 6m de un punto que elijas dentro del alcance son afectadas en orden ascendente según sus puntos de golpe actuales (ignorando a las criaturas inconscientes). Comenzando por la criatura con los puntos de golpe actuales más bajos, cada criatura afectada por este conjuro queda inconsciente hasta que el conjuro termine, la criatura dormida reciba daño, o alguien use una acción para sacudirla o abofetearla para despertarla. Resta los puntos de golpe de cada criatura del total antes de pasar a la criatura con los siguientes puntos de golpe más bajos. Los puntos de golpe de una criatura deben ser iguales o inferiores al total restante para que dicha criatura sea afectada. Los no muertos y las criaturas inmunes a ser hechizadas no se ven afectadas por este conjuro.
higher_level: Cuando lanzas este conjuro usando un espacio de conjuro de nivel 2 o superior, tira 2d8 adicionales por cada nivel de espacio por encima del 1º.
material: Un pellizco de arena fina, pétalos de rosa o un grillo.

name: Sleep
desc:
You send your enemigos into a mágico slumber.

Starting with the objetivo with the lowest puntos de golpe (ignoring inconsciente criaturas), objetivos within the area fall inconsciente in ascending order according to their puntos de golpe. Slumbering criaturas stay asleep until the spell ends, they take damage, or someone uses an action to physically wake them.

As each objetivo falls asleep, subtract its puntos de golpe from the total before moving on to the next objetivo.

A objetivo's puntos de golpe must be equal to or less than the total remaining for the spell to have any effect.

If the spell puts no criaturas to sleep, the criatura in the area with the lowest punto de golpe total is rattled until the beginning of its next turn.

Constructs and undead are not affected by this spell.
higher_level: The spell affects an additional 2d10 puntos de golpe worth of criaturas for each slot level above 1st.

name: Sleep of the Deep
desc: Your magic haunts the dreams of others. Choose a sleeping criatura that you are aware of within range. criaturas that don’t sleep, such as elves, can’t be objetivoed. The criatura debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or it garners no benefit from the rest, and when it awakens, it gains one level of agotamiento and is afflicted with short‑term madness.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 4th level or higher, you can affect one additional criatura for each slot level above 3rd.
material: a pinch of black sand, a tallow candle, and a drop of cephalopod ink
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Paladin, Ranger, Sorcerer, Warlock, Wizard

name: Sleet Storm
desc: Hasta que el conjuro termine, lluvia helada y aguanieve caen en un cilindro de 6m de altura con un radio de 12m centrado en un punto que elijas dentro del alcance. El área queda muy oscurecida y las llamas expuestas en la zona se apagan. El suelo del área queda cubierto de hielo resbaladizo, convirtiéndolo en terreno difícil. Cuando una criatura entra en el área del conjuro por primera vez en su turno o comienza su turno en ella, debe superar una tirada de salvación de Destreza. Si falla, cae en posición prona. Si una criatura está concentrada dentro del área del conjuro, deberá superar una tirada de salvación de Constitución contra la CD de salvación de tu conjuro o perderá la concentración.
material: Un pellizco de polvo y unas gotas de agua.

name: Sleet Storm
desc:
You conjure a storm of freezing rain and sleet in the area. The ground in the area is covered with slick ice that makes it difficult terrain, exposed flames in the area are doused, and the area is heavily obscured.

When a criatura enters the area for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there, it makes a tirada de salvación de Destreza or falls derribado.

When a criatura concentrating on a spell starts its turn in the area or first enters into the area on a turn, it makes a tirada de salvación de Constitución or loses Concentración.

name: Slippery Fingers
desc: You set a series of small events in motion that cause the objetivoed criatura to drop one no mágico item of your choice that it’s currently holding, unless it makes a successful tirada de salvación de Carisma.
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Sorcerer, Warlock, Wizard

name: Slither
desc:
You momentarily become a shadow (a humanoid-shaped absence of ligera, not the undead criatura of that name). You can slide under a door, through a keyhole, or through any other tiny opening. All of your equipment is transformed with you, and you can move up to your full Velocidad during the spell’s duration. While in this form, you have ventaja on Destreza (Sigilo) checks made in darkness or dim ligera and you are immune to no mágico contundente, perforante, and daño cortante. You can dismiss this spell by using an action to do so.

If you return to your normal form while in a space too small for you (such as a mouse hole, sewer pipe, or the like), you take 4d6 daño de fuerza and are pushed to the nearest space within 50 pies big enough to hold you. If the distance is greater than 50 pies, you take an extra 1d6 daño de fuerza for every additional 10 pies traveled.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 3rd level or higher, you can objetivo an additional willing criatura that you touch for each slot level above 2nd.
material: ashes from a wooden statue of you, made into ink and used to draw your portrait, worth 50 gp

name: Slow
desc: Alteras el tiempo alrededor de hasta seis criaturas de tu elección dentro de un cubo de 12m dentro del alcance. Cada objetivo debe superar una tirada de salvación de Sabiduría o quedar afectado por este conjuro durante su duración. La velocidad de un objetivo afectado se reduce a la mitad, sufre una penalización de -2 a la CA y a las tiradas de salvación de Destreza, y no puede usar reacciones. En su turno, puede usar una acción o una acción adicional, pero no ambas. Independientemente de las capacidades o los objetos mágicos de la criatura, no puede realizar más de un ataque cuerpo a cuerpo o a distancia durante su turno. Si la criatura intenta lanzar un conjuro con un tiempo de lanzamiento de 1 acción, tira un d20. Con un resultado de 11 o más, el conjuro no surte efecto hasta el siguiente turno de la criatura, y esta deberá usar su acción en ese turno para completar el conjuro. Si no puede hacerlo, el conjuro se pierde. Una criatura afectada por este conjuro realiza otra tirada de salvación de Sabiduría al final de su turno. Si la supera, el efecto termina para ella.
material: Una gota de melaza.

name: Slow
desc:
You alter the flow of time around your objetivos and they become slowed. On a successful tirada de salvación, a objetivo is rattled until the end of its next turn.

In addition, if a slowed objetivo casts a spell with a casting time of 1 action, roll a d20\. On an 11 or higher, the objetivo doesn't finish casting the spell until its next turn. The objetivo must use its action on that turn to complete the spell or the spell fails.

At the end of each of its turns, a slowed objetivo repeats the tirada de salvación to end the spell's effect on it.

name: Smelting Blast
desc: You unleash a bolt of red-hot liquid metal at a criatura or object within range. Make a ranged ataque de conjuro against the objetivo. On a hit, the objetivo recibe 2d8 daño de fuego and debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Constitución or be coated in cooling, liquid metal for the duration. A criatura coated in liquid metal recibe 1d8 daño de fuego at the start of each of its turns as the metal scorches while it cools. At the end of each of its turns, the criatura can make another tirada de salvación de Constitución. en un éxito, the spell ends and the liquid metal disappears.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 3rd level or higher, el daño (both initial and later) increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 2nd.

name: Sneer
desc: You curl your lip in disgust at a criatura you can see within range. The objetivo debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Carisma or take daño psíquico equal to 2d4 + your spellcasting ability modifier.

name: Snow Boulder
desc:
A ball of snow forms 5 pies away from you and rolls in the direction you point at a Velocidad of 30 pies, growing larger as it moves. To roll the boulder into a criatura, you debe realizar a successful ranged ataque de conjuro. If the boulder hits, the criatura debe realizar a successful tirada de salvación de Destreza or be knocked derribado and take el daño indicated below. Hitting a criatura doesn’t stop the snow boulder’s movement or impede its growth, as long as you continue to maintain Concentración on the effect. When the spell ends, the boulder stops moving.

| ronda | Size | Damage |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | Small | 1d6 contundente |
| 2 | Medium | 2d6 contundente |
| 3 | Large | 4d6 contundente |
| 4 | Huge | 6d6 contundente |
material: a handful of snow

name: Snow Fort
desc:
This spell creates a simple “fort” from packed snow. The snow fort springs from the ground in an unoccupied space within range. It encircles a 10-pie area with sloping walls 4 pies high. The fort provides half cover (+2 AC) against ranged and melee attacks coming from outside the fort. The walls have AC 12, 30 puntos de golpe per side, are immune to frío, necrótico, veneno, and daño psíquico, and are vulnerable to daño de fuego. A damaged wall can be repaired by casting a spell that causa daño de frío on it, on a point-for-point basis, up to a maximum of 30 points.

The spell also creates a dozen snowballs that can be arrojadiza (range 20/60) and that deal 1d4 daño contundente plus 1d4 daño de frío on a hit.
material: a ring carved from chalk or white stone

name: Snowblind Stare
desc: Your eyes burn with a bright, frío ligera that inflicts snow blindness on a criatura you objetivo within 30 pies of you. If the objetivo fails a tirada de salvación de Constitución, it suffers the first stage of snow blindness (see [Conditions](https://api.open5e.com/sections/conditions)), or the second stage of snow blindness if it already has the first stage. The objetivo recovers as described in [Conditions](https://api.open5e.com/sections/conditions).

name: Snowy Coat
desc: This spell makes a slight alteration to a objetivo criatura’s appearance that gives it ventaja on Destreza (Sigilo) checks to hide in snowy terrain. In addition, the objetivo can use a acción adicional to make itself invisible in snowy terrain for 1 minuto. The spell ends at the end of the minuto or when the criatura attacks or casts a spell.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 2nd level or higher, you can objetivo one additional criatura for each slot level above 1st.

name: Song of the Forest
desc:
You attune your senses to the natural world, so that you detect every sound that occurs within 60 pies: wind blowing through branches, falling leaves, grazing deer, trickling streams, and more. You can clearly picture the source of each sound in your mind. The spell gives you sentido de temblor out to a range of 10 pies. In addition, you have ventaja on Sabiduría (Percepción) checks that rely on hearing. criaturas that make no noise or that are magically silent cannot be detected by this spell’s effect.

**Song of the forest** functions only in natural environments; it fails if cast underground, in a city, or in a building that isolates the caster from Naturaleza (GM’s discretion).

***Ritual Focus.*** If you expend your ritual focus, the spell also gives you vista ciega out to a range of 30 pies.
material: a dried leaf, crumpled and released

name: Soothsayer's Shield
desc: This spell can be cast when you are hit by an enemigo's attack. Until the start of your next turn, you have a +4 bonus to AC, including against the triggering attack.

name: Soul of the Machine
desc: Deep Magic: clockwork One willing criatura you touch becomes immune to mind-altering effects and daño psíquico for the spell's duration.

name: Soulwrought Fists
desc:
The objetivo's hands harden with inner power, turning dexterous fingers into mágico iron cudgels.

Until the spell ends, the objetivo drops anything it is holding and cannot use its hands to grasp objects or perform complex tasks. A objetivo can still cast any spell that does not specifically require its hands.

When making unarmed strikes, the objetivo can use its spellcasting ability or Destreza (its choice) instead of Fuerza for the attack and damage rolls of unarmed strikes. In addition, the objetivo's unarmed strikes deal 1d8 daño contundente and count as mágico for the purpose of overcoming resistance and immunity to ataques no mágicos and damage.

name: Spare the Dying
desc: Tocas a una criatura viva que tiene 0 puntos de golpe. La criatura se estabiliza. Este conjuro no tiene efecto sobre muertos vivientes o constructos.

name: Spare the Dying
desc: A jolt of healing energy flows through the objetivo and it becomes stable.

name: Speak with Animals
desc: Durante la duración, adquieres la capacidad de comprender y comunicarte verbalmente con bestias. El conocimiento y la conciencia de muchas bestias está limitado por su inteligencia, pero como mínimo, las bestias pueden darte información sobre lugares cercanos y monstruos, incluyendo todo lo que puedan percibir o hayan percibido en el último día. Podrías ser capaz de persuadir a una bestia para que te haga un pequeño favor, a discreción del DM.
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Paladin, Ranger, Ritual Caster

name: Speak with Animals
desc: You call upon the secret lore of beasts and gain the ability to speak with them. Beasts have a different perspective of the world, and their knowledge and awareness is filtered through that perspective. At a minimum, beasts can tell you about nearby locations and monsters, including things they have recently perceived. At the Narrator's discretion, you might be able to persuade a beast to perform a small favor for you.

name: Speak with Dead
desc: Otorgas la apariencia de vida e inteligencia a un cadáver de tu elección que se encuentre dentro del alcance, permitiéndole responder las preguntas que le formules. El cadáver debe tener todavía una boca y no puede ser un muerto viviente. El conjuro falla si el cadáver fue objetivo de este conjuro en los últimos 10 días. Hasta que el conjuro termine, puedes hacerle al cadáver un máximo de cinco preguntas. El cadáver solo sabe lo que sabía en vida, incluidos los idiomas que conocía. Las respuestas suelen ser breves, crípticas o repetitivas, y el cadáver no está obligado a ofrecer una respuesta veraz si eres hostil hacia él o te reconoce como un enemigo. Este conjuro no devuelve el alma de la criatura a su cuerpo, solo su espíritu animador. Por lo tanto, el cadáver no puede aprender información nueva, no comprende nada de lo que ha ocurrido desde que murió y no puede especular sobre eventos futuros.
material: Incienso encendido.

name: Speak with Dead
desc:
You call forth the objetivo's memories, animating it enough to answer 5 questions. The corpse's knowledge is limited: it knows only what it knew in life and cannot learn new information or speak about anything that has occurred since its death. It speaks only in the languages it knew, and is under no compulsion to offer a truthful answer if it has reason not to. Answers might be brief, cryptic, or repetitive.

This spell does not return a departed soul, nor does it have any effect on an undead corpse, or one without a mouth.

name: Speak with Inanimate Object
desc: You awaken a spirit that resides inside an inanimate object such as a rock, a sign, or a table, and can ask it up to three yes-or-no questions. The spirit is indifferent toward you unless you have done something to harm or help it. The spirit can give you information about its environment and about things it has observed (with its limited senses), and it can act as a spy for you in certain situations. The spell ends when its duration expires or after you have received answers to three questions.

name: Speak with Plants
desc: Dotes a las plantas que se encuentran a 9m de ti de una sensibilidad y animación limitadas, otorgándoles la capacidad de comunicarse contigo y seguir tus órdenes sencillas. Puedes interrogar a las plantas sobre eventos ocurridos en el área del conjuro durante el último día, obteniendo información sobre criaturas que hayan pasado por allí, el clima y otras circunstancias. También puedes convertir el terreno difícil causado por el crecimiento de plantas (como matorrales y maleza) en terreno ordinario durante la duración. O puedes convertir el terreno ordinario donde haya plantas en terreno difícil durante la duración, haciendo que enredaderas y ramas obstaculicen a los perseguidores, por ejemplo. Las plantas podrían ser capaces de realizar otras tareas en tu nombre, a discreción del DM. El conjuro no permite a las plantas arrancarse de raíz y desplazarse, pero sí pueden mover libremente ramas, zarcillos y tallos. Si hay una criatura vegetal en el área, puedes comunicarte con ella como si compartieras un idioma común, pero no obtienes ninguna capacidad mágica para influir en ella. Este conjuro puede hacer que las plantas creadas por el conjuro entangle liberen a una criatura apresada.

name: Speak with Plants
desc:
Your voice recibe on a mágico timbre, awakening the objetivos to limited sentience. Until the spell ends, the objetivos can communicate with you and follow simple commands, telling you about recent events including criaturas that have passed, weather, and nearby locations.

The objetivos have a limited mobility: they can move their branches, tendrils, and stalks freely. This allows them to turn ordinary terrain into difficult terrain, or make difficult terrain caused by vegetation into ordinary terrain for the duration as vines and branches move at your request. This spell can also release a criatura apresado by an entangle spell.

At the Narrator's discretion the objetivos may be able to perform other tasks, though each must remain rooted in place. If a plant criatura is in the area, you can communicate with it but it is not compelled to follow your requests.

name: Sphere of Order
desc: Deep Magic: clockwork You surround yourself with the perfect order of clockwork. Chaotic criaturas that start their turn in the area or enter it on their turn take 5d8 daño psíquico. el daño is 8d8 for Chaotic aberrations, celestials, elementals, and fiends. A successful tirada de salvación de Sabiduría halves el daño, but Chaotic criaturas (the only ones affected by the spell) make the tirada de salvación with desventaja.

name: Spider Climb
desc: Hasta que el conjuro termine, una criatura voluntaria que toques adquiere la capacidad de moverse hacia arriba, hacia abajo y a través de superficies verticales, así como boca abajo por los techos, dejando sus manos libres. El objetivo también obtiene una velocidad de trepa igual a su velocidad de desplazamiento.
material: Una gota de betún y una araña.

name: Spider Climb
desc: The objetivo gains the ability to walk on walls and upside down on ceilings, as well as a escalando Velocidad equal to its base Velocidad.
higher_level: You can affect one additional objetivo for each slot level above 2nd.

name: Spike Growth
desc: El suelo en un radio de 6m centrado en un punto dentro del alcance se retuerce y brota con afiladas púas y espinas. El área se convierte en terreno difícil durante la duración. Cuando una criatura se mueve hacia o dentro del área, recibe 2d4 de daño perforante por cada 1,5m que recorra. La alteración del terreno está camuflada para parecer natural. Cualquier criatura que no vea el área en el momento en que se lanza el conjuro debe realizar una prueba de Sabiduría (Percepción) contra la CD de salvación de tu conjuro para reconocer el terreno como peligroso antes de entrar en él.
material: Siete espinas afiladas o siete ramitas cortadas en punta.

name: Spike Growth
desc:
You cause sharp spikes and thorns to sprout in the area, making it difficult terrain. When a criatura enters or moves within the area, it recibe 2d4 daño perforante for every 5 pies it travels.

Your magic causes the ground to look natural. A criatura that can't see the area when the spell is cast can spot the hazardous terrain just before entering it by making a Percepción check against your CD de salvación del conjuro.

name: Spiked Barricade
desc:
With a word, you create a barricade of pointed, wooden poles, also known as a cheval de frise, to block your enemigos' progress. The barricade is composed of six 5-pie cube barriers made of wooden spikes mounted on central, horizontal beams.
  Each barrier doesn't need to be contiguous with another barrier, but each barrier must appear in an unoccupied space within range. Each barrier is difficult terrain, and a barrier provides half cover to a criatura behind it. When a criatura enters a barrier's area for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there, the criatura debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Fuerza or take 3d6 daño perforante.
  The barriers are objects made of wood that can be damaged and destroyed. Each barrier has AC 13, 20 puntos de golpe, and is vulnerable to contundente and daño de fuego. Reducing a barrier to 0 puntos de golpe destroys it.
  If you maintain your Concentración on this spell for its whole duration, the barriers become permanent and can't be dispelled. Otherwise, the barriers disappear when the spell ends.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 4th level or higher, the number of barriers you create increases by two for each slot level above 3rd.

name: Spin
desc: You designate a criatura you can see within range and tell it to spin. The criatura can resist this command with a successful tirada de salvación de Sabiduría. en una salvación fallida, the criatura spins in place for the duration of the spell. A spinning criatura can repeat the tirada de salvación at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself en un éxito. A criatura that has spun for 1 ronda or longer becomes dizzy and has desventaja on attack rolls and ability checks until 1 ronda after it stops spinning.

name: Spinning Axes
desc: Spinning axes made of luminous fuerza burst out from you to strike todas las criaturas within 10 pies of you. Each of those criaturas recibe 5d8 daño de fuerza, or half el daño with a successful tirada de salvación de Destreza. criaturas damaged by this spell that aren’t undead or constructs begin bleeding. A bleeding criatura recibe 2d6 daño necrótico at the end of each of its turns for 1 minuto. A criatura can stop the bleeding for itself or another criatura by using an action to make a successful Sabiduría (Medicina) check against your CD de salvación del conjuro or by applying any amount of mágico healing.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 5th level or higher, el daño increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 4th.
material: an iron ring

name: Spire of Stone
desc: You cause a spire of rock to burst out of the ground, floor, or another surface beneath your pies. The spire is as wide as your space, and lifting you, it can rise up to 20 pies in height. When the spire appears, a criatura within 5 pies of you debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Destreza or fall derribado. As a acción adicional on your turn, you can cause the spire to rise or descend up to 20 pies to a maximum height of 40 pies. If you move off of the spire, it immediately collapses back into the ground. When the spire disappears, it leaves the surface from which it sprang unharmed. You can create a new spire as a acción adicional for the duration of the spell.

name: Spirit Guardians
desc: Convocas espíritus para que te protejan. Revolotean a tu alrededor hasta una distancia de 4,5m durante la duración. Si eres bueno o neutral, su forma espectral aparece como angelical o feérica (a tu elección). Si eres malvado, aparecen como infernales. Cuando lanzas este conjuro, puedes designar cualquier número de criaturas que puedas ver para que no sean afectadas por él. La velocidad de una criatura afectada se reduce a la mitad dentro del área, y cuando la criatura entra en el área por primera vez en su turno o comienza su turno en ella, debe realizar una tirada de salvación de Sabiduría. Si falla la tirada, la criatura recibe 3d8 de daño radiante (si eres bueno o neutral) o 3d8 de daño necrótico (si eres malvado). Si tiene éxito en la tirada, la criatura recibe la mitad del daño.
higher_level: Cuando lanzas este conjuro usando un espacio de conjuro de nivel 4 o superior, el daño aumenta en 1d8 por cada nivel de espacio por encima del 3º.
material: Un símbolo sagrado.

name: Spirit Guardians
desc:
You call down spirits of divine fury, filling the area with flitting spectral forms. You choose the form taken by the spirits.

criaturas of your choice halve their Velocidad while in the area. When a criatura enters the area for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there, it recibe 3d6 radiante or daño necrótico (your choice).
higher_level: el daño increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 3rd.

name: Spiritual Weapon
desc: Creas un arma espectral flotante dentro del alcance que dura hasta el fin de la duración o hasta que lances este conjuro de nuevo. Cuando lanzas el conjuro, puedes realizar un ataque de conjuro cuerpo a cuerpo contra una criatura que esté a 1,5m o menos del arma. Si impacta, el objetivo recibe daño de fuerza igual a 1d8 + tu modificador de característica de lanzamiento de conjuros. Como acción adicional en tu turno, puedes mover el arma hasta 6m y repetir el ataque contra una criatura que esté a 1,5m o menos de ella. El arma puede adoptar la forma que elijas. Los clérigos de deidades asociadas a un arma concreta (como St. Cuthbert, conocido por su maza, o Thor por su martillo) hacen que el efecto de este conjuro se asemeje a dicha arma.
higher_level: Cuando lanzas este conjuro usando un espacio de conjuro de nivel 3 o superior, el daño aumenta en 1d8 por cada dos niveles de espacio por encima del 2º.

name: Spiritual Weapon
desc:
You create a floating, incandescent weapon with an appearance of your choosing and use it to attack your enemigos. On the ronda you cast it, you can make a melee ataque de conjuro against a criatura within 5 pies of the weapon that causa daño de fuerza equal to 1d8 + your spellcasting ability modifier.

As a acción adicional on subsequent turns until the spell ends, you can move the weapon up to 20 pies and make another attack against a criatura within 5 pies of it.
higher_level: el daño increases by 1d8 for every two slot levels above 2nd.

name: Spite
desc: You prick your finger and anoint your forehead with your own blood, taking 1 daño perforante and warding yourself against hostile attacks. The first time a criatura hits you with an attack during this spell's duration, it recibe 3d6 daño psíquico. Then the spell ends.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 3rd level or higher, el daño increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 2nd.

name: Spiteful Weapon
desc:
You create a connection between the objetivo of the spell, an attacker that injured the objetivo during the last 24 horas, and the melee weapon that caused the injury, all of which must be within range when the spell is cast.

For the duration of the spell, whenever the attacker recibe damage while holding the weapon, the objetivo debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Carisma. en una salvación fallida, the objetivo recibe the same amount and type of damage, or half as much damage on a successful one. The attacker can use the weapon on itself and thus cause the objetivo to take identical damage. A self-inflicted wound hits automatically, but damage is still rolled randomly.

Once the connection is established, it lasts for the duration of the spell regardless of range, so long as all three elements remain on the same plane. The spell ends immediately if the attacker receives any healing.
higher_level: The objetivo has desventaja on its Carisma tirada de salvacións if **spiteful weapon** is cast using a espacio de conjuro of 5th level or higher.
material: a melee weapon that has been used to injure the objetivo

name: Sporesight
desc:
You throw a mushroom at a point within range and detonate it, creating a cloud of spores that fills the area. The cloud of spores travels around corners, and the area is considered lightly obscured for everyone except you. criaturas and objects within the area are covered in spores.

Until the spell ends, you know the exact location of all affected objects and criaturas. Any tirada de ataque you make against an affected criatura or object has ventaja, and the affected criaturas and objects can't benefit from being invisible.

name: Spur Mount
desc: You urge your mount to a sudden burst of Velocidad. Until the end of your next turn, you can direct your mount to use the Dash or Disengage action as a acción adicional. This spell has no effect on a criatura that you are not riding.
material: an apple or a sugar cube

name: Staff of Violet Fire
desc:
You create a quarterstaff of pure necrótico energy that blazes with intense purple ligera; it appears in your chosen hand. If you let it go, it disappears, though you can evoke it again as a acción adicional if you have maintained Concentración on the spell.

This staff is an extremely unstable and impermanent magic item; it has 10 charges and does not require attunement. The wielder can use one of three effects:

* By using your action to make a ataque cuerpo a cuerpo and expending 1 charge, you can attack with it. On a hit, the objetivo recibe 5d10 daño necrótico.
* By expending 2 charges, you can release bolts of necrótico fuego against up to 3 objetivos as ranged attacks for 1d8+4 daño necrótico each.

The staff disappears and the spell ends when all the staff's charges have been expended or if you stop concentrating on the spell.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 6th level or higher, the melee damage increases by 1d10 for every two slot levels above 4th, or you add one additional ranged bolt for every two slot levels above 4th.
material: mummy dust

name: Stanch
desc: The objetivo’s blood coagulates rapidly, so that a dying objetivo stabilizes and any ongoing bleeding or wounding effect on the objetivo ends. The objetivo can't be the source of blood for any spell or effect that requires even a drop of blood.
dnd_class: Cleric, Druid, Paladin, Ranger, Sorcerer, Warlock, Wizard

name: Star's Heart
desc:
This spell increases gravity tenfold in a 50-pie radius centered on you. cada criatura in the area other than you drops whatever it’s holding, falls derribado, becomes incapacitado, and can’t move. If a solid object (such as the ground) is encountered when a volando or levitating criatura falls, the criatura recibe three times the normal falling damage. Any criatura except you that enters the area or starts its turn there debe realizar a successful tirada de salvación de Fuerza or fall derribado and become incapacitado and unable to move. A criatura that starts its turn derribado and incapacitado makes a tirada de salvación de Fuerza. en una salvación fallida, the criatura recibe 8d6 daño contundente; en una salvación exitosa, it recibe 4d6 daño contundente, it’s no longer incapacitado, and it can move at half Velocidad.

All ranged weapon attacks inside the area have a normal range of 5 pies and a maximum range of 10 pies. The same applies to spells that create missiles that have mass, such as [flaming sphere](https://api.open5e.com/spells/flaming-sphere). A criatura under the influence of a [freedom of movement](https://api.open5e.com/spells/freedom-of-movement) spell or comparable magic has ventaja on the Fuerza tirada de salvacións required by this spell, and its Velocidad isn’t reduced once it recovers from being incapacitado.
material: an ioun stone

name: Starburst
desc: You cause a mote of starlight to appear and explode in a 5-pie cube you can see within range. If a criatura is in the cube, it debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Carisma or take 1d8 daño radiante.
higher_level: This spell’s damage increases to 2d8 when you alcance 5th level, 3d8 when you alcance 11th level, and 4d8 when you alcance 17th level.

name: Starfall
desc: You cause bolts of shimmering starlight to fall from the heavens, striking up to five criaturas that you can see within range. Each bolt strikes un objetivo, dealing 6d6 daño radiante, knocking the objetivo derribado, and blinding it until the start of your next turn. A criatura that makes a successful tirada de salvación de Destreza recibe half el daño, is not knocked derribado, and is not cegado. If you name fewer than five objetivos, excess bolts strike the ground harmlessly.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 6th level or higher, you can create one additional bolt for each slot level above 5th.

name: Starry Vision
desc: This spell acts as [compelling fate](https://api.open5e.com/spells/compelling-fate), except as noted above (**starry** vision can be cast as a reacción, has twice the range of [compelling fate](https://api.open5e.com/spells/compelling-fate), and lasts up to 1 minuto). At the end of each of its turns, the objetivo repeats the tirada de salvación de Carisma, ending the effect en un éxito.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 8th level or higher, the bonus to AC increases by 1 for each slot level above 7th.
material: a sprinkle of gold dust worth 400 gp
casting_time: 1 reaction, which you take when an enemy starts its turn

name: Steal Warmth
desc: When you cast **steal warmth** after taking daño de frío, you select a living criatura within 5 pies of you. That criatura recibe the daño de frío instead, or half el daño with a successful tirada de salvación de Constitución. You regain puntos de golpe equal to the amount of daño de frío taken by the objetivo.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 4th level or higher, the distance to the objetivo you can affect with this spell increases by 5 pies for each slot level above 3rd.
casting_time: 1 reaction, which you take when you take cold damage from magic

name: Steam Blast
desc: You unleash a burst of superheated steam in a 15-pie radius around you. All other criaturas in the area take 5d8 daño de fuego, or half as much damage on a successful tirada de salvación de Destreza. no mágico fires smaller than a bonfire are extinguished, and everything becomes wet.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 5th level or higher, el daño increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 4th.
material: a tiny copper kettle or boiler

name: Steam Gout
desc:
You create a gout of billowing steam in a 40-foottall cylinder with a 5-pie radius centered on a point on the ground you can see within range. Exposed flames in the area are doused. cada criatura in the area when the gout first appears debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Destreza. en una salvación fallida, the criatura recibe 2d8 daño de fuego and falls derribado. en una salvación exitosa, the criatura recibe half as much damage and doesn't fall derribado.
  The gout then covers the area in a sheen of slippery water. When a criatura enters the spell's area for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there, it debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Destreza. en una salvación fallida, it falls derribado.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 4th level or higher, el daño increases by 1d8, and you can create one additional gout of steam for each slot level above 3rd. A criatura in the area of more than one gout of steam is affected only once.

name: Steam Whistle
desc: You open your mouth and unleash a shattering scream. All other criaturas in a 30-pie radius around you take 10d10 daño de trueno and are ensordecido for 1d8 horas. A successful tirada de salvación de Constitución halves el daño and reduces the deafness to 1 ronda.
material: a small brass whistle

name: Stench of Rot
desc: Choose una criatura you can see within range that isn’t a construct or an undead. The objetivo debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Carisma or become cursed for the duration of the spell. While cursed, the objetivo reeks of death and rot, and nothing short of magic can mask or remove the smell. The objetivo has desventaja on all Carisma checks and on Constitución tirada de salvacións to maintain Concentración on spells. A criatura with the Keen Smell trait, or a similar trait indicating the criatura has a strong sense of smell, can add your spellcasting ability modifier to its Sabiduría (Percepción) or Sabiduría (Supervivencia) checks to find the objetivo. A [remove curse](https://api.open5e.com/spells/remove-curse) spell or similar magic ends the spell early.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 3rd level or higher, the duration increases by 1 hora for each slot level above 2nd.
material: a live maggot
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Ranger, Sorcerer, Warlock, Wizard

name: Stigmata of the Red Goddess
desc: You cut yourself and bleed as tribute to Marena, gaining power as long as the blood continues flowing. The stigmata typically appears as blood running from the eyes or ears, or from wounds manifesting on the neck or chest. You take 1 daño perforante at the beginning of each turn and gain a +2 bonus on damage rolls. Any healing received by you, mágico or otherwise, ends the spell.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 3rd level or higher, el daño you take at the start of each of your turns and the bonus damage you do both increase by 1 for each slot level above 2nd, and the duration increases by 1 ronda for each slot level above 2nd.

name: Stinking Cloud
desc: Creas una esfera de gas amarillo y nauseabundo de 6m de radio centrada en un punto dentro del alcance. La nube se extiende alrededor de las esquinas y su área está fuertemente oscurecida. La nube permanece en el aire durante la duración. Cada criatura que se encuentre completamente dentro de la nube al inicio de su turno debe realizar una tirada de salvación de Constitución contra el veneno. Si falla la tirada, la criatura gasta su acción en ese turno entre arcadas y tambaleos. Las criaturas que no necesitan respirar o que son inmunes al veneno superan automáticamente esta tirada de salvación. Un viento moderado (de al menos 16 km/h) dispersa la nube tras 4 rondas. Un viento fuerte (de al menos 32 km/h) la dispersa tras 1 ronda.
material: Un huevo podrido o varias hojas de col de mofeta.

name: Stinking Cloud
desc:
You create a roiling, noxious cloud that hinders criaturas and leaves them retching. The cloud spreads around corners and lingers in the air until the spell ends.

The area is heavily obscured. A criatura in the area at the start of its turn makes a tirada de salvación de Constitución or uses its action to retch and reel.

criaturas that don't need to breathe or are immune to veneno automatically succeed on the save.

A moderate wind (10 millas per hora) disperses the cloud after 4 rondas, a strong wind (20 millas per hora) after 1 ronda.
higher_level: The spell's area increases by 5 pies for every 2 slot levels above 3rd.

name: Stone Aegis
desc:
A rocky coating covers your body, protecting you. Until the start of your next turn, you gain 5 temporary puntos de golpe and a +2 bonus to Clase de Armadura, including against the triggering attack.
  At the start of each of your subsequent turns, you can use a acción adicional to extend the duration of the AC bonus until the start of your following turn, for up to 1 minuto.
casting_time: 1 reaction, which you take when you are hit by an attack

name: Stone Fetch
desc:
You create a stony duplicate of yourself, which rises out of the ground and appears next to you. The duplicate looks like a stone carving of you, including the clothing you're wearing and equipment you're carrying at the time of the casting. It uses the statistics of an earth elemental.
  For the duration, you have a telepathic link with the duplicate. You can use this telepathic link to issue commands to the duplicate while you are conscious (no action required), which it does its best to obey. You can specify a simple and general course of action, such as “Run over there” or “Fetch that object.” If the duplicate completes the order and doesn't receive further direction from you, it recibe the Dodge or Hide action (your choice) on its turn. The duplicate can't attack, but it can speak in a gravelly version of your voice and mimic your mannerisms with exact detail.
  As a acción adicional, you can see through the duplicate's eyes and hear what it hears as if you were in the duplicate's space, gaining the benefits of the earth elemental's visión en la oscuridad and sentido de temblor until the start of your next turn. During this time, you are deaf and blind with regard to your own senses. As an action while sharing the duplicate's senses, you can make the duplicate explode in a shower of jagged chunks of rock, destroying the duplicate and ending the spell. cada criatura within 10 pies of the duplicate debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Destreza. A criatura recibe 4d10 daño cortante en una salvación fallida, or half as much damage on a successful one.
  The duplicate explodes at the end of the duration, if you didn't cause it to explode before then. If the duplicate is killed before it explodes, you suffer one level of agotamiento.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 5th level or higher, the explosion damage increases by 1d10 for each slot level above 4th. In addition, when you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 6th level or higher, the duration is 1 hora. When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 8th level or higher, the duration is 8 horas. Using a espacio de conjuro of 6th level or higher grants a duration that doesn't require Concentración.

name: Stone Shape
desc: Tocas un objeto de piedra de tamaño Mediano o menor, o una sección de piedra que no supere 1,5m en ninguna dimensión, y lo moldeas en la forma que mejor se adapte a tu propósito. Así, por ejemplo, podrías dar forma a una gran roca para convertirla en un arma, un ídolo o un cofre, o abrir un pequeño pasaje a través de un muro, siempre que el muro tenga menos de 1,5m de grosor. También podrías moldear una puerta de piedra o su marco para sellarla por completo. El objeto que crees puede tener hasta dos bisagras y un pestillo, aunque no es posible lograr detalles mecánicos más precisos.
material: Arcilla blanda, trabajada toscamente con la forma deseada del objeto de piedra.

name: Stone Shape
desc:
You reshape the objetivo into any form you choose.

For example, you could shape a large rock into a weapon, statue, or chest, make a small passage through a wall (as long as it isn't more than 5 pies thick), seal a stone door shut, or create a hiding place. The objetivo can have up to two hinges and a latch, but finer mechanical detail isn't possible.
higher_level: You may select one additional objetivo for every slot level above 4th.

name: Stoneskin
desc: Este conjuro endurece la carne de una criatura voluntaria que tocas hasta volverla dura como la piedra. Hasta que el conjuro termine, el objetivo tiene resistencia al daño contundente, perforante y cortante de fuentes no mágicas.
material: Polvo de diamante por valor de 100 po, que el conjuro consume.
dnd_class: Cleric, Druid, Paladin, Ranger, Sorcerer, Wizard

name: Stoneskin
desc: Until the spell ends, the objetivo's flesh becomes as hard as stone and it gains resistance to no mágico contundente, perforante, and daño cortante.
higher_level: When using a 7th-level espacio de conjuro, the objetivo gains resistance to mágico contundente, perforante, and daño cortante.

name: Storm Kick
desc:
You must be able to move in order to cast this spell.

You leap into the air and flash across the battlefield, arriving pies-first with the fuerza of a thunderbolt. As part of casting this spell, make a ranged ataque de conjuro against a criatura you can see within range. If you hit, you instantly flash to an open space of your choosing adjacent to the objetivo, dealing daño contundente equal to 1d6 + your spellcasting modifier plus 3d8 daño de trueno and 6d8 daño de rayo. If your unarmed strike normally uses a larger die, use that instead of a d6\. If you miss, you may still choose to teleport next to the objetivo.
higher_level: When using a 6th-level espacio de conjuro or higher, if you are able to make more than one attack when you take the Attack action, you may make an additional ataque cuerpo a cuerpo con arma against the objetivo. When using a 7th-level espacio de conjuro, you may choose an additional objetivo within 30 pies of the objetivo for each espacio de conjuro level above 6th, forcing each additional objetivo to make a tirada de salvación de Destreza or take 6d8 daño de rayo.

name: Storm of Axes
desc: Deep Magic: battle You conjure up dozens of axes and direct them in a pattern in chopping, whirling mayhem. The blades fill eight 5-pie squares in a line 40 pies long or in a double-Fuerza line 20 pies long and 10 deep. The axes cause 6d8 daño cortante to criaturas in the area at the moment the spell is cast or la mitad del daño with a successful tirada de salvación de Destreza. By maintaining Concentración, you can move the swarm of axes up to 20 pies per ronda in any direction you wish. If the storm of axes moves into spaces containing criaturas, they immediately debe realizar another tirada de salvación de Destreza or suffer damage again.

name: Storm of Vengeance
desc:
Se forma una turbulenta nube de tormenta centrada en un punto que puedes ver, extendiéndose hasta un radio de 108 metros. En el área relampaguea, truena y rugen fuertes vientos. Cada criatura que se encuentre bajo la nube (a no más de 1.500 metros por debajo de ella) cuando aparece debe realizar una tirada de salvación de Constitución. Si la falla, la criatura sufre 2d6 de daño por trueno y queda ensordecida durante 5 minutos. Cada ronda que mantengas la concentración en este conjuro, la tormenta produce efectos adicionales en tu turno.

**Ronda 2.** Lluvia ácida cae de la nube. Cada criatura y objeto bajo la nube sufre 1d6 de daño por ácido.

**Ronda 3.** Llamas seis rayos desde la nube para golpear a seis criaturas u objetos de tu elección que se encuentren bajo ella. Una misma criatura u objeto no puede ser alcanzado por más de un rayo. Una criatura alcanzada debe realizar una tirada de salvación de Destreza. La criatura sufre 10d6 de daño por relámpago si la falla, o la mitad si la supera.

**Ronda 4.** Granizo cae desde la nube. Cada criatura bajo la nube sufre 2d6 de daño contundente.

**Rondas 5-10.** Ráfagas de viento y lluvia helada azotan el área bajo la nube. El área se convierte en terreno difícil y queda fuertemente oscurecida. Cada criatura en ella sufre 1d6 de daño por frío. Los ataques con armas a distancia en el área son imposibles. El viento y la lluvia cuentan como una distracción severa a efectos de mantener la concentración en conjuros. Por último, las ráfagas de fuerte viento (entre 32 y 80 kilómetros por hora) dispersan automáticamente nieblas, brumas y fenómenos similares en el área, sean mundanos o mágicos.

name: Storm of Vengeance
desc:
You conjure a churning storm cloud that spreads to cover the objetivo area. As it forms, rayo and trueno mix with howling winds, and cada criatura beneath the cloud makes a tirada de salvación de Constitución or recibe 2d6 daño de trueno and becomes ensordecido for 5 minutos.

Until the spell ends, at the start of your turn the cloud produces additional effects: ronda 2\. Acidic rain falls throughout the area dealing 1d6 daño de ácido to cada criatura and object beneath the cloud.

ronda 3\. rayo bolts strike up to 6 criaturas or objects of your choosing that are beneath the cloud (no more than one bolt per criatura or object). A criatura struck by this rayo makes a tirada de salvación de Destreza, taking 10d6 daño de rayo en una salvación fallida, or la mitad del daño en una salvación exitosa.

ronda 4\. Hailstones fall throughout the area dealing 2d6 daño contundente to cada criatura beneath the cloud.

ronda 5�10\. Gusts and freezing rain turn the area beneath the cloud into difficult terrain that is heavily obscured. Ranged weapon attacks are impossible while a criatura or its objetivo are beneath the cloud. When a criatura concentrating on a spell starts its turn beneath the cloud or enters into the area, it makes a tirada de salvación de Constitución or loses Concentración. Gusts of strong winds between 20�50 millas per hora automatically disperse fog, mists, and similar effects (whether mundane or mágico). Finally, cada criatura beneath the cloud recibe 1d6 daño de frío.

name: Storm of Wings
desc:
You create a storm of spectral birds, bats, or volando insects in a 15-pie-radius sphere on a point you can see within range. The storm spreads around corners, and its area is lightly obscured. cada criatura in the storm when it appears and each a criatura that starts its turn in the storm is affected by the storm.
  As a acción adicional on your turn, you can move the storm up to 30 pies. As an action on your turn, you can change the storm from one type to another, such as from a storm of bats to a storm of insects.
  ***Bats.*** The criatura recibe 4d6 daño necrótico, and its Velocidad is halved while within the storm as the bats cling to it and drain its blood.
  ***Birds.*** The criatura recibe 4d6 daño cortante, and has desventaja on attack rolls while within the storm as the birds fly in the way of the criatura's attacks.
  ***Insects.*** The criatura recibe 4d6 daño de veneno, and it debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Constitución each time it casts a spell while within the storm. en una salvación fallida, the criatura fails to cast the spell, losing the action but not the espacio de conjuro.
material: a drop of honey

name: Strength of the Underworld
desc: You call on the power of the dark gods of the afterlife to strengthen the objetivo's undead energy. The spell's objetivo has ventaja on tirada de salvacións against Turn Undead while the spell lasts. If this spell is cast on a corpse that died from darakhul fever, the corpse gains a +5 bonus on its roll to determine whether it rises as a darakhul.

name: Subliminal Aversion
desc: You ward a criatura within range against attacks by making the choice para impactar them painful. When the warded criatura is hit with a ataque cuerpo a cuerpo from within 5 pies of it, the attacker recibe 1d4 daño psíquico.

name: Sudden Dawn
desc: You call upon morning to arrive ahead of schedule. With a sharp word, you create a 30-pie-radius cylinder of ligera centered on a point on the ground within range. The cylinder extends vertically for 100 pies or until it reaches an obstruction, such as a ceiling. The area inside the cylinder is brightly lit.

name: Sudden Slue
desc: With a growl, you call forth dozens of bears to overrun todas las criaturas in a 20-pie cube within range. cada criatura in the area debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Destreza. en una salvación fallida, a criatura recibe 6d6 daño contundente and is knocked derribado. en una salvación exitosa, a criatura recibe half el daño and isn't knocked derribado. The bears disappear after making their charge.

name: Sudden Stampede
desc: You conjure up a multitude of fey spirits that manifest as galloping horses. These horses run in a 10-pie'wide, 60-pie-long line, in a given direction starting from a point within range, trampling todas las criaturas in their path, before vanishing again. cada criatura in the line recibe 6d10 daño contundente and is knocked derribado. A successful tirada de salvación de Destreza reduces el daño by half, and the criatura is not knocked derribado.

name: Suggestion
desc: Propones un curso de acción (limitado a una o dos frases) e influyes mágicamente sobre una criatura que puedas ver dentro del alcance, que pueda oírte y entenderte. Las criaturas que no pueden ser hechizadas son inmunes a este efecto. La sugerencia debe estar formulada de manera que el curso de acción propuesto parezca razonable. Pedirle a la criatura que se apuñale, se lance sobre una lanza, se inmole o lleve a cabo cualquier otro acto evidentemente dañino pone fin al conjuro. El objetivo debe realizar una tirada de salvación de Sabiduría. Si la falla, sigue el curso de acción que describiste lo mejor que puede. El curso de acción sugerido puede continuar durante toda la duración. Si la actividad sugerida puede completarse en menos tiempo, el conjuro termina cuando el sujeto acaba lo que se le pidió. También puedes especificar condiciones que desencadenen una actividad especial durante la duración. Por ejemplo, podrías sugerir que un caballero entregue su caballo de guerra al primer mendigo que encuentre. Si la condición no se cumple antes de que el conjuro expire, la actividad no se lleva a cabo. Si tú o alguno de tus compañeros causáis daño al objetivo, el conjuro termina.
material: La lengua de una serpiente y un trozo de panal de miel o una gota de aceite dulce.

name: Suggestion
desc:
criaturas that cannot be hechizado are immune to this spell. Suggest an activity phrased in a sentence or two. The objetivo is magically influenced to follow that course of activity. The suggestion must be worded to sound reasonable. Asking the objetivo to perform an action that is obviously harmful to it ends the spell.

The objetivo carries out the activity suggested by you as well as it can. The activity can last for the duration of the spell, and if it requires less time the spell ends after the objetivo has carried out the activity.

You may specify trigger conditions that cause the objetivo to perform a specific activity while the spell lasts. For example, you may suggest that the objetivo recibe off its clothes and dives the next time it sees a body of water. If the objetivo does not see a body of water before the spell ends, the specific activity isn't performed.

Any damage done to the objetivo by you or an aliado ends the spell for that criatura.
higher_level:
When using a 4th-level espacio de conjuro, the duration is Concentración, up to 24 horas. When using a 5th-level espacio de conjuro, the duration is 7 days. When using a 7th-level espacio de conjuro, the duration is 1 year. When using a 9th-level espacio de conjuro, the suggestion lasts until it is dispelled.

Any use of a 5th-level or higher espacio de conjuro grants a duration that doesn't require Concentración.

name: Summon Clockwork Beast
desc: Deep Magic: clockwork Once per day, you can cast this ritual to summon a Tiny clockwork beast doesn't require air, food, drink, or sleep. When its puntos de golpe are reduced to 0, it crumbles into a heap of gears and springs.

name: Summon Eldritch Servitor
desc:
You summon eldritch aberrations that appear in unoccupied spaces you can see within range. Choose one of the following options for what appears:
* Two [ghasts of Leng](https://api.open5e.com/monsters/ghast-of-leng)
* One [shantak](https://api.open5e.com/monsters/shantak)

When the summoned criaturas appear, you debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Carisma. en un éxito, the criaturas are friendly to you and your aliados. en un fallo, the criaturas are friendly to no one and attack the nearest criaturas, pursuing and fighting for as long as possible.

Roll initiative for the summoned criaturas, which take their own turns as a group. If friendly to you, they obey your verbal commands (no action required by you to issue a command), or they attack the nearest living criatura if they are not commanded otherwise.

Each ronda when you maintain Concentración on the spell, you debe realizar a successful CD 15 tirada de salvación de Sabiduría at the end of your turn or take 1d4 daño psíquico. If the total of this damage exceeds your Sabiduría score, you gain 1 point of Void taint and you are afflicted with a form of short-term madness. The same penalty applies when el daño exceeds twice your Sabiduría score, three times your Sabiduría score, and so forth, if you maintain Concentración for that long.

A summoned criatura disappears when it drops to 0 puntos de golpe or when the spell ends. If you stop concentrating on the spell before 1 hora has elapsed, the criaturas become uncontrolled and hostile until they disappear 1d6 rondas later or until they are killed.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a 7th- or 8th-level espacio de conjuro, you can summon four [ghasts of Leng](https://api.open5e.com/monsters/ghast-of-leng) or a [hound of Tindalos](https://api.open5e.com/monsters/hound-of-tindalos). When you cast it with a 9th-level espacio de conjuro, you can summon five [ghasts of Leng](https://api.open5e.com/monsters/ghast-of-leng) or a [nightgaunt](https://api.open5e.com/monsters/nightgaunt).
material: a vial of the caster’s blood and a silver dagger
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Paladin, Ranger, Sorcerer, Warlock, Wizard

name: Summon Old One's Avatar
desc: Deep Magic: void magic You summon a worldly incarnation of a Great Old One, which appears in an unoccupied space you can see within range. This avatar manifests as a Void speaker (criatura Codex NPC) augmented by boons from the Void. Choose one of the following options for the type of avatar that appears (other options might be available if the GM allows): Avatar of Cthulhu. The Void speaker is a goat-man with the ability to cast black goat's blessing and unseen strangler at will. Avatar of Yog-Sothoth. The Void speaker is a human with 1d4 + 1 flesh warps and the ability to cast gift of Azathoth and thunderwave at will. When the avatar appears, you debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Carisma. If it succeeds, the avatar is friendly to you and your aliados. If it fails, the avatar is friendly to no one and attacks the nearest criatura to it, pursuing and fighting for as long as possible. Roll initiative for the avatar, which recibe its own turn. If friendly to you, it obeys verbal commands you issue to it (no action required by you). If the avatar has no command, it attacks the nearest criatura. Each ronda you maintain Concentración on the spell, you debe realizar a successful CD 15 tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or take 1d6 daño psíquico. If the cumulative total of this damage exceeds your Sabiduría score, you gain one point of Void taint and you are afflicted with a short-term madness. The same penalty recurs when el daño exceeds twice your Sabiduría, three times your Sabiduría, etc. The avatar disappears when it drops to 0 puntos de golpe or when the spell ends. If you stop concentrating on the spell before an hora has elapsed, the avatar becomes uncontrolled and hostile and doesn't disappear until 1d6 rondas later or it's killed.
dnd_class: Wizard, Warlock, Sorceror, Druid, Cleric, Bard

name: Summon Star
desc: You summon a friendly star from the heavens to do your bidding. It appears in an unoccupied space you can see within range and recibe the form of a glowing humanoid with long white hair. todas las criaturas other than you who view the star debe realizar a successful tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or be hechizado for the duration of the spell. A criatura hechizado in this way can repeat the tirada de salvación de Sabiduría at the end of each of its turns. en un éxito, the criatura is no longer hechizado and is immune to the effect of this casting of the spell. In all other ways, the star is equivalent to a [deva](https://api.open5e.com/monsters/deva). It entiende and obeys verbal commands you give it. If you do not give the star a command, it defends itself and attacks the last criatura that attacked it. The star disappears when it drops to 0 puntos de golpe or when the spell ends.

name: Sunbeam
desc: Un haz de brillante luz irradia desde tu mano formando una línea de 1,5 metros de ancho y 18 metros de largo. Cada criatura en la línea debe realizar una tirada de salvación de Constitución. Si la falla, la criatura sufre 6d8 de daño radiante y queda cegada hasta tu siguiente turno. Si la supera, sufre la mitad del daño y no queda cegada por este conjuro. Los no muertos y los cienos tienen desventaja en esta tirada de salvación. Puedes crear una nueva línea de resplandor como acción en cualquier turno hasta que el conjuro termine. Durante la duración, una mota de brillante resplandor brilla en tu mano. Emite luz brillante en un radio de 9 metros y luz tenue 9 metros más. Esta luz es luz solar.
material: Una lupa.

name: Sunbeam
desc:
Oozes and undead have desventaja on tirada de salvacións made to resist this spell. A beam of radiante sunlight streaks from your hand. cada criatura in the area recibe 6d8 daño radiante and is cegado for 1 ronda.

Until the spell ends, you can use an action on subsequent turns to create a new beam of sunlight and a mote of brilliant radiance lingers on your hand, shedding bright ligera in a 30-pie radius and dim ligera an additional 30 pies. This ligera is sunlight.
higher_level: When using an 8th-level espacio de conjuro el daño increases by 1d8.

name: Sunburst
desc: Un brillante destello de luz solar resplandece en un radio de 18 metros centrado en un punto que elijas dentro del alcance. Cada criatura en esa luz debe realizar una tirada de salvación de Constitución. Si la falla, la criatura sufre 12d6 de daño radiante y queda cegada durante 1 minuto. Si la supera, sufre la mitad del daño y no queda cegada por este conjuro. Los no muertos y los cienos tienen desventaja en esta tirada de salvación. Una criatura cegada por este conjuro realiza otra tirada de salvación de Constitución al final de cada uno de sus turnos. Si la supera, deja de estar cegada. Este conjuro disipa cualquier oscuridad en su área que haya sido creada por un conjuro.
material: Fuego y un fragmento de piedra solar.

name: Sunburst
desc:
Oozes and undead have desventaja on tirada de salvacións made to resist this spell. You create a burst of radiante sunlight that fills the area. cada criatura in the area recibe 12d6 daño radiante and is cegado for 1 minuto. A criatura cegado by this spell repeats its tirada de salvación at the end of each of its turns, ending the blindness en una salvación exitosa.

This spell dispels any mágico darkness in its area.
higher_level: When using a 9th-level espacio de conjuro el daño increases by 2d6.

name: Suppress Regeneration
desc: You temporarily remove the ability to regenerate from a criatura you can see within range. The objetivo debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Constitución. en una salvación fallida, the objetivo can't regain puntos de golpe from the Regeneration trait or similar spell or trait for the duration. The objetivo can receive mágico healing or regain puntos de golpe from other traits, spells, or actions, as normal. At the end of each of its turns, the objetivo can make another tirada de salvación de Constitución. en un éxito, the spell ends on the objetivo.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 2nd level or higher, you can objetivo one additional criatura for each slot level above 1st. The criaturas must be within 30 pies of each other when you objetivo them.

name: Surge Dampener
desc: Using your Fuerza of will, you cause una criatura other than yourself that you touch to become so firmly entrenched within reality that it is protected from the effects of a chaos magic surge. The protected criatura can make a CD 13 tirada de salvación de Carisma to negate the effect of a chaos magic surge that does not normally allow a tirada de salvación, or it gains ventaja on a tirada de salvación that is normally allowed. Once the protected criatura makes a successful tirada de salvación allowed by **surge dampener**, the spell ends.

name: Surprise Blessing
desc:
You touch a willing criatura and choose one of the conditions listed below that the criatura is currently subjected to. The condition’s normal effect on the objetivo is suspended, and the indicated effect applies instead. This spell’s effect on the objetivo lasts for the duration of the original condition or until the spell ends. If this spell ends before the original condition’s duration expires, you become affected by the condition for as long as it lasts, even if you were not the original recipient of the condition.

***cegado:*** The objetivo gains vista verdadera out to a range of 10 pies and can see 10 pies into the Ethereal Plane.

***hechizado:*** The objetivo’s Carisma score becomes 19, unless it is already higher than 19, and it gains immunity to charm effects.

***asustado:*** The objetivo emits a 10-pie-radius aura of dread. cada criatura the objetivo designates that starts its turn in the aura debe realizar a successful tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or be asustado of the objetivo. A criatura asustado in this way that starts its turn outside the aura repeats the tirada de salvación, ending the condition on itself en un éxito.

***paralizado:*** The objetivo can use one extra acción adicional or reacción per ronda.

***petrificado:*** The objetivo gains a +2 bonus to AC.

***envenenado:*** The objetivo heals 2d6 puntos de golpe at the start of its next turn, and it gains immunity to daño de veneno and the envenenado condition.

***aturdido:*** The objetivo has ventaja on Inteligencia, Sabiduría, and Carisma tirada de salvacións.

name: Symbol
desc:
Cuando lanzas este conjuro, inscribes un glifo dañino sobre una superficie (como una sección del suelo, una pared o una mesa) o dentro de un objeto que pueda cerrarse para ocultar el glifo (como un libro, un pergamino o un cofre del tesoro). Si eliges una superficie, el glifo puede cubrir un área no mayor de 3 metros de diámetro. Si eliges un objeto, ese objeto debe permanecer en su lugar; si el objeto se mueve más de 3 metros desde donde lanzaste este conjuro, el glifo se rompe y el conjuro termina sin activarse. El glifo es casi invisible y requiere una prueba de Inteligencia (Investigación) contra la CD de salvación de tu conjuro para encontrarlo. Decides qué activa el glifo cuando lanzas el conjuro. Para los glifos inscritos en una superficie, los desencadenantes más habituales incluyen tocar o pisar el glifo, retirar otro objeto que lo cubra, acercarse a una cierta distancia de él, o manipular el objeto que lo contiene. Para los glifos inscritos dentro de un objeto, los desencadenantes más comunes son abrir el objeto, acercarse a una cierta distancia de él, o ver o leer el glifo. Puedes refinar aún más el desencadenante para que el conjuro se active solo bajo ciertas circunstancias o según las características físicas de una criatura (como la altura o el peso), o su tipo físico (por ejemplo, la protección podría configurarse para afectar a brujas o cambiaformas). También puedes especificar criaturas que no activen el glifo, como aquellas que pronuncien cierta contraseña. Cuando inscribes el glifo, elige una de las opciones a continuación para su efecto. Una vez activado, el glifo brilla e ilumina con luz tenue una esfera de 18 metros de radio durante 10 minutos, tras lo cual el conjuro termina. Cada criatura dentro de la esfera cuando el glifo se activa es afectada por su efecto, al igual que cualquier criatura que entre en la esfera por primera vez en un turno o que termine su turno en ella.

**Muerte.** Cada objetivo debe realizar una tirada de salvación de Constitución, sufriendo 10d10 de daño necrótico si falla, o la mitad de ese daño si tiene éxito.

**Discordia.** Cada objetivo debe realizar una tirada de salvación de Constitución. Si falla, el objetivo discute y pelea con otras criaturas durante 1 minuto. Durante este tiempo, es incapaz de comunicarse de forma significativa y tiene desventaja en las tiradas de ataque y las pruebas de característica.

**Miedo.** Cada objetivo debe realizar una tirada de salvación de Sabiduría y, si falla, queda asustado durante 1 minuto. Mientras está asustado, el objetivo suelta todo lo que lleve en las manos y debe alejarse al menos 9 metros del glifo en cada uno de sus turnos, si puede.

**Desesperanza.** Cada objetivo debe realizar una tirada de salvación de Carisma. Si falla, el objetivo queda abrumado por la desesperación durante 1 minuto. Durante este tiempo, no puede atacar ni afectar a ninguna criatura con habilidades dañinas, conjuros u otros efectos mágicos.

**Locura.** Cada objetivo debe realizar una tirada de salvación de Inteligencia. Si falla, el objetivo enloquece durante 1 minuto. Una criatura enloquecida no puede realizar acciones, no puede entender lo que dicen otras criaturas, no puede leer y solo habla en galimatías. El DM controla su movimiento, que es errático.

**Dolor.** Cada objetivo debe realizar una tirada de salvación de Constitución y, si falla, queda incapacitado por un dolor atroz durante 1 minuto.

**Sueño.** Cada objetivo debe realizar una tirada de salvación de Sabiduría y, si falla, cae inconsciente durante 10 minutos. Una criatura se despierta si recibe daño o si alguien usa una acción para sacudirla o abofetearla para despertarla.

**Aturdimiento.** Cada objetivo debe realizar una tirada de salvación de Sabiduría y, si falla, queda aturdido durante 1 minuto.
material: Mercurio, fósforo y diamante y ópalo en polvo con un valor total de al menos 1.000 po, que el conjuro consume.

name: Symbol
desc:
You inscribe a potent glyph on the objetivo, setting a mágico trap for your enemigos. If the glyph is moved more than 10 pies from its original position, or if it comes within 20 pies of another glyph that you have cast, the spell ends. Finding the Tiny glyph requires an Investigación check against your CD de salvación del conjuro.

Describe the actions a criatura must perform to trigger the spell, such as approaching within a certain distance, opening or touching the object the glyph is inscribed on, or seeing or reading the glyph.
