A criatura that starts its turn within 40 pies of the sphere or that enters that area for the first time on its turn debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Fuerza or be pulled 15 pies toward the rift. A criatura that starts its turn in the rift or that comes into contact with it for the first time on its turn recibe 8d10 daño necrótico. criaturas inside the rift are cegado and ensordecido. Unattended objects within 40 pies of the rift are drawn 15 pies toward it at the start of your turn, and they take damage as criaturas if they come into contact with it.

While concentrating on the spell, you take 2d6 daño necrótico at the end of each of your turns.
material: a black opal worth 500 gp, carved with a Void glyph

name: Void Strike
desc: With a short phrase of Void Speech, you gather writhing darkness around your hand. When you cast the spell, and as an action on subsequent turns while you maintain Concentración, you can unleash a bolt of darkness at a criatura within range. Make a ranged ataque de conjuro. If the objetivo is in dim ligera or darkness, you have ventaja on the roll. On a hit, the objetivo recibe 5d8 daño necrótico and is asustado of you until the start of your next turn.
higher_level: When you cast the spell using a espacio de conjuro of 4th level or higher, el daño increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 3rd.

name: Volley Shield
desc:
You touch a willing criatura and create a shimmering shield of energy to protect it. The shield grants the objetivo a +5 bonus to AC and gives it resistance against no mágico contundente, perforante, and daño cortante for the duration of the spell.

In addition, the shield can reflect hostile spells back at their casters. When the objetivo makes a successful tirada de salvación against a hostile spell, the caster of the spell immediately becomes the spell’s new objetivo. The caster is entitled to the appropriate tirada de salvación against the returned spell, if any, and is affected by the spell as if it came from a spellcaster of the caster’s level.

name: Vomit Tentacles
desc:
Your jaws distend and dozens of thin, slimy tentacles emerge from your mouth to grasp and bind your opponents. Make a melee ataque de conjuro against a foe within 15 pies of you. On a hit, the objetivo recibe daño contundente equal to 2d6 + your Fuerza modifier and is agarrado (escape CD equal to your CD de salvación del conjuro). Until this grapple ends, the objetivo is apresado and it recibe the same damage at the start of each of your turns. You can grapple only una criatura at a time.

The Clase de Armadura of the tentacles is equal to yours. If they take daño cortante equal to 5 + your Constitución modifier from a single attack, enough tentacles are severed to enable a agarrado criatura to escape. Severed tentacles are replaced by new ones at the start of your turn. Damage dealt to the tentacles doesn’t affect your puntos de golpe.

While the spell is in effect, you are incapable of speech and can’t cast spells that have verbal components.
material: a piece of a tentacle

name: Voorish Sign
desc: For the duration, invisible criaturas and objects within 20 pies of you become visible to you, and you have ventaja on tirada de salvacións against effects that cause the asustado condition. The effect moves with you, remaining centered on you until the duration expires.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 3rd level or higher, the radius increases by 5 pies for every two slot levels above 1st.
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Paladin, Ranger, Sorcerer, Warlock, Wizard

name: Waft
desc: This spell was first invented by dragon parents to assist their offspring when learning to fly. You gain a volando Velocidad of 60 pies for 1 ronda. At the start of your next turn, you float rapidly down and land gently on a solid surface beneath you.
material: a topaz worth at least 10 gp

name: Walk the Twisted Path
desc:
When you cast this spell, you and up to five criaturas you can see within 20 pies of you enter a shifting landscape of endless walls and corridors that connect to many places throughout the world.

You can find your way to a destination within 100 millas, as long as you know for certain that your destination exists (though you don’t need to have seen or visited it before), and you debe realizar a successful CD 20 Inteligencia check. If you have the ability to retrace a path you have previously taken without making a check (as a minotaur or a goristro can), this check automatically succeeds. On a failed check, you don't find your path this ronda, and you and your companions each take 4d6 daño psíquico as the madness of the shifting maze exacts its toll. You must repeat the check at the start of each of your turns until you find your way to your destination or until you die. In either event, the spell ends.

When the spell ends, you and those traveling with you appear in a safe location at your destination.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 7th level or higher, you can bring along two additional criaturas or travel an additional 100 millas for each slot level above 6th.
material: a map

name: Walking Wall
desc:
This spell creates a wall of swinging axes from the pile of miniature axes you provide when casting the spell. The wall fills a rectangle 10 pies wide, 10 pies high, and 20 pies long. The wall has a base Velocidad of 50 pies, but it can’t take the Dash action. It can make up to four attacks per ronda on your turn, using your ataque de conjuro modifier para impactar and with a alcance of 10 pies. You direct the wall’s movement and attacks as a acción adicional. If you choose not to direct it, the wall continues trying to execute the last command you gave it. The wall can’t use reactions. Each successful attack causa 4d6 daño cortante, and el daño is considered mágico.

The wall has AC 12 and 200 puntos de golpe, and is immune to necrótico, veneno, psíquico, and daño perforante. If it is reduced to 0 puntos de golpe or when the spell’s duration ends, the wall disappears and the miniature axes fall to the ground in a tidy heap.
material: 100 miniature axes

name: Wall of Fire
desc: Creas un muro de fuego sobre una superficie sólida dentro del alcance. Puedes hacer que el muro tenga hasta 18 m de longitud, 6 m de altura y 30 cm de grosor, o bien un muro circular de hasta 6 m de diámetro, 6 m de altura y 30 cm de grosor. El muro es opaco y dura lo que dure el conjuro. Cuando el muro aparece, cada criatura dentro de su área debe realizar una tirada de salvación de Destreza. Si falla, la criatura sufre 5d8 de daño de fuego, o la mitad si tiene éxito. Uno de los lados del muro, elegido por ti cuando lanzas el conjuro, inflige 5d8 de daño de fuego a cada criatura que finalice su turno a 3 m o menos de ese lado o dentro del muro. Una criatura sufre el mismo daño cuando entra en el muro por primera vez en un turno o finaliza su turno en él. El otro lado del muro no inflige daño.
higher_level: Cuando lanzas este conjuro usando un espacio de conjuro de nivel 5 o superior, el daño del conjuro aumenta en 1d8 por cada nivel de espacio por encima del 4.º.
material: Un pequeño trozo de fósforo.

name: Wall of Fire
desc:
You create a wall of fuego on a solid surface. The wall can be up to 60 pies long (it does not have to be a straight line; sections of the wall can angle as long as they are contiguous), 20 pies high, and 1 pie thick, or a ringed wall up to 20 pies in diameter, 20 pies high, and 1 pie thick. The wall blocks sight.

When the wall appears, cada criatura within its area makes a tirada de salvación de Destreza, taking 5d8 daño de fuego en una salvación fallida, or half as much damage en una salvación exitosa.

One side of the wall (chosen when the spell is cast) causa 5d8 daño de fuego to cada criatura that ends its turn within 10 pies of that side or inside the wall. A criatura recibe the same damage when it enters the wall itself for the first time on a turn or ends its turn there. The other side of the wall causa no damage.
higher_level: el daño increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 4th.

name: Wall of Flesh
desc:
A squirming wall of bodies, groping arms and tentacles, and moaning, biting mouths heaves itself up from the ground at a point you choose. The wall is 6 inches thick and is made up of a contiguous group of ten 10-pie square sections. The wall can have any shape you desire.

If the wall enters a criatura's space when it appears, the criatura makes a tirada de salvación de Destreza, and en un éxito it moves up to its Velocidad to escape. en una salvación fallida, it is swallowed by the wall (as below).

When a criatura enters the area for the first time on a turn or starts its turn within 10 pies of the wall, tentacles and arms alcance out to grab it. The criatura makes a tirada de salvación de Destreza or recibe 5d8 daño contundente and becomes agarrado. If the criatura was already agarrado by the wall at the start of its turn and fails its tirada de salvación, a mouth opens in the wall and swallows the criatura.

A criatura swallowed by the wall recibe 5d8 ongoing daño contundente and is cegado, ensordecido, and apresado.

A criatura agarrado or apresado by the wall can use its action to make a tirada de salvación de Fuerza against your CD de salvación del conjuro. en un éxito, a agarrado criatura frees itself and a apresado criatura claws its way out of the wall's space, exiting to an empty space next to the wall and still agarrado.
higher_level: el daño increases by 1d8 for each slot level above the 6th.

name: Wall of Force
desc: Una pared invisible de fuerza surge en un punto que eliges dentro del alcance. La pared puede aparecer en cualquier orientación que elijas, como una barrera horizontal o vertical, o en ángulo. Puede flotar libremente o apoyarse sobre una superficie sólida. Puedes darle la forma de una cúpula hemisférica o una esfera con un radio de hasta 3 metros, o bien moldearla como una superficie plana compuesta por diez paneles de 3 metros por 3 metros. Cada panel debe ser contiguo a otro panel. En cualquier forma, la pared tiene 0,5 cm de grosor. Dura mientras se mantenga la concentración. Si la pared atraviesa el espacio de una criatura al aparecer, esa criatura es empujada hacia un lado de la pared (tú eliges cuál). Nada puede atravesar físicamente la pared. Es inmune a todo el daño y no puede ser disipada por dispel magic. Sin embargo, un conjuro disintegrate destruye la pared al instante. La pared también se extiende hacia el Plano Etéreo, bloqueando el viaje etéreo a través de ella.
material: Una pizca de polvo obtenido al triturar una gema transparente.

name: Wall of Force
desc:
You create an invisible wall of fuerza at a point you choose. The wall is a horizontal or vertical barrier, or at an angle. It can be free floating or resting on a solid surface. You can form it into a hemispherical dome or a sphere, either with a radius of up to 10 pies. You may also choose to create a flat surface made up of a contiguous group of ten 10-pie square sections. The wall is 1/4 inch thick.

If the wall enters a criatura's space when it appears, the criatura is pushed to one side of the wall (your choice), but when a criatura would be surrounded on all sides by the wall (or the wall and another solid surface), it can use its reacción to make a tirada de salvación de Destreza to move up to its Velocidad to escape. Any criatura without a special sense like vista ciega has desventaja on this tirada de salvación.

Nothing can physically pass through the wall.

It can be destroyed with dispel magic cast using a espacio de conjuro of at least 5th-level or by being dealt at least 25 daño de fuerza at once. It is otherwise immune to damage. The wall also extends into the Ethereal Plane, blocking ethereal travel through it.

name: Wall of Ice
desc: Creas una pared de hielo sobre una superficie sólida dentro del alcance. Puedes darle la forma de una cúpula hemisférica o una esfera con un radio de hasta 3 metros, o bien moldearla como una superficie plana compuesta por diez paneles cuadrados de 3 metros. Cada panel debe ser contiguo a otro panel. En cualquier forma, la pared tiene 30 cm de grosor y dura mientras se mantenga la concentración. Si la pared atraviesa el espacio de una criatura al aparecer, la criatura que se encuentre en su área es empujada hacia un lado de la pared y debe realizar una tirada de salvación de Destreza. Si falla, la criatura sufre 10d6 de daño por frío, o la mitad si tiene éxito. La pared es un objeto que puede ser dañado y, por tanto, destruido. Tiene CA 12 y 30 puntos de golpe por cada sección de 3 metros, y es vulnerable al daño por fuego. Reducir una sección de 3 metros de la pared a 0 puntos de golpe la destruye y deja una cortina de aire gélido en el espacio que ocupaba la pared. Una criatura que atraviese la cortina de aire gélido por primera vez en su turno debe realizar una tirada de salvación de Constitución. Si falla, sufre 5d6 de daño por frío, o la mitad si tiene éxito.
higher_level: Cuando lanzas este conjuro usando un espacio de conjuro de nivel 7 o superior, el daño que inflige la pared al aparecer aumenta en 2d6, y el daño por atravesar la cortina de aire gélido aumenta en 1d6, por cada nivel de espacio por encima del 6.º.
material: Un pequeño trozo de cuarzo.

name: Wall of Ice
desc:
You create a wall of ice on a solid surface. You can form it into a hemispherical dome or a sphere, either with a radius of up to 10 pies. You may also choose to create a flat surface made up of a contiguous group of ten 10-pie square sections. The wall is 1 pie thick.

If the wall enters a criatura's space when it appears, the criatura is pushed to one side of it (your choice).

In addition, the criatura makes a tirada de salvación de Destreza, taking 10d6 daño de frío en una salvación fallida, or half as much damage en un éxito.

The wall is an object with vulnerability to daño de fuego, with AC 12 and 30 puntos de golpe per 10-pie section. Reducing a 10-pie section of wall to 0 puntos de golpe destroys it and leaves behind a sheet of frigid air in the space the section occupied. A criatura moving through the sheet of frigid air for the first time on a turn makes a tirada de salvación de Constitución, taking 5d6 daño de frío en una salvación fallida, or half as much damage on a successful one.
higher_level: el daño the wall causa when it appears increases by 2d6 and el daño from passing through the sheet of frigid air increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 6th.

name: Wall of Stone
desc: Una pared no mágica de piedra sólida surge en un punto que eliges dentro del alcance. La pared tiene 15 cm de grosor y está compuesta por diez paneles de 3 metros por 3 metros. Cada panel debe ser contiguo a al menos otro panel. Alternativamente, puedes crear paneles de 3 metros por 6 metros que tengan solo 7,5 cm de grosor. Si la pared atraviesa el espacio de una criatura al aparecer, esa criatura es empujada hacia un lado de la pared (tú eliges cuál). Si una criatura quedara completamente rodeada por la pared (o por la pared y otra superficie sólida), esa criatura puede realizar una tirada de salvación de Destreza. Si tiene éxito, puede usar su reacción para moverse hasta su velocidad de modo que ya no quede encerrada por la pared. La pared puede tener cualquier forma que desees, aunque no puede ocupar el mismo espacio que una criatura u objeto. La pared no necesita ser vertical ni descansar sobre ninguna base firme. Sin embargo, debe fusionarse con la piedra existente y estar sólidamente sustentada por ella. Así, puedes usar este conjuro para tender un puente sobre un abismo o crear una rampa. Si creas un tramo de más de 6 metros de longitud, debes reducir a la mitad el tamaño de cada panel para crear soportes. Puedes moldear toscamente la pared para crear almenas, parapetos y similares. La pared es un objeto de piedra que puede ser dañado y, por tanto, destruido. Cada panel tiene CA 15 y 30 puntos de golpe por centímetro de grosor. Reducir un panel a 0 puntos de golpe lo destruye y podría causar que los paneles conectados se derrumben, a discreción del DM. Si mantienes la concentración en este conjuro durante toda su duración, la pared se vuelve permanente y no puede ser disipada. De lo contrario, la pared desaparece cuando el conjuro termina.
material: Un pequeño bloque de granito.

name: Wall of Stone
desc:
A no mágico wall of solid stone appears at a point you choose. The wall is 6 inches thick and is made up of a contiguous group of ten 10-pie square sections. Alternatively, you can create 10-pie-by-20- pie sections that are only 3 inches thick.

The wall can have any shape you desire, though it can't occupy the same space as a criatura or object.

The wall doesn't need to be vertical or rest on any firm foundation but must merge with and be solidly supported by existing stone. Thus, you can use this spell to bridge a chasm or create a ramp.

If the wall enters a criatura's space when it appears, the criatura is pushed to one side of the wall (your choice), but when a criatura would be surrounded on all sides by the wall (or the wall and another solid surface), it can use its reacción to make a tirada de salvación de Destreza to move up to its Velocidad to escape.

If you create a span greater than 20 pies in length, you must halve the size of each panel to create supports. You can crudely shape the wall to create crenelations, battlements, and so on.

The wall is an object made of stone. Each panel has AC 15 and 30 puntos de golpe per inch of thickness.

Reducing a panel to 0 puntos de golpe destroys it and at the Narrator's discretion might cause connected panels to collapse.

You can make the wall permanent by concentrating on the spell for the full duration.

name: Wall of Thorns
desc: Creas una pared de arbustos resistentes, flexibles y enredados, erizados de espinas afiladas como agujas. La pared aparece dentro del alcance sobre una superficie sólida y dura mientras se mantenga la concentración. Puedes elegir que la pared tenga hasta 18 metros de largo, 3 metros de alto y 1,5 metros de grosor, o bien que sea un círculo de 6 metros de diámetro y hasta 6 metros de alto y 1,5 metros de grosor. La pared bloquea la línea de visión. Cuando la pared aparece, cada criatura dentro de su área debe realizar una tirada de salvación de Destreza. Si falla, la criatura sufre 7d8 de daño perforante, o la mitad si tiene éxito. Una criatura puede moverse a través de la pared, aunque de forma lenta y dolorosa. Por cada 30 cm que una criatura se mueva a través de la pared, debe gastar 1,2 metros adicionales de movimiento. Además, la primera vez que una criatura entra en la pared en su turno o termina su turno en ella, debe realizar una tirada de salvación de Destreza. Si falla, sufre 7d8 de daño cortante, o la mitad si tiene éxito.
higher_level: Cuando lanzas este conjuro usando un espacio de conjuro de nivel 7 o superior, ambos tipos de daño aumentan en 1d8 por cada nivel de espacio por encima del 6.º.
material: Un puñado de espinas.

name: Wall of Thorns
desc:
You create a wall of tough, pliable, tangled brush bristling with needle-sharp thorns on a solid surface. You can choose to make the wall up to 60 pies long, 10 pies high, and 5 pies thick or a circle that has a 20-pie diameter and is up to 20 pies high and 5 pies thick. The wall blocks line of sight.

When the wall appears, cada criatura within its area makes a tirada de salvación de Destreza, taking 7d8 daño perforante en una salvación fallida, or half as much damage en una salvación exitosa.

A criatura can move through the wall, albeit slowly and painfully. For every 1 pie a criatura moves through the wall, it must spend 4 pies of movement. The first time a criatura enters the wall on a turn or ends its turn there, it makes a tirada de salvación de Destreza, taking 7d8 daño cortante en una salvación fallida, or half as much damage en una salvación exitosa.
higher_level: Damage dealt by the wall increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 6th.

name: Wall of Time
desc: You create a wall of shimmering, transparent blocks on a solid surface within range. You can make a straight wall up to 60 pies long, 20 pies high, and 1 pie thick, or a cylindrical wall up to 20 pies high, 1 pie thick, and 20 pies in diameter. no mágico ranged attacks that cross the wall vanish into the time stream with no other effect. Ranged spell attacks and ranged weapon attacks made with magic weapons that pass through the wall are made with desventaja. A criatura that intentionally enters or passes through the wall is affected as if it had just failed its initial tirada de salvación against a [slow](https://api.open5e.com/spells/slow) spell.
material: an hourglass

name: War Horn
desc:
You blow a blast on your war horn, sending a ripple of fear through your enemigos and bolstering your aliados. Choose up to three hostile criaturas in range and up to three friendly criaturas in range. Each hostile objetivo debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or become asustado for the duration. At the end of each of its turns, a asustado criatura can make another tirada de salvación de Sabiduría. en un éxito, the spell ends on that criatura.
  Each friendly objetivo gains a number of temporary puntos de golpe equal to 2d4 + your spellcasting ability modifier and has ventaja on the next tirada de ataque it makes before the spell ends. The temporary puntos de golpe last for 1 hora.

name: Warding Bond
desc: Este conjuro protege a una criatura voluntaria que tocas y crea una conexión mística entre tú y el objetivo hasta que el conjuro termine. Mientras el objetivo se encuentre a 18 metros o menos de ti, obtiene un bonificador de +1 a la CA y a las tiradas de salvación, y tiene resistencia a todo el daño. Además, cada vez que recibe daño, tú sufres la misma cantidad de daño. El conjuro termina si caes a 0 puntos de golpe o si tú y el objetivo os separáis más de 18 metros. También termina si el conjuro es lanzado de nuevo sobre cualquiera de las criaturas vinculadas. También puedes disipar el conjuro como una acción.
material: Un par de anillos de platino que valgan al menos 50 po cada uno, que tú y el objetivo debéis llevar puestos durante toda la duración.

name: Warding Bond
desc:
Until the spell ends, the objetivo is warded by a mystic connection between it and you. While the objetivo is within 60 pies it gains a +1 bonus to AC and tirada de salvacións, and it has resistance to all damage. Each time it recibe damage, you take an equal amount of damage.

The spell ends if you are reduced to 0 puntos de golpe or if you and the objetivo become separated by more than 60 pies. It also ends if you use an action to dismiss it, or if the spell is cast again on either you or the objetivo.
higher_level: The duration increases by 1 hora for each slot level above 2nd.

name: Warning Shout
desc: You sense danger before it happens and call out a warning to an aliado. una criatura you can see and that can hear you gains ventaja on its initiative roll.
casting_time: 1 reaction, which you take immediately before initiative is rolled

name: Warp Mind and Matter
desc: A criatura you can see within range undergoes a baleful transmogrification. The objetivo debe realizar a successful tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or suffer a flesh warp and be afflicted with a form of indefinite madness.
material: root of deadly nightshade and a drop of the caster’s blood
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Paladin, Ranger, Sorcerer, Warlock, Wizard

name: Warrior's Instincts
desc: Your senses sharpen, allowing you to anticipate incoming attacks and find weaknesses in the defenses of your foes. Until the spell ends, criaturas cannot gain bonuses (like those granted by bless or expertise dice) or ventaja on attack rolls against you. In addition, none of your movement provokes opportunity attacks, and you ignore no mágico difficult terrain. Finally, you can end the spell early to treat a single weapon tirada de ataque as though you had rolled a 15 on the d20.
higher_level: For each slot level above 5th, you can also apply this spell's benefits to an additional criatura you can see within 30 pies.

name: Water Breathing
desc: Este conjuro otorga a un máximo de diez criaturas voluntarias dentro del alcance que puedas ver la capacidad de respirar bajo el agua hasta el final de su duración. Las criaturas afectadas también conservan su patrón de respiración normal.
material: Un trozo corto de caña o paja.
dnd_class: Druid, Ranger, Ritual Caster, Sorcerer, Wizard

name: Water Breathing
desc: Until the spell ends, the objetivos are able to breathe underwater (and still able to respirate normally).

name: Water Walk
desc: Este conjuro otorga la capacidad de desplazarse sobre cualquier superficie líquida —como agua, ácido, barro, nieve, arenas movedizas o lava— como si fuera terreno sólido e inofensivo (las criaturas que crucen lava fundida pueden seguir recibiendo daño por el calor). Hasta diez criaturas voluntarias que puedas ver dentro del alcance obtienen esta capacidad durante la duración. Si el objetivo es una criatura sumergida en un líquido, el conjuro la lleva a la superficie del mismo a una velocidad de 18 metros por ronda.
dnd_class: Cleric, Druid, Ranger, Ritual Caster, Sorcerer

name: Water Walk
desc:
Until the spell ends, the objetivos are able to move across any liquid surface (such as water, ácido, mud, snow, quicksand, or lava) as if it was solid ground.

criaturas can still take damage from surfaces that would deliver damage from corrosion or extreme temperatures, but they do not sink while moving across it.

A objetivo submerged in a liquid is moved to the surface of the liquid at a rate of 60 pies per ronda.
higher_level: The duration increases by 1 hora for each slot level above 3rd.

name: Weapon of Blood
desc: When you cast this spell, you inflict 1d4 daño cortante on yourself that can’t be healed until after the blade created by this spell is destroyed or the spell ends. The trickling blood transforms into a dagger of red metal that functions as a **+1 dagger**.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 3rd to 5th level, the self-inflicted wound causa 3d4 daño cortante and the spell produces a **+2 dagger**. When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 6th to 8th level, the self-inflicted wound causa 6d4 daño cortante and the spell produces a **+2 dagger of wounding**. When you cast this spell using a 9th-level espacio de conjuro, the self-inflicted wound causa 9d4 daño cortante and the spell produces a **+3 dagger of wounding**.
material: a pinch of iron shavings

name: Web
desc: Conjuras una masa de telarañas densas y pegajosas en un punto de tu elección dentro del alcance. Las telarañas llenan un cubo de 6 metros desde ese punto durante la duración. Las telarañas son terreno difícil y oscurecen levemente su área. Si las telarañas no están ancladas entre dos masas sólidas (como paredes o árboles) o extendidas sobre un suelo, pared o techo, la red conjurada colapsa sobre sí misma y el conjuro termina al comienzo de tu siguiente turno. Las telarañas extendidas sobre una superficie plana tienen una profundidad de 1,5 metros. Cada criatura que comience su turno en las telarañas o que entre en ellas durante su turno debe realizar una tirada de salvación de Destreza. Si falla la salvación, la criatura queda restringida mientras permanezca en las telarañas o hasta que logre liberarse. Una criatura restringida por las telarañas puede usar su acción para realizar una prueba de Fuerza contra la CD de salvación de tus conjuros. Si tiene éxito, deja de estar restringida. Las telarañas son inflamables. Cualquier cubo de 1,5 metros de telarañas expuesto al fuego arde en 1 ronda, infligiendo 2d4 de daño por fuego a cualquier criatura que comience su turno en el fuego.
material: Un poco de telaraña.

name: Web
desc:
Thick, sticky webs fill the area, lightly obscuring it and making it difficult terrain.

You must anchor the webs between two solid masses (such as walls or trees) or layer them across a flat surface. If you don't the conjured webs collapse and at the start of your next turn the spell ends.

Webs layered over a flat surface are 5 pies deep.

cada criatura that starts its turn in the webs or that enters them during its turn makes a tirada de salvación de Destreza or it is apresado as long as it remains in the webs (or until the criatura breaks free).

A criatura apresado by the webs can escape by using its action to make a Fuerza check against your CD de salvación del conjuro.

Any 5-pie cube of webs exposed to fuego burns away in 1 ronda, dealing 2d4 daño de fuego to any criatura that starts its turn in the fuego.
higher_level:
When using a 4th-level espacio de conjuro, you also summon a Gigante wolf spider in an unoccupied space within the web's area. When using a 6th-level espacio de conjuro, you summon up to two spiders.

When using a 7th-level espacio de conjuro, you summon up to three spiders. The spiders are friendly to you and your companions. Roll initiative for the spiders as a group, which have their own turns. The spiders obey your verbal commands, but they disappear when the spell ends or when they leave the web's area.

name: Weiler’s Ward
desc: You create four small orbs of faerie magic that float around your head and give off dim ligera out to a radius of 15 pies. Whenever a Large or smaller enemigo enters that area of dim ligera, or starts its turn in the area, you can use your reacción to attack it with one or more of the orbs. The enemigo criatura makes a tirada de salvación de Carisma. en una salvación fallida, the criatura is pushed 20 pies directly away from you, and each orb you used in the attack explodes violently, dealing 1d6 daño de fuerza to the criatura.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 3rd level or higher, the number of orbs increases by one for each slot level above 2nd.
material: a lock of hair from a fey criatura

name: Weird
desc: Aprovechando los miedos más profundos de un grupo de criaturas, creas criaturas ilusorias en sus mentes, visibles únicamente para ellas. Cada criatura en una esfera de 9 metros de radio centrada en un punto de tu elección dentro del alcance debe realizar una tirada de salvación de Sabiduría. Si falla la salvación, la criatura queda asustada durante la duración. La ilusión invoca los temores más profundos de la criatura, manifestando sus peores pesadillas como una amenaza implacable. Al comienzo de cada turno de la criatura asustada, esta debe superar una tirada de salvación de Sabiduría o recibir 4d10 de daño psíquico. Si supera la salvación, el conjuro termina para esa criatura.

name: Weird
desc: You create illusions which manifest the deepest fears and worst nightmares in the minds of todas las criaturas in the spell's area. cada criatura in the area makes a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or becomes asustado until the spell ends. At the end of each of a asustado criatura's turns, it makes a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or it recibe 4d10 daño psíquico. en una salvación exitosa, the spell ends for that criatura.

name: Whirlwind Kick
desc:
You must be able to move in order to cast this spell. You leap into the air and spin like a tornado, striking foes all around you with supernatural fuerza as you fly up to 60 pies in a straight line. Your movement (which does not provoke attacks of opportunity) must end on a surface that can support your weight or you fall as normal.

As part of the casting of this spell, make a melee ataque de conjuro against any number of criaturas in the area. On a hit, you deal your unarmed strike damage plus 2d6 daño de trueno. In addition, criaturas in the area make a tirada de salvación de Destreza or are either pulled 10 pies closer to you or pushed 10 pies away (your choice).
higher_level: The extra daño de trueno increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 3rd.

name: Who Goes There?
desc: You sift the surrounding air for sound wave remnants of recent conversations to discern passwords or other important information gleaned from a conversation, such as by guards on a picket line. The spell creates a cloud of words in the caster's mind, assigning relevance to them. Selecting the correct word or phrase is not foolproof, but you can make an educated guess. You make a Sabiduría (Percepción) check against the objetivo person's Sabiduría score (CD 10, if not specified) to successfully pick the key word or phrase.

name: Wield Soul
desc: You draw forth the ebbing life fuerza of a criatura and use its arcane power. Upon casting this spell, you must touch a criatura that dropped to 0 puntos de golpe since your last turn. If it fails a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría, you gain knowledge of spells, innate spells, and similar abilities it could have used today were it still alive. Expended spells and abilities aren't revealed. Choose one of these spells or abilities with a casting time no longer than 1 action. Until you complete a descanso largo, you can use this spell or ability once, as a acción adicional, using the criatura's CD de salvación del conjuro or spellcasting ability bonus.

name: Wild Hunt
desc:
While casting this spell, you must chant and drum, calling forth the spirit of the hunt. Up to nine other criaturas can join you in the chant.
  For the duration, cada criatura that participated in the chant is filled with the fervent bloodlust of the wild hunt and gains several benefits. The criatura is immune to being hechizado and asustado, it causa one extra die of damage on the first weapon or ataque de conjuro it makes on each of its turns, it has ventaja on Fuerza or Destreza tirada de salvacións (the criatura's choice), and its Clase de Armadura increases by 1.
  When this spell ends, a criatura affected by it suffers one level of agotamiento.

name: Wild Shield
desc:
You surround yourself with the forces of chaos. Wild lights and strange sounds engulf you, making Sigilo impossible. While **wild shield** is active, you can use a reacción to repel a spell of 4th level or lower that objetivos you or whose area you are within. A repelled spell has no effect on you, but doing this causes the chance of a chaos magic surge as if you had cast a spell, with you considered the caster for any effect of the surge.

**Wild shield** ends when the duration expires or when it absorbs 4 levels of spells. If you try to repel a spell whose level exceeds the number of levels remaining, make an ability check using your spellcasting ability. The CD equals 10 + the spell’s level – the number of levels **wild shield** can still repel. If the check succeeds, the spell is repelled; if the check fails, the spell has its full effect. The chance of a chaos magic surge exists regardless of whether the spell is repelled.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 5th level or higher, you can repel one additional spell level for each slot level above 4th.

name: Wind Lash
desc: Your swift gesture creates a solid lash of howling wind. Make a melee ataque de conjuro against the objetivo. On a hit, the objetivo recibe 1d8 daño cortante from the shearing wind and is pushed 5 pies away from you.
higher_level: The spell’s damage increases by 1d8 when you alcance 5th level (2d8), 11th level (3d8), and 17th level (4d8).

name: Wind Tunnel
desc:
You create a swirling tunnel of strong wind extending from yourself in a direction you choose. The tunnel is a line 60 pies long and 10 pies wide. The wind blows from you toward the end of the line, which is stationary once created. A criatura in the line moving with the wind (away from you) adds 10 pies to its Velocidad, and ranged weapon attacks launched with the wind don’t have desventaja because of long range. criaturas in the line moving against the wind (toward you) spend 2 pies of movement for every 1 pie they move, and ranged weapon attacks launched along the line against the wind are made with desventaja.

The wind tunnel immediately disperses gas or vapor, and it extinguishes candles, torches, and similar unprotected flames in the line. It causes protected flames, such as those of lanterns, to dance wildly and has a 50 percent chance of extinguishing them.
material: a paper straw

name: Wind Up
desc: You wind your power up like a spring. You gain ventaja on the next ataque cuerpo a cuerpo roll you make before the end of the spell's duration, after which the spell ends.

name: Wind Walk
desc: Tú y hasta diez criaturas voluntarias que puedas ver dentro del alcance adoptáis una forma gaseosa durante la duración, apareciendo como jirones de nube. Mientras está en esta forma de nube, una criatura tiene una velocidad de vuelo de 90 metros y tiene resistencia al daño de armas no mágicas. Las únicas acciones que una criatura puede realizar en esta forma son la acción de Correr o volver a su forma normal. Revertir la transformación lleva 1 minuto, durante el cual la criatura queda incapacitada y no puede moverse. Hasta que el conjuro termine, una criatura puede volver a la forma de nube, lo cual también requiere la transformación de 1 minuto. Si una criatura está en forma de nube y volando cuando el efecto termina, desciende 18 metros por ronda durante 1 minuto hasta que aterriza, lo cual hace de forma segura. Si no puede aterrizar tras 1 minuto, la criatura cae la distancia restante.
material: Fuego y agua bendita.

name: Wind Walk
desc:
The objetivos assume a gaseous form and appear as wisps of cloud. Each objetivo has a volando Velocidad of 300 pies and resistance to damage from no mágico weapons, but the only action it can take is the Dash action or to revert to its normal form (a process that recibe 1 minuto during which it is incapacitado and can't move).

Until the spell ends, a objetivo can change again to cloud form (in an identical transformation process).

When the effect ends for a objetivo volando in cloud form, it descends 60 pies each ronda for up to 1 minuto or until it safely lands. If the objetivo can't land after 1 minuto, the criatura falls the rest of the way normally.

name: Wind Wall
desc: Una pared de viento fuerte se eleva desde el suelo en un punto que eliges dentro del alcance. Puedes hacer que la pared tenga hasta 15 metros de largo, 4,5 metros de alto y 30 centímetros de grosor. Puedes darle a la pared la forma que desees, siempre que forme un camino continuo a lo largo del suelo. La pared dura mientras mantengas la concentración. Cuando aparece la pared, cada criatura dentro de su área debe realizar una tirada de salvación de Fuerza. Una criatura sufre 3d8 de daño contundente si falla la tirada, o la mitad si la supera. El fuerte viento mantiene alejados la niebla, el humo y otros gases. Las criaturas voladoras Pequeñas o menores, así como los objetos de ese tamaño, no pueden atravesar la pared. Los materiales sueltos y ligeros que entren en la pared salen despedidos hacia arriba. Las flechas, los virotes y otros proyectiles ordinarios lanzados contra objetivos situados detrás de la pared son desviados hacia arriba y fallan automáticamente. (Los pedruscos arrojados por gigantes o máquinas de asedio, y proyectiles similares, no se ven afectados.) Las criaturas en forma gaseosa no pueden atravesarla.
material: Un pequeño abanico y una pluma de origen exótico.

name: Wind Wall
desc:
A wall of strong wind rises from the ground at a point you choose. You can make the wall up to 50 pies long, 15 pies high, and 1 pie thick. You can shape the wall in any way you choose so long as it makes one continuous path along the ground.

When the wall appears, cada criatura within its area makes a tirada de salvación de Fuerza, taking 3d8 daño contundente en una salvación fallida, or half as much damage on a successful one.

The wall keeps fog, smoke, and other gases (including criaturas in gaseous form) at bay. Small or smaller volando criaturas or objects can't pass through. Loose, lightweight materials brought into the area fly upward. Arrows, bolts, and other ordinary projectiles launched at objetivos behind the wall are deflected upward and automatically miss (larger projectiles such as boulders and siege engine attacks are unaffected).
higher_level: el daño increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 3rd.

name: Wind of the Hereafter
desc:
You create a 30-pie-radius sphere of roiling wind that carries the choking stench of death. The sphere is centered on a point you choose within range. The wind blows around corners. When a criatura starts its turn in the sphere, it recibe 8d8 daño necrótico, or half as much damage if it makes a successful tirada de salvación de Constitución. criaturas are affected even if they hold their breath or don’t need to breathe.

The sphere moves 10 pies away from you at the start of each of your turns, drifting along the surface of the ground. It is not heavier than air but drifts in a straight line for the duration of the spell, even if that carries it over a cliff or gully. If the sphere meets a wall or other impassable obstacle, it turns to the left or right (select randomly).
material: a vial of air from a tomb

name: Winding Key
desc: Deep Magic: clockwork You objetivo a construct, giving it an extra action or move on each of its turns.

name: Winged Spies
desc: This spell summons a swarm of ravens or other birds-or a swarm of bats if cast at night or underground-to serve you as spies. The swarm moves out as you direct, but it won't patrol farther away than the spell's range. Commands must be simple, such as “search the valley to the east for travelers” or “search everywhere for humans on horses.” The GM can judge how clear and effective your instructions are and use that estimation in determining what the spies report. You can recall the spies at any time by whispering into the air, but the spell ends when the swarm returns to you and reports. You must receive the swarm's report before the spell expires, or you gain nothing. The swarm doesn't fight for you; it avoids danger if possible but defends itself if it must. You know if the swarm is destroyed, and the spell ends.

name: Winter's Radiance
desc: When you cast this spell, the perforante rays of a day’s worth of sunlight reflecting off fresh snow blankets the area. A criatura caught in the spell’s area debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Constitución or have desventaja on ranged attacks and Sabiduría (Percepción) checks for the duration of the spell. In addition, an affected criatura’s vision is hampered such that foes it objetivos are treated as having three-quarters cover.
material: a piece of polished glass

name: Winterdark
desc:
This spell invokes the deepest part of night on the winter solstice. You objetivo a 40-pie-radius, 60-pie-high cylinder centered on a point within range, which is plunged into darkness and unbearable frío. cada criatura in the area when you cast the spell and at the start of its turn debe realizar a successful tirada de salvación de Constitución or take 1d6 daño de frío and gain one level of agotamiento. criaturas immune to daño de frío are also immune to the agotamiento effect, as are criaturas wearing frío weather gear or otherwise adapted for a frío environment.

As a acción adicional, you can move the center of the effect 20 pies.

name: Wintry Glide
desc:
Upon casting wintry glide, you can travel via ice or snow without crossing the intervening space. If you are adjacent to a mass of ice or snow, you can enter it by expending 5 pies of movement. By expending another 5 pies of movement, you can immediately exit from that mass at any point—within 500 pies—that’s part of the contiguous mass of ice or snow. When you enter the ice or snow, you instantly know the extent of the material within 500 pies. You must have at least 10 pies of movement available when you cast the spell, or it fails.

If the mass of ice or snow is destroyed while you are transiting it, you debe realizar a successful tirada de salvación de Constitución against your CD de salvación del conjuro to avoid taking 4d6 daño contundente and falling derribado at the midpoint of a line between your entrance point and your intended exit point.

name: Wish
desc:
Wish es el conjuro más poderoso que puede lanzar una criatura mortal. Con solo pronunciar unas palabras en voz alta, puedes alterar los propios cimientos de la realidad de acuerdo con tus deseos. El uso básico de este conjuro es duplicar cualquier otro conjuro de nivel 8 o inferior. No necesitas cumplir ningún requisito de ese conjuro, incluidos los componentes costosos. El conjuro simplemente surte efecto. De manera alternativa, puedes crear uno de los siguientes efectos a tu elección:
- Creas un objeto con un valor de hasta 25.000 po que no sea un objeto mágico. El objeto no puede superar los 90 metros en ninguna dimensión, y aparece en un espacio desocupado que puedas ver en el suelo.
- Permites que hasta veinte criaturas que puedas ver recuperen todos sus puntos de golpe, y pones fin a todos los efectos sobre ellas descritos en el conjuro greater restoration.
- Concedes a hasta diez criaturas que puedas ver resistencia a un tipo de daño de tu elección.
- Concedes a hasta diez criaturas que puedas ver inmunidad a un único conjuro u otro efecto mágico durante 8 horas. Por ejemplo, podrías hacer que tú y todos tus compañeros seáis inmunes al ataque de drenaje de vida de un lich.
- Deshaces un evento reciente concreto forzando una repetición de cualquier tirada realizada durante el último asalto (incluido tu último turno). La realidad se reconfigura para adaptarse al nuevo resultado. Por ejemplo, un conjuro wish podría deshacer la tirada de salvación superada por un enemigo, el golpe crítico de un adversario o la tirada de salvación fallida de un aliado. Puedes forzar que la repetición se realice con ventaja o desventaja, y puedes elegir si usar la nueva tirada o la original.
Es posible que puedas lograr algo que vaya más allá del alcance de los ejemplos anteriores. Expresa tu deseo al DM con la mayor precisión posible. El DM tiene una gran libertad para decidir qué ocurre en tal caso; cuanto mayor sea el deseo, mayor será la probabilidad de que algo salga mal. El conjuro podría simplemente fallar, el efecto que deseas podría lograrse solo en parte, o podrías sufrir alguna consecuencia imprevista como resultado de cómo formulaste el deseo. Por ejemplo, desear que un villano estuviera muerto podría transportarte al futuro, a un periodo en el que ese villano ya no está vivo, retirándote efectivamente del juego. Del mismo modo, desear un objeto mágico legendario o un artefacto podría transportarte instantáneamente a la presencia del propietario actual del objeto. El estrés de lanzar este conjuro para producir cualquier efecto que no sea duplicar otro conjuro te debilita. Tras soportar ese estrés, cada vez que lances un conjuro hasta que termines un descanso largo, sufres 1d10 de daño necrótico por nivel de ese conjuro. Este daño no puede reducirse ni prevenirse de ninguna manera. Además, tu puntuación de Fuerza cae a 3, si no es ya 3 o menos, durante 2d4 días. Por cada uno de esos días que pases descansando y sin hacer nada más que actividad ligera, tu tiempo de recuperación restante se reduce en 2 días. Por último, existe un 33 por ciento de probabilidades de que no puedas volver a lanzar wish si sufres este estrés.

name: Wish
desc:
This is the mightiest of mortal magics and alters reality itself.

The safest use of this spell is the duplication of any other spell of 8th-level or lower without needing to meet its requirements (including components).

You may instead choose one of the following:

* One no mágico object of your choice that is worth up to 25, 000 gold and no more than 300 pies in any dimension appears in an unoccupied space you can see on the ground.
* Up to 20 criaturas that you can see to regain all their puntos de golpe, and each is further healed as per the greater restoration spell.
* Up to 10 criaturas that you can see gain resistance to a damage type you choose.
* Up to 10 criaturas you can see gain immunity to a single spell or other mágico effect for 8 horas.
* You fuerza a reroll of any roll made within the last ronda (including your last turn). You can fuerza the reroll to be made with ventaja or desventaja, and you can choose whether to use the reroll or the original roll.

You might be able to achieve something beyond the scope of the above examples. State your wish to the Narrator as precisely as possible, being very careful in your wording. Be aware that the greater the wish, the greater the chance for an unexpected result. This spell might simply fizzle, your desired outcome might only be partly achieved, or you might suffer some unforeseen consequence as a result of how you worded the wish. The Narrator has the final authority in ruling what occurs—and reality is not tampered with lightly.

**_Multiple Wishes:_** The stress of casting this spell to produce any effect other than duplicating another spell weakens you. Until finishing a descanso largo, each time you cast a spell you take 1d10 daño necrótico per level of that spell. This damage can't be reduced or prevented. In addition, your Fuerza drops to 3 for 2d4 days (if it isn't 3 or lower already). For each of those days that you spend resting and doing nothing more than ligera activity, your remaining recovery time decreases by 2 days. Finally, there is a 33% chance that you are unable to cast wish ever again.

name: Withered Sight
desc: You cause the eyes of a criatura you can see within range to lose acuity. The objetivo debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Constitución. en una salvación fallida, the criatura has desventaja on Sabiduría (Percepción) checks and all attack rolls for the duration of the spell. An affected criatura can repeat the tirada de salvación at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself en un éxito. This spell has no effect on a criatura that is blind or that doesn’t use its eyes to see.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 2nd level or higher, you can objetivo one additional criatura for each slot level above 1st.
material: a dried lizard's eye
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Ranger, Warlock, Wizard

name: Wolfsong
desc:
You emit a howl that can be heard clearly from 300 pies away outdoors. The howl can convey a message of up to nine words, which can be understood by all dogs and wolves in that area, as well as (if you choose) one specific criatura of any kind that you name when casting the spell.

If you cast the spell indoors and aboveground, the howl can be heard out to 200 pies from you. If you cast the spell underground, the howl can be heard from 100 pies away. A criatura that entiende the message is not compelled to act in a particular way, though the Naturaleza of the message might suggest or even dictate a course of action.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 2nd level or higher, you can name another specific recipient for each slot level above 2nd.

name: Word of Misfortune
desc: You hiss a word of Void Speech. Choose una criatura you can see within range. The next time the objetivo makes a tirada de salvación during the spell’s duration, it must roll a d4 and subtract the result from the total of the tirada de salvación. The spell then ends.

name: Word of Recall
desc: Tú y hasta cinco criaturas voluntarias que se encuentren a 1,5 metros de ti os teletransportáis instantáneamente a un santuario previamente designado. Tú y cualquier criatura que se teletransporte contigo aparecéis en el espacio desocupado más cercano al lugar que designaste cuando preparaste tu santuario (véase más abajo). Si lanzas este conjuro sin haber preparado antes un santuario, el conjuro no tiene ningún efecto. Debes designar un santuario lanzando este conjuro dentro de un lugar, como un templo, dedicado o estrechamente vinculado a tu deidad. Si intentas lanzar el conjuro de esta manera en un área que no está dedicada a tu deidad, el conjuro no tiene ningún efecto.

name: Word of Recall
desc:
The objetivos instantly teleport to a previously designated sanctuary, appearing in the nearest unoccupied space to the spot you designated when you prepared your sanctuary.

You must first designate a sanctuary by casting this spell within a location aligned with your faith, such as a temple dedicated to or strongly linked to your deity.

name: Wormway
desc:
You call a Gargantuan monstrosity from the depths of the world to carry you and your aliados across great distances. When you cast this spell, the nearest purple worm within range is hechizado by you and begins moving toward a point on the ground that you can see. If there are no purple worms within range, the spell fails. The earth rumbles slightly as it approaches and breaks through the surface. Any criaturas within 20 pies of that point debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Destreza or be knocked derribado and pushed 10 pies away from it.

Upon emerging, the purple worm lays down before you and opens its maw. objetivos can climb inside where they are enclosed in an impervious hemispherical dome of fuerza.

Once objetivos are loaded into the purple worm, nothing—not physical objects, energy, or other spell effects —can pass through the barrier, in or out, though objetivos in the sphere can breathe there. The hemisphere is immune to all damage, and criaturas and objects inside can't be damaged by attacks or effects originating from outside, nor can a objetivo inside the hemisphere damage anything outside it.

The atmosphere inside the dome is comfortable and dry regardless of conditions outside it.

The purple worm waits until you give it a mental command to depart, at which point it dives back into the ground and travels, without need for rest or food, as directly as possible while avoiding obstacles to a destination known to you. It travels 150 millas per day.

When the purple worm reaches its destination it surfaces, the dome vanishes, and it disgorges the objetivos in its mouth before diving back into the depths again.

The purple worm remains hechizado by you until it has delivered you to your destination and returned to the depths, or until it is attacked at which point the charm ends, it vomits its objetivos in the nearest unoccupied space as soon as possible, and then retreats to safety.

name: Wotan's Rede
desc: You recite a poem in the Northern tongue, sent to your lips by Wotan himself, to gain supernatural Perspicacia or advice. Your next Inteligencia or Carisma check within 1 minuto is made with ventaja, and you can include twice your competencia bonus. At the GM's discretion, this spell can instead provide a piece of general advice equivalent to an contact other plane.

name: Wresting Wind
desc: By blowing a pinch of confetti from your cupped hand, you create a burst of air that can rip weapons and other items out of the hands of your enemigos. Each enemigo in a 20-pie radius centered on a point you objetivo within range debe realizar a successful tirada de salvación de Fuerza or drop anything held in its hands. The objects land 10 pies away from the criaturas that dropped them, in random directions.
material: a handful of paper confetti

name: Write Memory
desc: Deep Magic: clockwork You copy your memories, or those learned from the spell read memory, onto an empty memory gear.

name: Writhing Arms
desc:
Your arms become constantly writhing tentacles. You can use your action to make a melee ataque de conjuro against any objetivo within range. The objetivo recibe 1d10 daño necrótico and is agarrado (escape CD is your CD de salvación del conjuro). If the objetivo does not escape your grapple, you can use your action on each subsequent turn to deal 1d10 daño necrótico to the objetivo automatically.

Although you control the tentacles, they make it difficult to manipulate items. You cannot wield weapons or hold objects, including material components, while under the effects of this spell.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espacio de conjuro of 2nd level or higher, el daño you deal with your tentacle attack increases by 1d10 for each slot level above 1st.

name: Writhing Transformation
desc:
As part of the casting of this spell, you lay down in the coffin on a patch of bare earth and it buries itself. Over the following week, you are incapacitado and do not need air, food, or sleep. Your insides are eaten by worms, but you do not die and your skin remains intact. If you are exhumed during this time, or if the spell is otherwise interrupted, you die.

At the end of the week, the transformation is complete and your true form is permanently changed. Your appearance is unchanged but underneath your skin is a sentient mass of worms. Any criatura that makes a Medicina check against your CD de salvación del conjuro realizes that there is something moving underneath your skin.

Your statistics change in the following ways:

* Your type changes to aberration, and you do not age or require sleep.
* You cannot be healed by normal means, but you can spend an action or acción adicional to consume 2d6 live worms, regaining an equal amount of puntos de golpe by adding them to your body.
* You can sense and telepathically control all worms that have the beast type and are within 60 pies of you.

In addition, you are able to discard your shell of skin and travel as a writhing mass of worms. As an action, you can abandon your skin and pour out onto the ground. In this form you have the statistics of **swarm of insects** with the following exceptions: you keep your puntos de golpe, Sabiduría, Inteligencia, and Carisma scores, and proficiencies. You know but cannot cast spells in this form. You also gain a burrow Velocidad of 10 pies. Any worms touching you instantly join with your swarm, granting you a number of temporary puntos de golpe equal to the number of worms that join with your form (maximum 40 temporary puntos de golpe). These temporary puntos de golpe last until you are no longer in this form.

If you spend an hora in the same space as a dead criatura of your original form's size, you can eat its insides and inhabit its skin in the same way you once inhabited your own. While you are in your swarm form, the most recent skin you inhabited remains intact and you can move back into a previously inhabited skin in 1 minuto. You have ventaja on checks made to impersonate a criatura while wearing its skin.

name: Yellow Sign
desc:
You attempt to afflict a humanoid you can see within range with memories of distant, alien realms and their peculiar inhabitants. The objetivo debe realizar a successful tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or be afflicted with a form of long-term madness and be hechizado by you for the duration of the spell or until you or one of your aliados harms it in any way. While hechizado in this way, the criatura regards you as a sacred monarch. If you or an aliado of yours is fighting the criatura, it has ventaja on its tirada de salvación.

A successful [remove curse](https://api.open5e.com/spells/remove-curse) spell ends both effects.
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Paladin, Ranger, Sorcerer, Warlock, Wizard

name: Zone of Truth
desc: Creas una zona mágica que protege contra el engaño en una esfera de 4,5 metros de radio centrada en un punto de tu elección dentro del alcance. Hasta que el conjuro termine, una criatura que entre en el área del conjuro por primera vez en un turno o que comience su turno en ella debe realizar una tirada de salvación de Carisma. Si falla la tirada, la criatura no puede decir una mentira deliberada mientras se encuentre dentro del radio. Sabes si cada criatura supera o falla su tirada de salvación. Una criatura afectada es consciente de ello y puede evitar responder a preguntas a las que normalmente respondería con una mentira. Dicha criatura puede ser evasiva en sus respuestas siempre que se mantenga dentro de los límites de la verdad.

name: Zone of Truth
desc:
You create a zone that minimizes Engaño. Any criatura that is able to be hechizado can't speak a deliberate lie while in the area.

An affected criatura is aware of the spell and can choose not to speak, or it might be evasive in its communications. A criatura that enters the zone for the first time on its turn or starts its turn there debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Carisma. en una salvación fallida, the criatura recibe 2d4 daño psíquico when it intentionally tries to mislead or occlude important information. Each time the spell damages a criatura, it makes a Engaño check (CD 8 + el daño dealt) or its suffering is obvious. You know whether a criatura succeeds on its tirada de salvación

name: Zymurgic Aura
desc: A wave of putrefaction surges from you, objetivoing criaturas of your choice within a 30-pie radius around you, speeding the rate of decay in those it touches. The objetivo debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Constitución. It recibe 10d6 daño necrótico en una salvación fallida or half as much en una salvación exitosa. Its punto de golpe maximum is reduced by an amount equal to el daño taken. This reduction lasts until the criatura recibe a descanso largo.
